summary: Predicting future states is essential for autonomous agents, yet current Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models fundamentally lack this capability, relying instead on reactive perception-action mapping. While integrating Predictive World Models (PWMs) addresses this gap, existing approaches either incur prohibitive cascaded latency or act as shallow terminal tasks that fail to deeply embed forward-looking reasoning. To endow VLA models with this reasoning capability, we propose X-Mind. Rather than treating PWMs as an external auxiliary module, this framework internalizes them as the Visual Chain-of-Thought (Visual CoT). By enforcing a world rollout prior to action, the model is constrained to imagine future evolution first, yielding a driving policy that is robustly grounded in environmental dynamics and aware of the future consequences its actions will unfold. The challenge here is efficiency, and we tackle it on two fronts. First, we introduce a compact representation of visual thinking: an abstract sketch that fuses a Bird's-Eye-View (BEV) layout with abstract driving priors (e.g., navigation intents and traffic rules). Rather than rolling out dense future frames, the model reasons over this sketch as a mental canvas; aided by a Deep Compression Autoencoder (DC-AE), a 12-frame future rollout is reduced to merely 96 tokens, alleviating the long-context computational bottleneck. Second, to accelerate generation further, we propose a recurrent block diffusion scheme that unrolls the denoising steps across the layers of the large drive model, folding iterative refinement into the backbone's one forward pass. Trained and validated on large-scale real-world data, X-Mind achieves competitive end-to-end driving performance, which makes it a highly practical, low-latency solution that successfully deploys large-scale cognitive reasoning directly onto resource-constrained vehicle platforms.

AI.tldr: X-Mind通过将预测世界模型作为视觉思维链内化到VLA模型中，并借助紧凑的BEV草图表示和循环块扩散机制，实现了高效、低延迟的未来状态推理，在资源受限的车辆平台上取得了竞争性的端到端驾驶性能。
AI.motivation: 当前的视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型本质缺乏预测未来状态的能力，仅依赖反应式的感知-动作映射；虽然集成预测世界模型（PWM）可以弥补这一缺陷，但现有方法要么引入不可接受的级联延迟，要么仅将PWM作为浅层终端任务，未能深度融合前向推理能力。
AI.method: X-Mind框架将预测世界模型内化为视觉思维链（Visual CoT），强制模型在执行动作前先进行世界展开推理；为提升效率，引入紧凑的BEV草图表示（融合导航意图和交通规则等驾驶先验），并通过深度压缩自编码器（DC-AE）将12帧未来展开压缩至仅96个token；此外，提出循环块扩散方案，将去噪步骤展开到大型驾驶模型的各层中，将迭代细化融合到骨干网络的一次前向传播中。
AI.result: 在大规模真实世界数据上训练和验证，X-Mind在端到端驾驶性能上达到了竞争性水平，同时实现了低延迟，使得大规模认知推理能够成功部署在资源受限的车辆平台上。
AI.conclusion: X-Mind表明，通过紧凑的抽象表征和高效的扩散机制，可以在VLA模型中深度嵌入前向推理能力，而无需牺牲效率，为自动驾驶等资源受限场景下的认知推理部署提供了实用且低延迟的解决方案。

title: How much of an LLM-generated clinical corpus is actually new? A production-scale measurement of content redundancy for provenance classification
summary: Clinical machine learning increasingly relies on training corpora generated by large language models (LLMs) rather than annotated by clinicians, and such corpora are described and reused largely on the basis of their reported scale. We test whether volume reflects information content. Analysing the complete output of a multi-agent clinical extraction pipeline applied to 167,034 patient narratives, 2.51 billion generated tokens across the ten text-bearing channels of an eleven-channel pipeline, we introduce Provenance-based Redundancy Decomposition, a token-level classification of the entire output by source. Only 10.9% of the output is trainable-unique content while 79.4% is redundant; raw token count overstates information content by roughly ninefold. The redundancy arises through two distinct mechanisms, verbatim copying of source context into per-item fields, and duplication of generated text across records, of which only the former is losslessly removable. An independent, model-free analysis based on lossless compression confirms the redundancy, recovering the two mechanisms without reference to the provenance labels. One pipeline channel carries almost no redundancy, showing that the level of redundancy depends on how each channel is structured rather than being a fixed property of LLM extraction. Because uncorrected redundancy up-weights the longer, more complex presentations that generate the most items, it skews the token-level training distribution of the corpus, a property we measure directly. In a controlled downstream test, de-duplicating the corpus before adaptation improved a clinical encoder on external disease-recognition benchmarks at equal token budget, robustly across adaptation depths and replicated on a second benchmark, confirming that the redundancy carries a measurable cost beyond storage. The classification tool is released openly.

AI.tldr: 本文通过提出基于溯源的重叠度分解方法，系统分析了大规模LLM生成的临床语料库，发现仅有10.9%的输出为可训练且唯一的内容，原始token计数高估信息含量约九倍，且冗余会扭曲训练分布并损害下游性能。
AI.motivation: 临床机器学习越来越多地依赖LLM生成而非临床医生标注的训练语料，这些语料通常仅以其报告规模来衡量和复用；然而，token数量是否真实反映信息内容尚未得到验证，这一gap可能导致对语料实际价值的严重误判。
AI.method: 研究对一个多智能体临床抽取流水线（应用于167,034份患者病历，生成2.51B token）的全部输出进行分析，提出了Provenance-based Redundancy Decomposition（基于溯源的重叠度分解），这是一种对全部输出按来源进行token级分类的方法；同时独立使用基于无损压缩的模型无关分析验证冗余性。
AI.result: 仅有10.9%的输出为可训练且唯一的内容，79.4%为冗余内容；原始token计数高估信息含量约九倍。冗余源于两种不同机制：将源上下文逐字复制到每个条目字段，以及跨记录中生成文本的重复，其中仅前者可无损去除。一个流水线通道几乎无冗余，表明冗余程度取决于通道结构而非LLM抽取的固有属性。去重后的语料在相同token预算下提升了临床编码器在外部疾病识别基准上的性能。
AI.conclusion: LLM生成语料的规模不能可靠反映其信息内容，冗余会扭曲token级训练分布（过度加权更长、更复杂的病例），且在存储之外带来可衡量的下游性能代价；研究公开了分类工具以支持后续工作。

title: Customized Generative AI Agent for Transportation Engineering Practice: A Development and Continued Pre-training Guideline
summary: Recent advancements in generative artificial intelligence (AI) and large language models (LLMs) have shown significant promise in automating complex reasoning, summarization, and question-answering tasks. However, the effectiveness of general-purpose LLMs in specialized engineering domains remains limited due to insufficient exposure to technical standards, engineering terminology, and domain-specific semantics. This study proposes a systematic approach to developing a customized generative AI agent for transportation engineering applications. A curated corpus of U.S. transportation manuals, design guidelines, and regulatory documents is used to conduct continued pretraining of six state-of-the-art LLMs through a unified low-rank adaptation (LoRA) framework. The training process is monitored to ensure convergence and model stability. Performance is evaluated using standard natural language processing metrics, including BLEU-4 and ROUGE, with Qwen2.5-7B and LLaMA-3.1-8B demonstrating the highest domain alignment and response quality. Results validate the effectiveness of LoRA-based adaptation in improving LLM performance on technical content interpretation and context-specific reasoning. This work contributes a reproducible development framework for constructing domain-specialized generative AI agents, supporting broader deployment in transportation research, design, planning, and policy analysis.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于LoRA统一微调框架的系统性方法，通过对六种先进大语言模型在交通工程领域语料上进行继续预训练，构建专用生成式AI智能体，实验表明Qwen2.5-7B和LLaMA-3.1-8B在技术内容理解和领域对齐方面表现最优，验证了LoRA适配策略在新兴工程领域大模型定制化中的有效性。
AI.motivation: 通用大语言模型在交通工程等专业工程领域中的有效性受到限制，主要原因在于模型缺乏对技术标准、工程术语和领域特定语义的充分训练，现有模型难以准确理解和推理专业工程内容。
AI.method: 研究构建了包含美国交通手册、设计指南和监管文件的领域语料库，采用统一的低秩适配（LoRA）框架对六种最先进的大语言模型进行继续预训练，通过监控训练过程确保模型收敛与稳定性，并利用BLEU-4和ROUGE等标准自然语言处理指标评估领域对齐与响应质量。
AI.result: Qwen2.5-7B和LLaMA-3.1-8B在领域对齐和响应质量方面表现最佳，实验结果验证了基于LoRA的领域适配方法在提升大语言模型对技术内容解读和上下文特定推理能力方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本研究提供了一个可复现的领域专用生成式AI智能体构建框架，支持大语言模型在交通工程研究、设计、规划和政策分析等场景中的更广泛部署，验证了低秩适配策略在工程领域大模型定制化中的实用价值。

title: RefGlass-GS: A UAV-Enabled Fusion Framework for Photorealistic, Semantic and Interactive Digitization of Reflective Glass Facades via Gaussian Splatting
summary: Existing digitization of buildings with reflective glass facades suffers from geometric reconstruction distortion, unrealistic view-dependent texture rendering, and difficulties in object-based semantic enhancement. Therefore, we propose RefGlass-GS, a fusion framework that enables end-to-end UAV-based photorealistic, semantic, and interactive digitization of reflective glass facades. The contributions include: (1) proposing an individual glass panel segmentation method based on maximum a posteriori estimation with structural regularities, robust to severe reflection and background interference; (2) formulating a UAV viewpoint planning optimization function that maximizes the coverage of view-dependent appearance for sufficient data capture; (3) developing an optimized Gaussian Splatting framework with a Reflection MLP, a novel deferred shading function, and two enhanced regularization terms for effective modeling of high-frequency near-field reflections; (4) introducing a standardized data organization paradigm for structuring GS-based representations into object-based models, facilitating interactive facility management on digital twin platforms. Experiments on real-world reflective glass facade scenes validate the effectiveness and superiority of the proposed method. Specifically, the glass panel segmentation achieves an improvement of 0.1927 in mIoU over SOTA methods, and only our method enables instance-level panel extraction. The UAV view planning improves novel view synthesis for reflective facades by 13.15 dB in PSNR compared to commercially used nap-of-the-object planning methods. The RefGlass-GS modeling outperforms SOTA Gaussian Splatting approaches for reflective scenes with an average improvement of 5.08 dB in PSNR.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RefGlass-GS，一种针对反射玻璃幕墙的端到端无人机融合框架，通过玻璃面板分割、视点规划、优化3D高斯泼溅与标准化数据组织，实现了高保真、可交互的数字化重建，在多项指标上大幅超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有建筑数字化方法在处理反射玻璃幕墙时存在几何重建失真、视点相关纹理渲染不真实以及难以进行面向对象的语义增强等问题，亟需一种能够同时实现高保真重建与语义交互的解决方案。
AI.method: 本文提出RefGlass-GS融合框架，包括：(1)基于最大后验估计与结构规则性的单块玻璃面板分割方法，对强烈反射和背景干扰具有鲁棒性；(2)最大化视点相关外观覆盖率的无人机视点规划优化函数；(3)含反射MLP、延迟着色函数及两项增强正则化项的优化3D高斯泼溅框架，用于建模高频近场反射；(4)用于将高斯泼溅表示结构化组织为面向对象模型的标准化数据范式。
AI.result: 真实场景实验表明：玻璃面板分割mIoU比现有最优方法提升0.1927，且仅本文方法支持实例级面板提取；视点规划使反射幕墙新视角合成PSNR比商用绕物规划方法提升13.15 dB；RefGlass-GS建模在反射场景上平均PSNR比现有最优高斯泼溅方法提升5.08 dB。
AI.conclusion: RefGlass-GS通过融合分割、规划、建模与数据组织，首次实现了反射玻璃幕墙从无人机数据采集到数字孪生平台交互式设施管理的端到端高保真数字化，为复杂反射建筑表面的自动化重建提供了有效范式。

title: Hybrid Retriever Evolution for Multimodal Document Reasoning Agents
summary: Different retrievers, including lexical, semantic, and multimodal approaches, provide highly complementary strengths for multimodal document understanding, yet most systems combine them through fixed pipelines that cannot adapt to the demands of individual reasoning steps. In this work, we ask whether retrieval orchestration itself can be learned as part of the reasoning process. We introduce a failure-driven evolution framework in which a meta-agent autonomously discovers how a tool-using task agent should coordinate diverse retrievers during multi-step document question answering. The meta-agent analyzes incorrect reasoning trajectories, actively probes the same tool environment to diagnose root causes, and iteratively rewrites the task agent's instructions, turning retrieval from a fixed front-end stage into an adaptive, step-wise reasoning decision. The evolved agent learns when to invoke each retriever, how to combine them, and how to compose evidence across modalities and pages. On MMLongBench-Doc and DocBench, the evolved agent achieves gains of up to +19.6 points over the unevolved baseline and consistently outperforms recent systems including MACT, MDocAgent, and SimpleDoc. Detailed retrieval analyses confirm that these improvements arise from adaptive routing and evidence composition rather than reliance on any hard coded retrieval mode, and evolution dynamics reveal a progressive shift from narrow lexical behavior to rich multi-tool coordination. These findings establish autonomous multi-agent coordination as a promising paradigm for multimodal document reasoning.

AI.tldr: 提出一种故障驱动演化框架，让元智能体通过分析错误推理轨迹、主动探测工具环境并迭代重写指令，自主学习如何在不同推理步骤中协调多种检索器（词汇、语义、多模态），将检索从固定前端变为自适应推理决策，在多项基准上取得显著提升。
AI.motivation: 不同的检索器（词汇、语义、多模态）在多模态文档理解中具有高度互补的优势，但现有系统大多通过固定流水线组合它们，无法根据单个推理步骤的需求进行自适应调整，导致检索策略僵化。
AI.method: 提出一种故障驱动演化框架，包含一个元智能体（meta-agent）和一个工具使用任务智能体（task agent）。元智能体分析任务智能体的错误推理轨迹，主动探测同一工具环境以诊断根因，然后迭代重写任务智能体的指令。通过此过程，任务智能体自主学会何时调用哪种检索器、如何组合它们、以及如何跨模态和跨页面组合证据，使检索成为自适应的逐步推理决策。
AI.result: 在MMLongBench-Doc和DocBench基准上，演化后的智能体相比未演化的基线提升高达+19.6分，并持续优于MACT、MDocAgent和SimpleDoc等近期系统。检索分析证实改进来自自适应路由和证据组合而非单一检索模式，演化动态显示从窄词汇行为向丰富多工具协调的渐进转变。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明自主的多智能体协调可以作为一种有前景的多模态文档推理范式，将检索从固定的前端阶段转变为推理过程的一部分，为未来自适应检索与推理融合提供了新方向。

title: Preventing Error Propagation in Multi-Agent AI through Runtime Monitoring
summary: Multi-agent AI systems can improve answer selection by allowing different language models to exchange reasoning traces, revise initial predictions, and support a final decision. However, such communication may also introduce reliability risks: reasoning from one agent can correct another agent's mistake, but it can also mislead an agent that was initially correct. This paper studies reliable multi-agent AI communication through reasoning exchange and runtime answer revision. We develop a framework in which agents first answer multiple-choice questions independently, then share reasoning traces and revise their decisions. We conduct numerical experiments where we evaluate whether this process improves accuracy, produces more positive than negative answer transitions, and remains effective across domains such as cybersecurity, networking, and general knowledge. The results help identify when multi-agent reasoning improves reliability and when it may propagate errors.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了多智能体AI系统中通过推理交换和运行时答案修订提升答案选择的可靠性，发现该过程虽能提升准确率并产生更多正向答案转换，但也可能传播错误，效果因领域而异。
AI.motivation: 多智能体AI系统允许不同语言模型交换推理轨迹、修订初始预测以支持最终决策，但这种通信机制既可能纠正错误，也可能误导原本正确的智能体，带来了可靠性风险。现有研究缺乏对这一过程的系统性评估，尤其是在不同领域中正向与负向答案转换的权衡分析。
AI.method: 作者提出一个框架，其中多个智能体首先独立回答多项选择题，然后共享各自的推理轨迹并基于此修订自己的初始决策。通过数值实验，评估该流程在准确性提升、正向答案转换是否多于负向转换等指标上的表现，并在网络安全、网络工程和通用知识等多个领域进行跨域验证。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，多智能体推理交换过程能够提升整体准确率，且产生的正向答案转换数量多于负向转换。然而，该方法的效果在不同领域之间存在显著差异，在某些场景下仍可能传播错误，表明其可靠性受领域特性影响。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了多智能体推理交换在提升系统可靠性方面的潜力与局限性：当正向知识传播占主导时效果显著，但在错误易传播的领域中可能适得其反。研究结果为设计更可靠的多智能体通信机制提供了指导，未来需要关注如何抑制错误传播并增强跨领域适应性。

title: DLGStream: Dynamic Language-embedded Guassian Splatting for Open-vocabulary Enabled Free-viewpoint Video Streaming
summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting~(3DGS) has emerged as a promising paradigm for reconstructing streamable free-viewpoint video~(FVV) from multi-view videos. However, 3DGS-based FVVs typically lack user interaction and editing capabilities, which diminishes the immersive experience. Recent research has integrated language features from CLIP into 3DGS via distillation, enabling open-vocabulary queries and supporting many downstream applications. Nevertheless, the stringent requirements of FVV, low frame size and high FPS, make current language Gaussian representations unsuitable for language-embedded FVV. In this paper, we propose DLGStream, a novel language-embedded FVV representation that streams time-varying language features alongside Gaussian attributes to support 4D environment interaction, scene editing, and spatial intelligence. Specifically, we propose a dual-opacity dynamic language Gaussian representation, which maintains two opacity attributes for color and language features to deal with performance degradation that occurs when colors and features are jointly optimized. Furthermore, we introduce an interpolation-based deformation field to reduce temporal redundancy. This deformation field can also be used for 4D frame interpolation, boosting FVV sequences from low to high FPS. Experimental results demonstrate that DLGStream achieves superior performance in both on open-vocabulary segmentation and reconstruction quality with an average frame size of merely 43 KB. The code is available on \href{https://github.com/kkkzh/DLGStream}{https://github.com/kkkzh/DLGStream}.

AI.tldr: 提出DLGStream，一种嵌入语言的动态3D高斯表示方法，通过双不透明度机制和基于插值的变形场，实现低帧大小（平均43KB）、高FPS的流式自由视点视频的开放词汇查询与场景编辑。
AI.motivation: 现有3DGS-based自由视点视频缺乏用户交互与编辑能力，而将语言特征蒸馏到3DGS的方法由于FVV对低帧大小和高FPS的严苛要求，无法直接应用于动态场景的流式表示。
AI.method: 提出双不透明度动态语言高斯表示（Dual-Opacity Dynamic Language Gaussian），分别为颜色和语言特征维护独立的透明度属性，避免联合优化时的性能退化；同时引入基于插值的变形场以减少时间冗余，并支持4D帧插值以提升FPS。
AI.result: 在开放词汇分割和重建质量上均达到优越性能，平均帧大小仅43 KB，实现了低开销、高帧率的语言嵌入自由视点视频流。
AI.conclusion: DLGStream首次实现了可流式传输的语言嵌入自由视点视频，支持4D环境交互、场景编辑和空间智能，为沉浸式动态场景理解提供了高效且实用的解决方案。

title: Resolution Thresholds in VLM Detection of Harmful ASCII Art Across Construction Modes and Languages
summary: Large Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are increasingly deployed as content moderation tools, yet they remain vulnerable to jailbreak attacks in which harmful text is visually encoded as ASCII art. This can allow inappropriate or harmful content to bypass moderation systems. To address this vulnerability, this paper investigates how image resolution affects VLM detection of harmful ASCII art across eight character construction modes (L1-L8), ranging from dense block characters to word-embedded designs. We evaluate eight state-of-the-art VLMs on English and Chinese corpora using a pipeline that generates ASCII art images at ten resolution scales, probing whether a consistent detection-failure threshold exists across models, modes, and languages. Results indicate that detection rates decline sharply above certain resolution thresholds, and that word-based modes are the most resistant to detection across the full resolution range. These findings reveal a systematic vulnerability in VLM-based content moderation systems and motivate resolution-aware evaluation standards.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了大型视觉语言模型（VLM）在内容审核中因无法有效检测ASCII艺术形式的有害文本而存在的系统性漏洞，发现检测准确率随图像分辨率升高而急剧下降，其中基于单词的ASCII艺术模式在所有分辨率下均最难被检测。
AI.motivation: 大型视觉语言模型（VLM）被广泛部署为内容审核工具，但它们容易受到一种特定的越狱攻击：有害文本被视觉编码为ASCII艺术形式，从而绕过审核系统。现有研究尚未系统探究图像分辨率如何影响VLM对这类攻击的检测能力，尤其缺乏跨多种ASCII艺术构造模式、模型和语言的一致性分析。
AI.method: 本研究构建了一个管道（pipeline），生成涵盖八种字符构造模式（L1-L8，从密集块字符到单词嵌入设计）的ASCII艺术图像，并在十种分辨率尺度下进行评估。作者在英文和中文语料上测试了八个最先进的VLM，通过探测是否存在跨模型、模式与语言的一致检测失败阈值来分析分辨率对检测性能的影响。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，VLM对ASCII艺术中有害内容的检测率在超过特定分辨率阈值后急剧下降；基于单词的ASCII艺术模式（word-based modes）在整个分辨率范围内最具抵抗性，即最难被检测。该现象在跨模型与跨语言设置下均一致出现。
AI.conclusion: 本研究揭示了VLM内容审核系统在面对ASCII艺术越狱攻击时存在系统性的分辨率相关脆弱性，表明当前审核机制缺乏对不同视觉编码形式的鲁棒性。研究结果呼吁建立分辨率感知的评估标准，以提升VLM在实际部署中的安全性。

title: Memory as an Attack Surface in LLM Agents: A Study on Multiple-Choice Question Answering
summary: AI agents extend conventional large language model (LLM) applications by integrating language understanding with task execution, external tool use, and memory mechanisms. While memory allows agents to retain prior interactions and provide more personalized and context-aware responses, it also introduces a new vulnerability: information stored in memory can influence future outputs even when the current query is clean. In this paper, we investigate memory manipulation in LLM-based agents for multiple-choice question answering. We first design and implement an LLM-based AI agent with an external memory component that stores and retrieves task-relevant information. We then introduce basic memory manipulation scenarios in which misleading or corrupted memories are inserted into the agent before it answers multiple-choice questions. Using a controlled experimental setup, we compare the agent's performance before and after memory manipulation and measure changes in answer accuracy, attack success rate, and selection of manipulated options. Our results show that even simple memory manipulations can noticeably affect the agent's final answers, causing it to select incorrect options despite receiving clean and well-formed questions.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了基于LLM的AI代理在多选题问答场景中面临的内存操纵攻击，实验表明即使简单的误导性记忆插入也能显著影响代理的最终答案，导致其选择错误选项。
AI.motivation: LLM代理通过外部记忆机制存储历史交互信息以提供个性化响应，但这一机制引入了新的安全漏洞：存储在记忆中的信息即使在当前查询干净的情况下也可能污染未来输出。现有研究对记忆操纵攻击的威胁评估尚不充分，本文旨在系统探究此类攻击对代理问答性能的影响。
AI.method: 设计并实现了一个包含外部记忆组件的LLM代理系统，该系统可存储和检索任务相关信息。在此基础上构造了基本的记忆操纵场景，在代理回答多选题之前向其记忆组件中插入误导性或被篡改的记忆信息。通过控制变量实验，对比代理在记忆操纵前后的答案准确率、攻击成功率和操纵选项选择率的变化。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，即使是简单的记忆操纵也能显著影响代理的最终回答，导致代理在面对清晰且格式正确的提问时仍然选择错误选项。通过测量答案准确率下降、攻击成功率以及操纵选项被选中的比例，量化了记忆操纵对代理决策的负面影响。
AI.conclusion: 记忆机制虽然增强了LLM代理的个性化能力，但其可被轻易操纵的特性构成了严重的安全隐患。该研究揭示了记忆攻击对代理系统可靠性的威胁，提示未来需要在代理设计中加强对记忆完整性的保护与验证机制。

title: HKVLM: Faithful Reasoning Grounding by Binding Language Queries to a Frozen Detector
summary: Many visual requests -- ``the object to open this bottle'', ``the person not wearing a helmet'' -- require reasoning, not just category matching. Pure open-vocabulary detectors need an explicit phrase; vision-language models (VLMs) can reason yet ``see but mis-speak'', attending to the right region but returning the wrong box or label. We argue this is a \emph{binding} failure: in coordinate-as-text VLMs localization passes through the autoregressive head, coupling it to language generation; in two-stage pipelines the model's intent is squeezed through a single class string. We present HKVLM, which removes localization from the language path. A frozen, language-aligned detector emits class-agnostic region proposals; a frozen language model encodes reasoning instructions as referential query embeddings; a lightweight \emph{alignment hook} binds queries to regions by contrastive retrieval and bipartite assignment in a shared embedding space. A perception-grounded faithfulness veto forbids naming an object that no region supports. Only the hook is trained, targeting small-data cold-start settings where monolithic VLM tuning struggles. We formalize a \emph{say-vs-see} decomposition separating localization error (SeeErr) from binding error (SayErr), and evaluate on RefCOCO/RefCOCO+/RefCOCOg and POPE. With frozen Grounding DINO and Qwen2.5-VL, training only the hook lifts grounding accuracy by $50$--$90\times$ over untrained cross-space matching; the faithfulness veto raises POPE accuracy from near-chance ($0.50$) to $0.66$--$0.76$ and reduces hallucination from ${\sim}0.99$ to $0.23$--$0.43$, with gains from $200$ expressions. Increasing proposals from $M{=}50$ to $M{=}300$ improves grounding by $19$--$24\%$ without retraining, confirming that residual error is perceptual (SeeErr) rather than binding (SayErr).

AI.tldr: HKVLM提出通过轻量级对齐钩子（alignment hook）将冻结的检测器和语言模型在共享嵌入空间中进行对比检索和二分图匹配，从而解耦视觉定位与语言生成，解决VLM中的绑定失败问题；在冷启动小数据场景下，仅训练钩子即可将接地准确率提升50-90倍，并将幻觉率从~0.99降至0.23-0.43。
AI.motivation: 现有开放词汇检测器需要显式短语匹配，无法执行推理；而视觉-语言模型虽能推理但存在"看到却说错"的绑定失败问题——在坐标即文本的VLMs中，定位经过自回归头导致与语言生成耦合，在双阶段流水线中模型意图被压缩到单一类别字符串中，两者均会导致模型关注正确区域却返回错误框或标签。
AI.method: HKVLM采用冻结的语言对齐检测器生成类无关区域提案，冻结的语言模型将推理指令编码为参照查询嵌入，通过一个轻量级对齐钩子在共享嵌入空间中进行对比检索和二分图分配来绑定查询与区域，并引入感知接地忠实否决机制（perception-grounded faithfulness veto）禁止命名无区域支持的物体；仅训练对齐钩子，面向小数据冷启动场景；同时形式化了说-视分解（say-vs-see decomposition），将定位误差（SeeErr）与绑定误差（SayErr）分离。
AI.result: 在RefCOCO/RefCOCO+/RefCOCOg和POPE上，使用冻结的Grounding DINO和Qwen2.5-VL，仅训练钩子即可使接地准确率相较于未训练的跨空间匹配提升50-90倍；忠实否决机制将POPE准确率从接近随机水平（0.50）提升至0.66-0.76，并大幅降低幻觉率（从~0.99降至0.23-0.43），且仅需200个表达即可获得增益；将提案数量从M=50增至M=300可在不重新训练的情况下提升接地性能19-24%，证实残差误差是感知性（SeeErr）而非绑定性（SayErr）。
AI.conclusion: HKVLM证明了通过解耦定位与语言生成并在嵌入空间中进行轻量级对齐，可以有效解决VLM中的绑定失败问题；在小数据冷启动场景下，仅需训练一个轻量钩子即可获得显著性能提升；说-视分解框架表明当前残差主要来自感知层面的定位误差而非绑定层面的语义误差，为未来VLM的模块化改进提供了方向。

title: Neural Procedural Memory: Empowering LLM Agents with Implicit Activation Steering
summary: While Large Language Models (LLMs) excel as static solvers, transforming them into autonomous agents remains challenging. This transition requires continuous environmental interaction, yet current agents lack the necessary persistent procedural memory. Existing approaches predominantly employ Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) to inject explicit textual guidelines into model contexts. However, relying solely on symbolic instructions can introduce a text-action disconnect, frequently failing to activate the internal representations necessary for correct task execution. To address this, the paper introduces Neural Procedural Memory (NPM), a training-free framework that represents agent memory through implicit activation steering rather than explicit instructions. By distilling procedural skills from historical contrastive experiences into steering vectors in the activation space, NPM directly activates the task-relevant neural mechanisms to guide task execution. Evaluations across four agent benchmarks show that NPM performs comparably to baselines using explicit textual instructions. Furthermore, the results show that combining implicit steering with explicit workflows provides complementary advantages, leading to more robust task execution. Representational analyses indicate that these steering vectors encode consistent task logic, forming organized structures within the activation space. These findings suggest that implicit activation steering provides a promising approach for managing agent memory.

AI.tldr: 本文提出神经程序记忆（NPM）框架，通过隐式激活引导而非显式文本指令来管理智能体记忆，从历史对比经验中提取行为知识并编码为激活空间中的引导向量，实验表明该方法在多个智能体基准任务上达到与显式指令方法相当的性能，且二者结合可产生互补优势。
AI.motivation: 当前将大语言模型转化为自主智能体的关键挑战在于缺乏持续的交互式程序记忆，现有方法主要依赖检索增强生成（RAG）注入显式文本指令，但这种符号化指令存在文本-动作脱节问题，难以激活执行正确任务所需的内部神经表征，导致任务执行失败。
AI.method: 本文提出神经程序记忆（NPM）框架，是一种无需训练的方法，通过从历史对比经验中提取行为技能并将其蒸馏为激活空间中的引导向量，以隐式激活引导替代显式指令，从而直接激活与任务相关的神经机制来指导智能体执行任务。
AI.result: 在四个智能体基准任务上的评估表明，NPM的性能与使用显式文本指令的基线方法相当；进一步实验显示，将隐式引导与显式工作流相结合能够产生互补优势，实现更鲁棒的任务执行；表征分析表明这些引导向量编码了一致的任务逻辑，在激活空间中形成了有组织的结构。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果表明隐式激活引导为管理智能体记忆提供了一种有前景的新范式，其通过直接作用于神经激活空间而非符号指令空间来驱动任务执行，能够有效弥补显式方法的不足，并为构建更鲁棒的自主智能体记忆机制提供了新的方向。

title: Characterizing Large Language Model Agentic Workflows: A Study on N8n Ecosystem
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are rapidly being adopted in low-code and no-code automation platforms, where non-expert users design workflows that combine natural language understanding with external services and APIs. LLM agents are LLM systems that use LLMs as a core "brain" to reason, plan, and autonomously execute complex, multi-step tasks. In this paper, we present the first large-scale empirical study of LLM agentic workflows in low-code automation platforms. We analyze more than 6,000 publicly available n8n workflows and examine four aspects of their design: task distribution, structural and tool use patterns, reliability mechanisms, and autonomy levels. Our analysis shows that LLM workflows are not merely prompt response pipelines. Instead, LLMs are commonly embedded within broader automation structures involving control logic, external tools, communication services, storage systems, and human review points. We further find that while many workflows include lightweight post-processing or routing logic after LLM execution, explicit reliability mechanisms such as structured fallback paths, repair loops, failure-specific alerts, and human approval gates remain relatively uncommon. These results reveal a gap between the increasing deployment of LLM agents in practical automation ecosystems and the limited engineering support for reliability, safety, and governance. Overall, our study provides ten empirical findings and five research takeaways for researchers, platform developers, and practitioners seeking to understand and improve real-world LLM agentic workflows.

AI.tldr: 本文首次对低代码自动化平台中超过6,000个公开的n8n LLM agentic工作流进行了大规模实证研究，揭示了LLM被嵌入更广泛的自动化结构中而非仅作为简单提示管道，同时指出明确可靠性机制（如回退路径、修复循环、人工审批）仍相对缺乏，最终提供了十项实证发现和五项研究启示。
AI.motivation: LLM正被迅速集成到低代码/无代码自动化平台中，但现有研究缺乏对这些平台中LLM agentic工作流的大规模实证分析，其实际设计模式、结构特征、可靠性机制和自治水平尚未被系统理解。
AI.method: 对n8n平台上超过6,000个公开可用的LLM agentic工作流进行了大规模实证分析，从四个维度进行考察：任务分布、结构与工具使用模式、可靠性机制以及自治水平。
AI.result: 分析发现LLM通常被嵌入包含控制逻辑、外部工具、通信服务、存储系统和人工审核点的更广泛自动化结构中，而非仅作为简单的提示响应管道；许多工作流在LLM执行后包含轻量级后处理或路由逻辑，但显式可靠性机制（如结构化回退路径、修复循环、故障告警和人工审批门）仍然相对罕见；揭示了LLM agent在自动化生态系统中日益增加的部署与可靠性、安全性和治理方面有限工程支持之间的差距。
AI.conclusion: 研究提供了十项实证发现和五项研究启示，为研究人员、平台开发者和从业者理解和改进真实世界中的LLM agentic工作流提供了重要参考，指出了加强可靠性、安全性和治理工程支持的迫切需求。

title: On Test-Time Scaling for Vision-Language Models
summary: Test-time scaling is a paradigm where large models use additional compute at inference to achieve better performance, without changing model weights. While it has been widely studied for Large Language Models (LLMs), its applicability to Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) remains less explored and analyzed, with limited analysis of whether, when, and to what extent these approaches transfer to LVLMs. In this work, we ask a simple but fundamental question: can conventional test-time scaling methods developed for LLMs be directly applied to LVLMs? We present the first comprehensive study of test-time scaling for LVLMs, spanning multiple models and model sizes, nine test-time scaling methods, and six diverse benchmarks. Our main findings is that 1) different from previous findings, small, well-performing models benefit the most from test-time scaling, enabling performance improvements of up to around 30\%, reaching large models performance, and often outperforming them, 2) LVLMs lose focus when given more compute than necessary, and 3) Visual information is encoded early in the reasoning chain, after which the chain is dominated by text-only reasoning and the contribution of image tokens drops significantly. Finally, we also provide a global and fine-grained analysis on the quality and information sufficiency of the reasoning chains produced. Overall, our findings and analysis provide practical guidance and insights into LVLMs and their deployment in research and industry.

AI.tldr: 首个系统性研究测试时扩展方法对大型视觉-语言模型的适用性，发现小模型受益最大（性能提升约30%），视觉信息在推理链早期编码后链路由纯文本推理主导，且LVLMs在给定过多计算时会丢失关注焦点。
AI.motivation: 测试时扩展（test-time scaling）在大型语言模型（LLMs）中已被广泛研究，但其对大型视觉-语言模型（LVLMs）的适用性尚缺乏系统性的分析与探索，现有研究不清楚这些方法是否、何时以及在何种程度上能够迁移到LVLMs上。
AI.method: 论文对LVLMs的测试时扩展进行了首次全面研究，涵盖多个模型及模型规模、九种测试时扩展方法，并在六个多样化基准上进行评估，同时对推理链的质量和信息充分性进行了全局和细粒度的分析。
AI.result: 研究发现：1）与之前结论不同，小但性能良好的模型从测试时扩展中获益最大，性能提升可达约30%，能够达到甚至超越大模型性能；2）LVLMs在获得超出必要量的计算时会丢失关注焦点；3）视觉信息在推理链早期被编码，此后推理链主要由纯文本推理主导，图像token的贡献显著下降。
AI.conclusion: 研究成果为LVLMs的测试时扩展提供了系统性分析与实践指导，揭示了不同规模模型的最佳扩展策略、视觉-文本推理的动态交互模式以及计算资源分配的关键权衡，对LVLMs在研究和工业中的部署具有重要参考价值。

title: ARKD: Adaptive Reinforcement Learning-Guided Bidirectional KL Divergence Distillation for Text Generation
summary: Knowledge distillation (KD) is a key technique for compressing Large Language Models (LLMs), yet methods relying on a single KL objective often fail to balance primary distribution fitting with long-tail probability modeling, limiting both generation quality and generalization. To address this, we analyze the complementary roles of forward and reverse KL divergence (FKL/RKL) in distribution alignment from theoretical and empirical perspectives. We then propose a reinforcement-learning-based adaptive KL-weighted distillation framework, in which a policy network dynamically assigns weights to FKL and RKL based on teacher-student distributional characteristics, guided by immediate reward signals to achieve dual alignment on principal and long-tail modes. Extensive experiments demonstrate consistent improvements across Rouge-L and BertScore metrics, surpassing greedy heuristics by 0.4-0.6 points and outperforming other baseline methods on diverse benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文针对知识蒸馏中单一KL散度目标无法同时拟合主分布与长尾概率的问题，提出一种基于强化学习的自适应KL加权重蒸馏框架，通过策略网络动态分配前向与反向KL散度的权重，在多项基准上显著提升了生成质量与泛化性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于单一KL散度目标的大语言模型知识蒸馏方法难以同时实现主分布拟合与长尾概率建模，导致生成质量和泛化能力受限，亟需一种能够动态平衡前向与反向KL散度的蒸馏策略。
AI.method: 本文从理论和实证角度分析了前向与反向KL散度在分布对齐中的互补作用，并据此提出一种基于强化学习的自适应KL加权蒸馏框架，其中策略网络依据师生分布特征动态分配前向与反向KL散度的权重，由即时奖励信号引导实现对主模态和长尾模态的双重对齐。
AI.result: 在多项基准上的大量实验表明，该方法在Rouge-L和BertScore指标上持续优于贪心启发式方法0.4-0.6个点，并超越其他基线方法，验证了自适应KL加权策略的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本研究揭示了前向与反向KL散度在知识蒸馏中的互补作用，并提出了一种基于强化学习实现自适应加权的可行方案，为提升大语言模型蒸馏效果提供了新的思路和框架。

title: HiComm: Hierarchical Communication for Multi-agent Reinforcement Learning
summary: Cooperative multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) often relies on communication to mitigate partial observability, yet most existing protocols treat messages as flat dense vectors detached from the structure of the observations they summarize. This design overlooks an important source of inductive bias in many cooperative environments, where observations naturally follow a hierarchy such as groups and entities. We propose \textsc{HiComm}, a plug-in communication module that grounds messages in the sender's hierarchical observation. \textsc{HiComm} is receiver-driven: the receiver issues a query, and the hierarchy is resolved through a three-stage decoding process that first selects a group, then a sender, and then an entity within that group, returning the corresponding feature slice as the message. This converts communication from unstructured vector transmission into structured information retrieval over the sender's observation hierarchy. We instantiate this mechanism with Straight-Through Gumbel-Softmax for differentiable discrete selection and a lightweight shared projection design that attaches to standard MARL pipelines. Experiments across cooperative MARL tasks with different observation structures and coordination demands show that \textsc{HiComm} matches or outperforms representative learned communication baselines while reducing communication volume by up to $23\times$ per receiver per episode.

AI.tldr: HiComm是一种即插即用的通信模块，通过将消息锚定在发送者的层次化观测结构上，将多智能体通信从非结构化向量传输转化为结构化信息检索，在降低通信量高达23倍的同时匹配或超越主流基线性能。
AI.motivation: 现有合作式多智能体强化学习中的通信协议通常将消息视为扁平稠密向量，忽略了观测中天然存在的层次结构（如群组和实体），从而丢失了重要的归纳偏置，导致通信效率低下。
AI.method: HiComm提出接收者驱动的通信范式，接收者发出查询后，通过三级解码过程依次选择群组、发送者以及群组内的实体，返回对应的特征切片作为消息，将通信变为结构化信息检索；采用Straight-Through Gumbel-Softmax实现可微分的离散选择，并设计了轻量级共享投影模块以适配标准MARL流程。
AI.result: 在多种具有不同观测结构和协调需求的多智能体合作任务上，HiComm在匹配或超越代表性学习型通信基线的同时，将每个接收者每回合的通信量降低了最高23倍。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，显式利用观测的层次结构来设计通信机制能显著提升通信效率，为多智能体系统中结构化通信的设计提供了新的方向。

title: Self-Evolving Agentic Image Restoration via Deliberate Planning and Intuitive Execution
summary: Real-world image restoration (IR) remains challenging due to complex and coupled degradations. While recent agentic IR frameworks leverage Large Language Models for flexible tool planning, they face two critical limitations. First, from a search scheme perspective, excessive reliance on greedy strategies fails to balance exploration and exploitation. Second, existing agentic systems underutilize information, exhibiting episodic amnesia. To address these challenges, we propose \textbf{Self-Evolving Agentic Image Restoration (SEAR)}, which formulates restoration as a sequential decision-making problem. Inspired by the dual-process theory, SEAR comprises an Intuitive Executor and a Deliberate Planner, respectively following the fast-thinking \textit{System 1} and slow-thinking \textit{System 2} principles. The Deliberate Planner employs Pruning-Aware Monte Carlo Tree Search for long-horizon reasoning, utilizing a hybrid no-reference reward and a Multimodal Large Language Model (MLLM)-based tournament to prevent metric exploitation. Complementarily, the Intuitive Executor leverages a self-evolving episodic memory indexed by degradation-aware state fingerprints. This mechanism distills expensive search trajectories into adaptive expertise, overcoming episodic amnesia while progressively amortizing cold-start exploration costs through memory reuse. Extensive experiments on synthetic and real-world benchmarks demonstrate its strong perceptual and quantitative performance.

AI.tldr: 提出SEAR框架，将图像恢复建模为序列决策问题，结合直觉执行器（System 1）与审慎规划器（System 2），利用剪枝感知的蒙特卡洛树搜索和自进化情景记忆，在合成与真实场景上取得优异性能。
AI.motivation: 现有智能体图像恢复框架存在两个关键局限：搜索策略过度依赖贪婪方法，无法平衡探索与利用；智能体系统对信息的利用不足，表现出情景性遗忘（episodic amnesia）。
AI.method: SEAR将图像恢复形式化为序列决策问题，受双过程理论启发，包含直觉执行器（System 1）和审慎规划器（System 2）。审慎规划器采用剪枝感知的蒙特卡洛树搜索进行长程推理，使用混合无参考奖励和基于多模态大语言模型的锦标赛机制防止指标利用；直觉执行器利用自进化情景记忆，通过退化感知状态指纹索引，将昂贵的搜索轨迹蒸馏为自适应专业知识，通过记忆复用逐步摊销冷启动探索成本。
AI.result: 在合成与真实世界基准上的大量实验表明，SEAR在感知质量和量化指标上均表现出强劲性能。
AI.conclusion: SEAR通过双系统协同架构有效解决了现有智能体IR框架的探索-利用失衡和情景遗忘问题，其记忆复用机制为降低长期推理成本提供了可行路径。

title: LLM Agents Are Latent Context Managers: Eliciting Self-Managed Context via a Proprioceptive Dashboard
summary: Long-horizon tool agents are bottlenecked by how their context grows toward the limits of the context window. Recent systems make context management agent- or system-controlled, but they either learn a compression policy that discards evidence or manage context in a layer the agent never sees. We argue both leave a more basic gap unaddressed. Frontier language models are proprioceptively blind to their own context. From the prompt alone they cannot see how large, how old, or how used each block is, the signals a keep-or-drop decision needs. We hypothesize that competent context management is already latent in capable models, and that what is missing is not a learned policy but an interface exposing this state. We introduce VISTA (Visible Internal State for Tool Agents), a training-free, model-agnostic layer that represents working memory as typed, addressable blocks, surfaces a runtime dashboard of per-block token usage, recency, and access history, and archives blocks as recoverable full-fidelity payloads. On LOCA-Bench, BrowseComp-Plus, and GAIA, the same untrained interface transfers across million-, 100K-, and 10K-scale trajectories. On LOCA-Bench it improves four backbones and lifts Gemini-3-Flash from 22.7 to 50.7%. The lift grows with context pressure and transfers across backbones. Ablations further confirm that the dashboard matters beyond archive and recovery tools.

AI.tldr: VISTA通过为工具智能体暴露上下文的运行时状态（包括各块的Token使用量、时效性和访问历史）来解决长上下文管理问题，无需训练即可在多个基准测试上显著提升性能，证明了该能力已内置于现有大模型中。
AI.motivation: 现有长程工具智能体在上下文接近窗口限制时性能严重下降，目前的上下文管理方法要么依赖学习压缩策略导致信息丢失，要么在智能体不可见的层面进行管理；根本问题在于前沿语言模型对其自身上下文缺乏本体感知能力——模型无法从提示中获知各上下文块的大小、新旧程度和使用频率，而这些正是保留或丢弃决策所需的关键信号。
AI.method: VISTA提出一种免训练、模型无关的中间层，将工作记忆表示为带类型的可寻址块，构建运行时仪表盘暴露每块的Token用量、时效性和访问历史，并将归档块以完整保真度存储为可恢复负载；该方法假设上下文管理能力已存在于模型中，仅需通过接口暴露状态而非学习策略。
AI.result: 在LOCA-Bench、BrowseComp-Plus和GAIA三个基准上，同一套未经训练的接口可跨百万级、十万级和万级轨迹迁移；在LOCA-Bench上，VISTA提升了四种基座模型，将Gemini-3-Flash从22.7%提升至50.7%，且提升幅度随上下文压力增大而增长并跨基座迁移；消融实验确认仪表盘的作用超越了归档与恢复工具本身。
AI.conclusion: 研究证实前语言模型内部已具备上下文管理能力，缺失的不是学习策略而是暴露状态信息的接口；VISTA作为训练无关的轻量层即可实现显著一致的性能增益，为构建更高效的长程工具智能体提供了新范式。

title: Pooled Leaderboards Hide System-Specific Winners: A Reporting-Protocol Audit of Offline Root-Cause Analysis Benchmarks
summary: Offline root-cause-analysis (RCA) benchmarks commonly rank methods by a single pooled top-1 accuracy across multiple subsystems, and engineers often read the pooled winner as a recommendation for their own subsystem. We audit that reading on three public RCA benchmark families -- OpenRCA, RCAEval, and PetShop -- covering 11 subsystems and 778 matched scoring units. To keep pairwise comparisons on identical cases, the main analysis retains four methods or comparators with complete coverage: BARO, a CD-1min adapter, max-$|Z|$, and per-service alert-count. All six pairwise comparisons show subsystem-level effects of both signs, every random-effects 95\% prediction interval crosses zero, and case-level interaction tests reject exchangeability in 5 of 6 pairs. Leave-one-system-out selection picks the lower-scoring method on up to 5 of 11 held-out subsystems, with regret reaching 24.8 pp on RCAEval / Sock-Shop. We release a 320-line audit module; given a matched RCA benchmark score table, it recomputes the same per-subsystem stability checks alongside pooled scores.

AI.tldr: 本文系统性地审计了离线根因分析基准测试中常用的单一池化Top-1准确率指标，发现该方法无法反映子系统层面的性能异质性，跨子系统的方法推荐存在显著风险，并发布了一个可复现的审计模块以辅助多重稳定性检验。
AI.motivation: 现有的离线根因分析基准测试通常仅报告跨多个子系统的单一池化Top-1准确率，工程师倾向于将池化胜者直接解读为其自身子系统的推荐方法。该研究旨在审计这一惯常解读方式的可靠性，揭示池化指标可能掩盖子系统层面的性能异质性及其带来的方法选择风险。
AI.method: 基于OpenRCA、RCAEval和PetShop三个公开基准测试家族展开分析，涵盖11个子系统和778个匹配评分单元。为确保成对比较在同一案例上进行，主分析保留四个全覆盖方法（BARO、CD-1min适配器、max-|Z|和每服务告警计数）。采用随机效应模型、95%预测区间、案例级交互检验以及留一系统外选择等方法，系统性地评估子系统层面的效应大小、方向一致性及其对方法选择的影响。
AI.result: 所有六组成对比较均显示出不同符号的子系统层面效应，每个随机效应95%预测区间均跨越零，6对中有5对的案例级交互检验拒绝可交换性假设。留一系统外选择在最多5个（共11个）留出子系统上选择了实际得分更低的方法，在RCAEval/Sock-Shop上遗憾值高达24.8个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 池化Top-1准确率在RCA基准测试中会显著掩盖子系统层面的性能差异，导致跨子系统的不可靠推荐。研究建议在报告池化得分的同时，补充每子系统的稳定性检验，并发布了一个320行的审计模块以推动该实践。

title: Evidence-Based Text-Conditioned 3D CT Synthesis for Ovarian Cancer
summary: Ovarian cancer is frequently diagnosed at an advanced stage, making preoperative contrast-enhanced computed tomography (CT) central to staging and surgical planning; yet the scarcity of annotated imaging data, compounded by privacy regulations, limits the development of generalizable computational models in this domain. Text-conditioned 3D CT synthesis has shown promise, but existing pipelines depend on paired radiology reports and have been evaluated only on chest CT. We propose OvESyn (Ovarian Evidence-based Synthesis), a framework that constructs standardized Findings and Impression sections directly from CT-derived imaging descriptors and routine clinical metadata, without any original radiology report, and uses them to condition a latent diffusion model adapted to 493 high-grade serous ovarian carcinoma patients. This is the first text-conditioned 3D CT synthesis framework adapted to an abdomino-pelvic oncologic setting. A systematic ablation over two adaptation axes, vision-language encoder alignment and generator fine-tuning, identifies generator domain adaptation as the operative mechanism for crossing the domain gap and establishing the target anatomy: without it, synthesis remains anchored to the thoracic pretraining domain, with Precision and Recall collapsing to zero and FID2.5D exceeding 140, regardless of encoder alignment. Encoder alignment instead refines intensity and fine detail. The full OvESyn attains the best distributional and intensity fidelity (FID2.5D 29.35, Precision 0.671, Wasserstein-1 0.044), while the generator-only variant maximizes coverage (Recall 0.645), reflecting a fidelity/coverage trade-off governed by encoder adaptation. Requiring only automatic segmentations and routine preoperative metadata, OvESyn supports transferability to report-scarce settings and provides a foundation for synthetic cohort generation in abdomino-pelvic oncologic imaging.

AI.tldr: OvESyn提出首个面向腹盆部肿瘤（高级别浆液性卵巢癌）的文本条件3D CT合成框架，无需原始放射报告，仅凭CT成像描述符和临床元数据即可生成真实合成数据，并系统揭示了生成器领域自适应是跨域合成的关键机制。
AI.motivation: 卵巢癌常在晚期确诊，术前增强CT对分期和手术规划至关重要，但标注成像数据稀缺且受隐私法规限制，阻碍了通用计算模型的发展；现有文本条件3D CT合成依赖配对放射报告且仅验证于胸部CT，缺乏面向腹盆部肿瘤场景的适配方法。
AI.method: OvESyn构建标准化的Findings和Impression文本，这些文本直接来自CT衍生成像描述符和常规临床元数据，无需原始放射报告，并以此作为条件输入适配于493例高级别浆液性卵巢癌患者的潜在扩散模型；框架沿两个适应轴进行消融分析：视觉-语言编码器对齐和生成器微调。
AI.result: 单独生成器领域自适应是跨越领域间隙并建立目标解剖结构的关键机制，若无此操作合成仍锚定于胸部预训练域，Precision和Recall降至零且FID2.5D超过140，而编码器对齐仅改善强度和细节；完整OvESyn取得最佳分布和强度保真度（FID2.5D 29.35, Precision 0.671, Wasserstein-1 0.044），仅生成器变体最大化覆盖度（Recall 0.645），揭示编码器适应引发的保真度/覆盖度权衡。
AI.conclusion: OvESyn仅需自动分割和常规术前元数据即可工作，支持向报告稀缺场景迁移，为腹盆部肿瘤成像中的合成队列生成奠定基础，并提供了关于跨域扩散模型适配机制的系统性见解。

title: Parametric Skills
summary: Since intelligence fundamentally relies on efficient skill acquisition (Chollet, 2019), the ability to leverage skills is critical. For LLMs, skills, manually authored or extracted from task trajectories, are textual recipes encoding mature problem-solving experience and are critical to agentic capabilities. Despite widespread deployment, their utility is limited by the model's ability to comprehend and follow skill instructions, especially under complex and long-context scenarios, where key instructions are difficult to locate and adhere to. To address this limitation, we propose ParametricSkills, a framework that can convert free-form textual skills into parameters at test time, enabling context-free skill exploitation. Specifically, we first construct a large-scale, high-quality skill library, and synthesize single-turn and multi-turn skill exploitation trajectories built around these skills with OpenCode. Using these data, we then train a hypernetwork that parameterizes both the skill content and the test-time exploitation methodology by receiving textual skills and converting them into LoRA adapters. Experimental results on six complex software engineering (SWE) subtasks demonstrate that, the proposed ParametricSkills averagely outperforms in-context learning by 6.44 points as judged by DeepSeek-V4-Flash, while also achieving significantly higher BERT Score and F1 score, confirming its effectiveness. Beyond performance, we further find that parametric skills, being inherently accumulative, offer a preliminary yet promising avenue toward test-time continual learning.

AI.tldr: 提出ParametricSkills框架，将自由形式的文本技能在测试时通过超网络参数化为LoRA适配器，从而摆脱上下文依赖，在六个软件工程子任务上平均超越上下文学习方法6.44个百分点。
AI.motivation: LLM依赖文本技能来增强智能体能力，但在复杂长上下文场景中，模型难以定位和遵循冗长的技能指令，极大限制了技能的实际效用，亟需一种无需依赖上下文即可高效利用技能的方法。
AI.method: ParametricSkills框架包含三个步骤：首先构建大规模高质量技能库，并利用OpenCode合成围绕这些技能的单轮与多轮技能利用轨迹；然后训练一个超网络，该网络以文本技能为输入，将其转换为LoRA适配器，从而在测试时将技能内容与利用方法参数化，实现无上下文依赖的技能调用。
AI.result: 在六个复杂软件工程子任务上，ParametricSkills相比上下文学习方法平均提升6.44个点（由DeepSeek-V4-Flash评判），同时BERT Score和F1分数也显著更高，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 参数化技能具有天然的累积特性，不仅提升了复杂场景下的技能利用效率，也为测试时持续学习（test-time continual learning）提供了一条有前景的初步路径。

title: Direct Causation in International Humanitarian Law and the Challenge of AI-Mediated Civilian Cyber Operations
comment: 11 pages, 1 figure, Workshop on Technical AI Governance Research ICML 2026
summary: International humanitarian law protects civilians from direct attack unless and for such time as they take direct part in hostilities, with the ICRC's 2009 Interpretive Guidance operationalising this rule through a three-criterion cumulative test. This paper argues that AI-mediated civilian cyber operations challenge the direct causation element of this test in a structurally specific way: when a civilian deploys an autonomous multi-agent cyber system of the kind recently demonstrated in offensive AI research, the "one causal step" standard fails because harm is produced by system-generated decisions made after human disengagement, and the integral-part requirement does not extend because it presupposes downstream human contributors whose conduct can be independently classified. The framework therefore defaults to treating such deployments as indirect participation, in tension with its purpose of capturing civilians who personally take part in hostilities. Beyond the doctrinal analysis, this paper identifies goal-specification granularity as the property on which the integral-part test's concreteness component implicitly turns, classifies AI-mediated operations along a five-level spectrum, and argues that existing technical AI governance instruments do not log or report this property.

AI.tldr: 本文论证了平民使用AI驱动自主多智能体网络系统进行网络作战时，因人类在系统运行后中断直接参与，导致国际人道法中"直接参与敌对行动"的因果关系标准无法适用，揭示了现有法律框架与新兴自主网络作战能力之间的结构性错位。
AI.motivation: 现有国际人道法框架中"直接参与敌对行动"的因果关系标准（"一个因果步骤"与"组成部分"测试）在评估平民部署AI自主多智能体系统进行网络作战时面临结构性困难，因为该类系统在人类脱离后可自主生成并执行作战决策，导致传统法律归因机制失效，且现有技术治理工具无法记录目标规范粒度这一关键属性。
AI.method: 本文采用法律教义分析方法，围绕ICRC 2009年《解释性指南》中直接参与敌对行动的三项累积标准（危害阈值、直接因果关系、交战关联性）展开分析，重点解构因果关系中的"一个因果步骤"标准与"组成部分"测试，提出目标规范粒度是"组成部分"测试中具体性要求的隐含关键属性，并构建了一个五级AI网络作战分类谱系，最后评估现有AI治理工具对该属性的记录能力。
AI.result: 分析表明：当平民部署自主多智能体系统时，"一个因果步骤"标准因损害由人类脱离后的系统自主决策产生而无法满足；"组成部分"测试因预设下游人类执行者而无法适用，导致此类行为被默认归类为间接参与。本文识别出目标规范粒度是决定"组成部分"测试具体性要求的核心属性，并发现现有AI治理工具（如模型卡、系统卡、红队报告）均未记录或报告该属性。
AI.conclusion: 自主多智能体网络作战系统暴露出国际人道法因果关系标准的深层结构性问题，现有框架无法合理捕获"个人亲自参与敌对行动"的平民行为。未来法律与技术治理需重点关注目标规范粒度的可记录性与可审计性，以便在AI助战平民行为日益普遍的背景下维护国际人道法的保护意图。

title: Learning from Acquisition: Metadata-driven Multimodal Pre-training for Cardiac MRI
summary: Cardiac magnetic resonance imaging (CMR) routinely records structured acquisition metadata, yet most CMR foundation models rely primarily on image-only pre-training and leave this naturally available source of weak semantic supervision largely underexplored. We propose MetaCLIP-CMR, a metadata-driven framework based on Contrastive Language--Image Pre-training (CLIP), which converts imaging modality, anatomical view, scanner vendor, field strength, and scanner model into textual supervision for CMR representation learning. The pretrained image encoder is evaluated on imaging modality classification, cine view classification, and cardiac segmentation. MetaCLIP-CMR achieves 86.8% modality accuracy and 86.5% cine view accuracy, clearly outperforming ImageNet and masked reconstruction initialisations. For downstream cardiac segmentation, MetaCLIP-CMR consistently obtains the highest Dice score across the evaluated ACDC and M&Ms cine short-axis (SAX) settings under both full-data and 20% fine-tuning regimes. Compared with recent image-focused large-scale CMR pre-training models, MetaCLIP-CMR achieves comparable ACDC segmentation performance, while requiring less than 1% of their pre-training image scale. These results suggest that metadata learning offers a natural and easy-to-use strategy for transforming routinely recorded acquisition information into effective supervision for foundation-level CMR representation learning, highlighting the promise of metadata-driven multimodal pre-training.

AI.tldr: MetaCLIP-CMR 提出一种基于元数据驱动的对比语言-图像预训练框架，通过将 CMR 采集元数据转化为文本监督信号进行表征学习，在多项任务上超越纯图像预训练方法，且仅需不到 1% 的预训练图像量即可达到与大规模 CMR 基础模型相当的分割性能。
AI.motivation: 现有 CMR 基础模型大多仅依赖图像本身进行预训练，忽视了成像模态、解剖视图、扫描仪厂商、场强和扫描仪型号等结构化采集元数据这一天然可用的弱语义监督信息，导致元数据所蕴含的丰富语义信息未被充分利用。
AI.method: 提出 MetaCLIP-CMR 框架，基于 CLIP 架构，将 CMR 采集元数据（成像模态、解剖视图、扫描仪厂商、场强、扫描仪型号）转换为文本监督信号，通过对比学习对图像编码器和文本编码器进行联合预训练，从而引导 CMR 图像的表征学习。
AI.result: 在成像模态分类上达到 86.8% 准确率，在电影视图分类上达到 86.5% 准确率，显著优于 ImageNet 初始化和掩码重建初始化；在 ACDC 和 M&Ms 数据集上的心脏分割任务中，无论是全数据微调还是 20% 数据微调，均取得最高 Dice 分数；与大规模 CMR 预训练模型相比，分割性能相当但预训练图像量不足其 1%。
AI.conclusion: 元数据学习可将 CMR 常规记录的采集信息自然转化为有效的监督信号，为基础级别的 CMR 表征学习提供了一种简单易行的策略，展示了元数据驱动的多模态预训练在医学影像领域的巨大潜力。

title: Little Brains, Big Feats: Exploring Compact Language Models
comment: Accepted to ECML PKDD 2026, Applied Data Science track. Author preprint; the definitive version will appear in the proceedings of ECML PKDD 2026, Springer LNCS
summary: While large language models have been dominating the research landscape recently, small language models remain highly relevant across various domains; yet, they receive far less attention. In this study, we investigate how smaller language models perform during the generation stage within a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system. To benchmark these models effectively, we utilised both open-source and proprietary datasets covering diverse subject areas and question types. Our findings demonstrate that a RAG system with small language models can be executed directly on-device without requiring any GPU hardware within a reasonable time. The experimental code and links to the supplementary materials can be accessed through the GitHub repository: https://github.com/SibNN/SLM-RAG-EVAL.

AI.tldr: 本文系统性地评估了小型语言模型在检索增强生成（RAG）系统中的生成阶段性能，证明了小型模型无需GPU即可在设备端以合理时间完成RAG推理，为资源受限场景下的RAG部署提供了可行方案。
AI.motivation: 尽管大语言模型在研究中占据主导地位，小型语言模型在多个领域中仍然具有重要应用价值，但受到的关注远低于大模型。本文旨在填补小型语言模型在检索增强生成（RAG）系统中的生成性能评估空白，探究其在无GPU硬件条件下设备端部署的可行性。
AI.method: 研究采用检索增强生成（RAG）框架，将小型语言模型作为生成阶段的核心组件，并在多个开源和专有数据集上对不同学科领域和问题类型进行系统化基准测试。实验代码及补充材料已开源在GitHub仓库中。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，搭载小型语言模型的RAG系统可以直接在设备端执行，无需任何GPU硬件支持，且能够在合理的时间内完成生成任务。
AI.conclusion: 本研究证实了小型语言模型在RAG系统中具备无GPU设备端部署的实用性，为资源受限环境下的知识密集型任务提供了高效的轻量级解决方案，拓展了RAG系统的应用边界。

title: Selective Memory Retention for Long-Horizon LLM Agents
comment: Accepted at the International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML) 2026
summary: When does retention matter for memory-augmented LLM agents? We study this with TraceRetain, a lightweight framework for bounded external memory in frozen LLM agents that scores entries by interpretable features (success, age, access frequency, redundancy, specificity, similarity, downstream utility) and evicts the lowest-scoring ones at capacity. On clean ALFWorld with gpt-5-mini, external memory robustly improves over no memory across two seeds, but differences among bounded retention policies fall within Wilson 95% CIs: clean ALFWorld at T=100 to T=200 does not naturally exhibit the memory pollution retention is designed to address. Under a controlled noisy-write stress (75% synthetic distractors), unbounded memory and FIFO-K50 degrade on Precision@5 (20.2% to 12.4% and 15.8% to 3.8%) while TraceRetain-CEM is essentially unchanged (16.9% to 16.6%) and preserves 97/100 task success. The mechanism: unbounded memory has the highest mean similarity (0.87) but lowest precision, indicating failed distractors close to the query in embedding space. Held-out in-distribution evaluation shows memory-augmented policies solving 47 to 49 of 50 tasks vs. 39/50 for no memory. Bounded retention buys memory and step efficiency on saturated clean benchmarks at no task-success cost, and only differentiates from cache heuristics when streams contain noise.

AI.tldr: TraceRetain提出了一个轻量级的有界外部记忆框架，通过可解释特征评分与逐出机制为冻结LLM智能体提供检索增强，实验表明在干净场景下记忆带来的提升有限，但在受控噪声写入压力下，有界保留策略（TraceRetain-CEM）能显著抵御记忆污染，维持精确度和任务成功率，而无界记忆和FIFO策略则严重退化。
AI.motivation: 记忆增强型LLM智能体中，何时真正需要记忆保留机制尚不明确；现有方法在干净环境中可能高估记忆的作用，且缺乏对记忆污染（distractor噪声写入）场景的系统性研究。
AI.method: 提出TraceRetain框架，为冻结LLM智能体提供有界外部记忆，通过成功度、时效性、访问频率、冗余度、特异性、相似度、下游效用等可解释特征对记忆条目进行评分，在达到容量上限时逐出得分最低的条目；并在ALFWorld环境下引入受控噪声写入压力（75%合成干扰项）来模拟记忆污染场景。
AI.result: 在干净ALFWorld上，外部记忆相较于无记忆有稳健提升，但不同有界保留策略间的差异落在Wilson 95%置信区间内；在75%噪声写入压力下，无界记忆Precision@5从20.2%降至12.4%，FIFO-K50从15.8%降至3.8%，而TraceRetain-CEM基本不变（16.9%→16.6%）并保持97/100任务成功率；分布内评估中记忆增强策略解决47-49/50任务，无记忆仅39/50。
AI.conclusion: 有界记忆保留在干净饱和基准上仅带来存储和步骤效率收益而不损失任务成功率，但只有当输入流包含噪声时，其与简单缓存启发式（如FIFO）的差异才显现出来；无界记忆因嵌入空间中失败干扰项与查询高度相似（均值0.87）反而导致低精确度，验证了选择性记忆保留对抗记忆污染的必要性。

title: SciFlow: Semantic Cross Interference for Self-Supervised Optical Flow Domain Generalization
summary:
Motions of objects and scenes carry essential intelligence in video understanding, offering rich cues for interpreting dynamic settings and interactions. Due to the cost and scarcity of high-quality annotation or ground truth of pixel-wise optical flow, however, motion estimation models are typically trained in synthetic domains while deployed in real-world domains. Addressing synthetic-to-real domain generalization challenges has been crucial for developing practical solutions in diverse open-world use cases.
  This paper introduces SciFlow, a simple yet effective, network-agnostic, training-based approach that leverages self-supervised learning to generalize motion estimation across synthetic and open-world domains. Specifically, SciFlow imposes semantic interference from open-world images onto synthetic images during training, blending indomain features with cross-domain interference, which enables the network to adapt to the real-world domains. Additionally, SciFlow utilizes geometric consistency to ensure validity of the self-supervision. Our experiment results show that SciFlow not only significantly enhances model robustness amidst domain variations, but also remarkably enables synthetic-to-real domain generalization without requiring any ground truth in the open world.

AI.tldr: SciFlow是一种简单有效的、与网络架构无关的、基于自监督学习的训练方法，通过在训练中向合成图像注入来自开放世界图像的语义干扰，并利用几何一致性确保自监督的有效性，实现了运动估计模型从合成域到真实开放世界域的有效泛化，无需任何真实标注。
AI.motivation: 运动估计模型通常依赖合成域数据进行训练以规避真实光流标注成本高、稀缺的问题，但合成域与真实域之间存在显著的领域差异，导致模型在开放世界场景中泛化能力不足。现有方法难以在不依赖真实标注的前提下有效弥合这一域鸿沟，因此亟需一种能在无监督条件下实现合成域到真实域泛化的实用方案。
AI.method: SciFlow提出一种与网络架构无关的训练方法，核心思想是在训练过程中将开放世界图像的语义干扰注入到合成图像中，使合成域特征与跨域干扰信息相融合，从而促使网络适应真实域分布。同时，该方法引入几何一致性约束，确保自监督信号的有效性与可靠性，避免因干扰引入导致自监督失效。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，SciFlow不仅显著提升了运动估计模型在领域变化下的鲁棒性，还成功实现了无需任何开放世界真实标注的合成域到真实域泛化能力，证明了语义干扰注入与几何一致性约束在域泛化中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: SciFlow展示了通过自监督方式融合跨域信息并结合几何先验来应对合成到真实域泛化问题的可行路径，为开发面向开放世界的实用运动估计解决方案提供了简单而有效的技术路线，并表明网络无关的通用训练策略在域泛化中具有广泛潜力。

title: DAIN: Dynamic Agent-Based Interaction Network for Efficient and Collaborative Multimodal Reasoning
summary: Current multimodal fusion approaches, particularly those based on static Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures, often struggle to provide the adaptive and efficient collaborative reasoning required by complex real-world applications. We introduce the Dynamic Agent-based Interaction Network (DAIN), which reconceptualizes multimodal fusion as a dynamic, multi-agent collaborative process. DAIN employs a context-aware Meta-Controller that dynamically schedules sparse activation of specialized interaction agents and orchestrates compressed inter-agent communication for consensus-building. The framework is guided by a multi-objective loss function that jointly optimizes task accuracy, agent specialization, and operational efficiency through sparse activation and communication regularization. Comprehensive evaluations across five diverse benchmarks -- ADNI, MIMIC-IV, MM-IMDB, CMU-MOSI, and ENRICO -- establish DAIN as a new state-of-the-art, delivering significant performance improvements including a 2.6\% accuracy gain on ADNI. Ablation studies verify the critical roles of both dynamic scheduling and agent communication. Furthermore, DAIN offers enhanced interpretability by exposing context-dependent agent roles and collaboration patterns while maintaining computational efficiency through sample-wise sparse agent activation. Our work demonstrates the promise of dynamic, agent-based paradigms for multimodal reasoning.

AI.tldr: DAIN将多模态融合重新定义为动态多智能体协作过程，通过上下文感知的元控制器实现稀疏智能体激活与压缩通信，在五个基准上取得SOTA性能，并兼顾可解释性与计算效率。
AI.motivation: 现有基于静态混合专家（MoE）架构的多模态融合方法难以满足复杂真实应用所需的适应性和高效协作推理能力，亟需一种能够动态调度和协同多个专家模块的新范式。
AI.method: DAIN框架包含一个上下文感知的元控制器（Meta-Controller），用于动态调度稀疏激活的专用交互智能体（interaction agents），并编排压缩的智能体间通信以达成共识；通过多目标损失函数联合优化任务精度、智能体专业化和操作效率（稀疏激活与通信正则化）。
AI.result: 在ADNI、MIMIC-IV、MM-IMDB、CMU-MOSI和ENRICO五个多样化基准上的全面评估表明DAIN取得了新的SOTA结果，其中在ADNI上准确率提升2.6%；消融实验验证了动态调度和智能体通信的关键作用。
AI.conclusion: DAIN揭示了动态、基于智能体的范式在多模态推理中的巨大潜力，通过暴露上下文相关的智能体角色和协作模式提升了可解释性，同时依靠样本级稀疏激活保持了计算效率。

title: AI Trading's Alpha Singularity: Emergent Market Reasoning through Agent-to-Agent Self-Evolution
summary: Automated alpha mining holds the scoring function fixed and varies the search algorithm over it. A search that converges against a fixed scorer overfits whatever the scorer cannot penalize, a primary cause of the out-of-sample generalization gap. We treat the scoring function as a search artifact alongside the alpha factors and study what conditions make this joint search admissible. Sealed Joint Search (SJS) is a framework: a set of structural conditions on information flow in an autonomous-discovery system that prevent joint search from collapsing into self-confirmation while keeping the evaluator sealed. Conditions cover role decomposition, typed inter-role communication, provenance-sealed reads, versioned stores, and substrate-local promotion. Agora tests SJS empirically: five LLM agent classes communicate via three channels, evolving eight skill libraries, with alpha libraries built on AlphaGen operators. Three evaluators write reports aggregated into one brief, carrying forward disagreement instead of voting. We run Agora for 100 rounds on CSI 1000 and evaluate on a 91-day 2026 holdout sealed from all LLM inputs. Agora achieves holdout Sharpe +1.87; best baseline +1.334 at favorable seed and -0.755 cross-seed mean. Pre-loading Agora's two metrics into a frozen-library ablation recovers only +0.40 of the +2.25 Sharpe gap, and adding PPO without library evolution worsens the gap. The two metrics emerge rather than being designed. Caveats: single-seed run, short-side concentrated signal, intended for long-short.

AI.tldr: 本文提出密封联合搜索（SJS）框架，通过结构化信息流条件防止评分函数与alpha因子的联合搜索陷入自我确认，并在Agora系统中验证：多智能体LLM系统在CSI 1000上实现Holdout Sharpe +1.87，显著超越基线。
AI.motivation: 自动化alpha挖掘中，固定评分函数而仅变化搜索算法会导致搜索对评分函数无法惩罚的因素过拟合，从而产生样本外泛化差距；现有方法将评分函数与搜索分离，未能解决联合搜索中评分函数本身成为可操纵对象的问题，亟需一种能防止联合搜索退化为自我确认的框架。
AI.method: 密封联合搜索（SJS）是一套自治发现系统中的信息流结构条件，包括角色分解、类型化角色间通信、来源密封读取、版本化存储和底物局部提升，以保持评估器密封并防止联合搜索崩溃；Agora系统基于SJS实现，包含五类LLM智能体通过三个通道通信，演化八个技能库，alpha库基于AlphaGen算子构建，三个评估器撰写报告聚合为一个简报，保留分歧而非投票。
AI.result: 在CSI 1000上运行100轮，使用与所有LLM输入隔离的91天2026年Holdout评估，Agora实现Holdout Sharpe +1.87，最佳基线在有利种子下为+1.334，跨种子均值为-0.755；将Agora的两项指标预加载到冻结库消融中仅恢复+2.25 Sharpe差距中的+0.40，添加PPO但不进行库演化则使差距恶化；两个指标是涌现而非预先设计。
AI.conclusion: SJS框架通过严格的信息流控制有效解决了联合搜索中的自我确认问题，使得评分函数与alpha因子可以相互演化而不陷入过拟合；Agora系统的实证结果表明，这种涌现式指标和去中心化评估机制能显著提升样本外泛化能力，但信号集中于短期且仅适用于多空策略，存在单一种子运行的局限性。

title: Efficient Spatio-Temporal Grounding with Multimodal Large Models via Second-Level Tracking and RL Verification
summary: Spatio-temporal grounding in long videos requires precise temporal localization and robust object tracking conditioned on natural-language queries. While recent vision-language models (VLMs) show strong reasoning ability, directly applying frame-by-frame inference to long sequences is computationally expensive and unstable. We propose a practical pipeline that shifts from frame-level to second-level tracking and performs cross-second smoothing to preserve continuity while reducing sequence length. To improve reasoning supervision, we synthesize chain-of-thought style trajectories using advanced multimodal models for temporal localization and target selection, and replace generated spatio-temporal coordinates with ground-truth annotations to avoid noisy supervision. We further optimize the policy with reinforcement learning using a verifier based on $t\_\mathrm{IoU}+mv\_\mathrm{IoU}$. Experiments across multiple FPS settings show that our method achieves a strong trade-off between efficiency and localization quality.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种面向长视频时空定位的实用流水线，通过从帧级到秒级跟踪的转换、跨秒平滑处理以及基于强化学习和链式思维轨迹合成的优化策略，在推理效率与定位质量之间实现了强平衡。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型在长视频时空定位中面临两个核心挑战：直接对长序列进行逐帧推理计算成本高且不稳定，同时缺乏有效的推理监督信号来指导时序定位与目标选择。
AI.method: 提出将帧级跟踪转换为秒级跟踪，并引入跨秒平滑操作以在保持连续性的同时缩短序列长度；利用先进多模态模型合成链式思维风格的轨迹用于时序定位与目标选择，并用真实标注替换生成的时空坐标以避免噪声监督；采用基于t_IoU+mv_IoU验证器的强化学习策略进行优化。
AI.result: 在多种FPS设置下的实验表明，该方法在推理效率与定位质量之间取得了强平衡，验证了秒级跟踪、跨秒平滑及强化学习优化策略的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明通过合理的序列压缩（秒级跟踪+跨秒平滑）与强化学习策略优化，可以在不显著牺牲精度的前提下大幅降低长视频时空定位的计算开销，为实际部署提供了实用方案。

title: Multi-Agentic System Leveraging Open-Source LLMs to Mitigate Disinformation Threats
summary: In contemporary societies, the threat of disinformation has reached alarming levels, exacerbated by the proliferation of electronic communication, social media, and advancements in artificial intelligence. As a result, there is an urgent need to develop effective countermeasures to mitigate this menace. However, the sheer scale of the problem renders manual fact-checking and human-based verification inadequate, underscoring the necessity for automated methods to detect and debunk disinformation. This article proposes a novel approach based on a multi-agent system that emulates the decision-making processes of human annotators engaged in disinformation detection tasks. By incorporating a consensus mechanism, diversity in cognition and diversity in knowledge, and also hierarchical structure, inspired by human annotators' behavior, the proposed method achieves superior results compared to individual Large Language Models (LLMs), including GPT 4 and GPT 3.5. The system leverages open models (e.g., LLaMA, Kimi, Qwen, Deepseek and LLaMA-Nemotron) to ensure greater transparency. The evaluation of the proposed method encompasses datasets in languages with varying resource availability, including English (high-resource), Polish (medium-resource), Slovak (low-resource) and Bulgarian (low-resource). Experiments were conducted on tasks such as direct disinformation detection, identification of texts worthy of verification, and detection of texts containing verifiable factual claims.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多智能体系统的自动化虚假信息检测方法，通过模拟人类标注者的决策过程，结合共识机制、认知多样性、知识多样性和层级结构，在多种语言（英语、波兰语、斯洛伐克语、保加利亚语）数据集上取得了优于GPT-4和GPT-3.5等单个大语言模型的检测效果。
AI.motivation: 当代社会中虚假信息的威胁因电子通信、社交媒体和人工智能的发展而日益严重，人工事实核查和人工验证在规模上已无法有效应对，亟需开发自动化方法来检测和揭穿虚假信息。
AI.method: 提出一种基于多智能体系统的方法，模拟人类标注者在虚假信息检测中的决策过程，系统集成了共识机制、认知多样性、知识多样性以及层级结构，并采用LLaMA、Kimi、Qwen、Deepseek和LLaMA-Nemotron等开源模型以保证更高的透明性。
AI.result: 在英语（高资源）、波兰语（中资源）、斯洛伐克语（低资源）和保加利亚语（低资源）数据集上，针对直接虚假信息检测、需要验证文本的识别以及包含可验证事实主张文本的检测三项任务进行实验，所提方法在性能上优于GPT-4和GPT-3.5等单个大语言模型。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，通过模拟人类标注者的群体决策机制（共识、多样性与层级结构），多智能体系统可显著提升虚假信息检测性能，且使用开源模型有助于提高系统的透明性和可解释性，为自动化虚假信息检测提供了有效的新路径。

title: PolicyGuard: A Dialogue-Grounded Sub-Agent Verifier for Policy Adherence in LLM Agents
summary: LLM agents handle user requests on behalf of organizations through tool calls and must follow the company policies stated in their system prompts. Prior work approaches this as a safeguarding problem -- external checks that block non-compliant agent actions. We argue that policy adherence is a broader problem: real workflows unfold across many turns, require explicit user confirmation and prerequisite reads, and hinge on the content of the dialogue rather than on any single argument value. Meeting this bar requires (i) full conversation context, (ii) self-reasoning over the policy and the current dialogue, and (iii) conversation-specific remediation that guides the agent's next turn -- three capabilities that prior safeguard work has often underestimated. We introduce POLICYGUARD, a sub-agent verifier that shares the agent's view of the dialogue, reasons over the policy in context, and provides actionable feedback for the agent's next turn. On tau^2-BENCH airline across three vendors (GPT-5.4, Claude Sonnet 4.6, Gemini 2.5 Pro) with four trials per setting, POLICYGUARD improves PASS4 by +12.0 / +6.0 / +12.0 pp. Per-call analyses show POLICYGUARD achieves higher policy-violation recall while blocking roughly half as often as argument-level guards.

AI.tldr: POLICYGUARD是一个子智能体验证器，通过共享对话上下文、基于策略进行自推理并提供可操作的下一轮反馈，显著提升了LLM智能体在多轮对话中的策略遵从性，在tau^2-BENCH上使PASS4提升6-12个百分点，同时实现更高的违规召回率和更低的阻断率。
AI.motivation: 现有工作将LLM智能体策略遵从视为外部安全检查问题，但实际工作流涉及多轮对话、需用户确认和前置阅读，且依赖对话内容而非单一参数值；先前的安全防护方法低估了完整对话上下文、策略自推理和对话级修复这三项关键能力，导致无法满足真实场景的策略遵从需求。
AI.method: POLICYGUARD采用子智能体验证器架构，与主智能体共享对话视图，在上下文中对策略进行推理，并为智能体的下一轮交互提供可操作的反馈，从而实现对策略遵从的全对话级验证与引导。
AI.result: 在tau^2-BENCH航空领域基准上，针对GPT-5.4、Claude Sonnet 4.6和Gemini 2.5 Pro三个供应商各进行四轮试验，POLICYGUARD使PASS4指标分别提升12.0、6.0和12.0个百分点；按调用分析显示，相较于参数级防护，POLICYGUARD实现了更高的策略违规召回率，同时阻断率降低约一半。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了LLM智能体策略遵从问题的本质是对话级推理而非单次调用检查，POLICYGUARD通过共享上下文、策略推理和对话级修复的三合一方案，在提升安全性的同时大幅减少了不必要的阻断，为构建更实用、更高效的企业级LLM智能体安全机制提供了新方向。

title: HorizonRelight: Relighting Long-horizon Videos Consistently via Diffusion Transformers
summary: Diffusion-based video relighting enables controllable relighting from a single input video, but modern video diffusion backbones are trained on short clips and applied to long-horizon videos through chunked sliding-window inference, often causing temporal discontinuities at chunk boundaries. We address this by reframing long-horizon relighting as \emph{temporally conditioned latent domain translation}. Our framework enforces cross-chunk continuity by propagating target-domain latents across boundaries and makes this behavior learnable using \emph{masked target-domain self-conditioning}, training the model to continue from temporally masked propagated context. We further introduce \emph{warm-start prompting} with a relit prompt anchor from a controllable generative model, which establishes the initial target-domain state and creates a general interface for prompt-based relighting. Experiments on in-the-wild long-horizon videos show markedly improved temporal consistency, with chunk-boundary artifacts largely reduced and unwanted appearance changes across chunks greatly suppressed.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于扩散模型的长期视频重光照框架，通过掩码目标域自条件化与热启动提示机制将长时序重光照重构为时序条件化的隐空间域翻译问题，有效消除滑窗推理导致的块间伪影与外观不连续。
AI.motivation: 现有基于扩散模型的视频重光照方法依赖短片段训练的视频扩散主干网络，在对长视频进行重光照时采用分块滑窗推理，导致块边界处出现严重的时间不连续和伪影。
AI.method: 本文将长视频重光照重新形式化为时序条件化的隐空间域翻译问题，通过跨块传播目标域隐变量强制保证连续性；提出掩码目标域自条件化机制，使模型能从被时序掩码的传播上下文中继续生成；引入热启动提示方法，利用可控生成模型生成的重光照提示锚点建立初始目标域状态，为基于提示的重光照提供统一接口。
AI.result: 在真实世界长视频上的实验表明，该方法显著提升了时序一致性，块边界伪影大幅减少，跨块间不希望出现的外观变化得到极大抑制。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明了将长时序重光照建模为隐空间域翻译问题并结合传播与掩码自条件化训练的有效性，为基于扩散模型的长期视频编辑提供了一种消除分块推理伪影的通用范式。

title: Poller: Are LLMs Suitable for Evaluating the Poetry Understanding Task?
summary: Traditional automatic evaluation methods have been shown to be unsuitable for modern Chinese poetry because of the distinct nature of this literary genre. Human evaluation remains reliable, but is expensive and not applicable to large-scale data. In this paper, we propose Poller (Poetry LLM Evaluator), a novel method leveraging large language models (LLMs) to evaluate the poetry understanding task. Specifically, our method requires LLMs to play the role of a poem's author with detailed information, thereby emulating human evaluation and judgment by adopting the poet's perspective. We conducted comprehensive experiments on multiple LLMs, evaluating the interpretations of poems across eight specialized dimensions. Experimental results demonstrate that our method effectively reduces the evaluation error between LLMs and humans. Especially for specific dimension evaluation, Poller-based LLMs achieve a 94.55% and 89.53% error reduction for rhetorical techniques and defamiliarization, respectively, compared to baseline methods. These performances are unattainable by conventional LLM evaluation methods. Experimental results from multiple LLMs across various dimensions validate the efficacy of our method. This work bridges the gap between automated efficiency and human expertise, establishing a foundation for automated evaluation in poetry-related tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Poller（Poetry LLM Evaluator）方法，通过让大语言模型扮演诗歌作者角色来模拟人类评价，在多个维度的诗歌理解评估中显著降低了LLM与人类之间的评价误差，尤其在修辞技巧和去熟悉化维度上分别实现94.55%和89.53%的误差降低。
AI.motivation: 传统自动评估方法因现代诗歌体裁的独特性而难以适用，人类评估虽可靠但成本高昂且无法大规模应用，因此需要一种兼顾自动化效率与人类专业性的诗歌理解评估方法。
AI.method: 提出Poller方法，要求大语言模型扮演具有详细信息的诗歌作者角色，通过采纳诗人视角来模拟人类评价与判断；在多个LLM上开展实验，从八个专门维度对诗歌解读进行评估。
AI.result: 实验表明Poller方法有效降低了LLM与人类之间的评价误差，在修辞技巧和去熟悉化维度上相比基线方法分别实现了94.55%和89.53%的误差降低，且多个LLM在多个维度上的实验结果均验证了该方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: Poller方法弥合了自动化效率与人类专业性之间的差距，为诗歌相关任务的自动评估奠定了基础，并证明特定维度的评估效果超越了传统LLM评估方法的可达范围。

title: Process Advantage Signal Shaping: A Paradigm-Agnostic Middleware for Process-Supervised RL in LLM Reasoners
summary: Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) is a default recipe for process-supervised reinforcement learning of LLM reasoners, and dense process supervision -- via learned process reward models (PRMs) or on-policy-distillation KL signals -- is a common way to densify its otherwise weak outcome reward. Layering such a step-level signal on top of GRPO's group-standardized advantage, however, exposes three structural pathologies: \emph{channel contamination} between the pooled process, outcome, and format streams at group standardization; \emph{resolution mismatch} between the granularity of the process signal and the granularity of the logical decisions being credited; and a \emph{cumulative trap} by which GRPO's return-to-go sum surfaces either length inflation or truncated exploration depending on the sign regime of the signal. We propose \textbf{PASS} (\emph{Process Advantage Signal Shaping}), a compact middleware that sits between any scalar step-level process signal and GRPO's clipped surrogate and addresses the three pathologies in turn: \emph{Advantage Fusion} standardizes the three streams independently within each group, \emph{Chunk-by-Value} derives value-homogeneous chunks from the signal itself and broadcasts credit within each chunk, and \emph{Divide-Length} converts the cumulative objective into an average-value-density score. We validate PASS across two domains and two process-signal paradigms -- a learned PRM on mathematical reasoning and an on-policy-distillation KL signal (with a generalized variant) on multi-hop question answering -- and under two group-standardization operators. In every regime PASS delivers a consistent pass@1 gain over the corresponding GRPO baseline.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PASS（Process Advantage Signal Shaping），一个轻量级中间件，通过三项修正（Advantage Fusion、Chunk-by-Value、Divide-Length）解决了GRPO在过程监督强化学习中因组标准化而引入的三种结构病态（通道污染、分辨率失配、累积陷阱），在数学推理和多跳问答任务上均一致地超越了GRPO基线。
AI.motivation: GRPO虽被广泛用于LLM推理器的过程监督强化学习，但将密集过程奖励信号叠加到GRPO的组标准化优势上时，会暴露出三种结构性病态：通道污染（过程、结果、格式三流在组标准化时被混合）、分辨率失配（过程信号粒度与逻辑决策粒度不一致）以及累积陷阱（按回报求和导致长度膨胀或截断探索）。现有方法未能系统解决这些结构性问题。
AI.method: PASS作为插入在标量步骤级过程信号与GRPO裁剪代理之间的轻量中间件，提出三项修正：Advantage Fusion将过程、结果、格式三流在组内独立标准化；Chunk-by-Value根据信号自身推导值同质块并在块内广播信用；Divide-Length将累积目标转换为平均价值密度分数。
AI.result: 在数学推理（使用学习得到的PRM）和多跳问答（使用基于策略蒸馏的KL信号及其广义变体）两个领域、两种过程信号范式以及两种组标准化算子下，PASS在每种设置下均一致地获得了相较于对应GRPO基线的pass@1增益。
AI.conclusion: PASS通过系统性地消除GRPO中过程监督的三项结构性病态，提供了即插即用的性能提升，且不改变底层信号生成方式，为强化学习训练LLM推理器提供了更稳健的过程信号整形框架。

title: GPC: Large-Scale Generative Pretraining for Transferable Motor Control
summary: Developing controllers capable of completing a wide range of tasks in a natural and life-like manner is a key challenge in enabling practical applications of physics-based character animation. In this work, we introduce Generative Pretrained Controllers (GPC), which leverage tokenization and next-token modeling to create general-purpose, reusable generative controllers from large-scale motion datasets. Our framework utilizes end-to-end reinforcement learning to jointly optimize a "motion vocabulary", modeled via Finite Scalar Quantization (FSQ), along with a corresponding control policy that can map the discrete codes to physics-based controls. After the "codebook" has been learned, the underlying structure of this large vocabulary is modeled by training a GPT-style autoregressive transformer, leading to a powerful generative controller that generates controls for a physically simulated character by performing next-token prediction. Once the generative controller has been trained, we propose a suite of adaptation techniques for finetuning the controller for new downstream tasks. Our proposed framework greatly simplifies the training process compared to previous tokenized methods, and achieves a 99.98% success rate in reproducing a vast corpus of motion clips. The generative controller exhibits a variety of natural emergent behaviors, such as responsive behaviors to perturbations and recovery behaviors after falling. This results in highly robust general purpose controllers for a variety of downstream applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出生成式预训练控制器（GPC），通过令牌化与下一令牌建模从大规模运动数据中学习通用运动控制器，结合端到端强化学习和有限标量量化（FSQ）构建运动词汇表及控制策略，再以GPT式自回归Transformer进行生成式控制，最终在物理角色动画中实现高成功率的动作复现与鲁棒的下游任务适配。
AI.motivation: 开发能够以自然逼真的方式完成广泛任务的控制器是物理角色动画实际应用中的关键挑战，现有方法在通用性、复用性和训练效率方面存在不足，亟需一种可大规模学习且具备泛化能力的生成式控制框架。
AI.method: 首先通过端到端强化学习联合优化基于有限标量量化（FSQ）的离散运动词汇表（即“码本”）和将离散码映射为物理控制信号的控制策略；在码本学习完成后，利用GPT风格的自回归Transformer对词汇表的结构进行建模，通过执行下一令牌预测来生成物理角色的控制信号，形成生成式控制器；最后提出一套适配技术用于将预训练控制器微调至新的下游任务。
AI.result: 该方法在复现大规模运动片段集上达到了99.98%的成功率，显著简化了先前基于令牌化方法的训练流程，且生成式控制器展现出多种自然涌现行为，包括对外部扰动的响应行为和跌倒后的恢复行为，具备高度鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 本研究表明，结合FSQ离散化与自回归下一令牌预测的生成式预训练范式能够高效地从大规模运动数据中学习通用物理角色控制器，所得控制器不仅复现精度极高，还具备自然的鲁棒行为，为多种下游应用提供了强大且可复用的基础控制能力。

title: Hierarchical Experimentalist Agents
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used to take actions in the real world and support human decision-making, yet most agents rely on parametric knowledge, fixed post-training data, retrieval, or search. This paradigm breaks down in novel domains and for sophisticated queries that cannot be answered from prior knowledge alone. Knowing the laws of physics, for instance, does not by itself enable LLMs to answer queries or complete long-horizon tasks in a complex physical system. To address this, we introduce Hierarchical Experimentalist Agents (HExA), an in-context self-improvement framework to learn from active experimentation. HExA iteratively designs and refines query-relevant experiments, learns a reusable library of composable skills from experience, and integrates experimental evidence to answer queries or take actions. HExA is training-free, compatible with any black-box model, and does not require external supervision, oracles, or offline data. To evaluate active experimentation, we introduce Interphyre, a tool-calling benchmark built on the PHYRE 2D procedural physics environment, where agents propose interventions and test hypotheses through simulation APIs. Experiments show that current LLM agents struggle in these settings, especially on the hardest levels of Interphyre. Claude Sonnet 4.6 achieves only 2% success, while HExA improves the same model to up to 77% success. HExA also improves open-weight models and outperforms agentic baselines such as ReAct and Reflexion. Moreover, using only skills learned from easier levels and transferred without active experimentation, HExA achieves 44% success, demonstrating the reusability and generalization of its learned skills. Overall, HExA shows that learning through active experimentation can help agents discover useful knowledge, acquire reusable skills, and make efficient progress on novel long-horizon tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出分层实验智能体（HExA），一种无需训练、无需外部监督的上下文自改进框架，通过主动实验设计、可复用技能库构建和实验证据整合，使LLM能够从零开始在复杂物理系统中进行推理与长程任务执行，在Interphyre基准上将Claude Sonnet 4.6的成功率从2%提升至77%。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM智能体严重依赖参数化知识、固定后训练数据、检索或搜索，在无法仅凭先验知识解决的新领域和复杂查询中表现崩溃；例如，掌握物理定律本身并不足以让LLM回答关于复杂物理系统的查询或完成长程任务，亟需一种能从主动交互与实验中学习的框架。
AI.method: 提出HExA（Hierarchical Experimentalist Agents）框架，通过三个核心机制实现在上下文中自改进：迭代设计与优化查询相关实验、从经验中学习可重复使用的可组合技能库、以及整合实验证据以支持推理与行动。该框架无需训练，兼容任意黑盒模型，不依赖外部监督、或acles或离线数据；同时构建Interphyre基准（基于PHYRE 2D程序物理环境），通过模拟API评估智能体的主动实验能力。
AI.result: 现有LLM智能体在Interphyre基准上表现困难，尤其在最高难度级别；Claude Sonnet 4.6原始成功率仅2%，HExA将其提升至77%。HExA同样能提升开源模型的性能，且优于ReAct和Reflexion等基线方法；仅利用从较简单关卡学习并迁移的技能（无需主动实验），HExA仍能达到44%的成功率，展示了技能的可复用性与泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过主动实验学习能够帮助LLM智能体发现有用知识、获取可复用技能，并在未知长程任务上实现高效进展；HExA证明了在无训练、无外部监督的条件下，基于上下文的自改进范式可以显著提升智能体在复杂物理推理环境中的表现，为克服LLM在全新领域中依赖先验知识的固有限制提供了有效路径。

title: Spatially Localized Image Degradation Embeddings for Image Quality Assessment
summary: Self-supervised learning (SSL) currently drives state-of-the-art performance in no-reference image quality assessment (NR-IQA). However, standard SSL pipelines uniformly apply synthetic distortions across the entire image field, which can limit their sensitivity to spatially localized and co-occurring degradations encountered in real-world content. In this work, we empirically expose this representational blind spot across existing state-of-the-art encoders, demonstrating their reduced sensitivity to spatially bounded image degradations. To bridge this gap, we introduce Spatial Localized Image Degradation Embeddings for Image Quality Assessment (SLIDE-IQA). SLIDE-IQA employs a dual-branch Vision Transformer framework that injects spatially bounded degradations into a contrastive pretraining objective. To handle the spatial complexity of these degradations, we introduce a Threshold-Bounded Exclusion Mechanism, a representational design choice that resolves structural conflicts arising from spatially localized distortions to ensure the latent space respects both degradation type and spatial scale. Finally, we show that SLIDE-IQA's synthetic-only pretraining significantly improves sensitivity to localized distortions, while achieving competitive performance on NR-IQA benchmarks against existing SSL NR-IQA models.

AI.tldr: SLIDE-IQA 提出双分支 Vision Transformer 框架，通过在对比预训练中注入空间有界退化并引入阈值边界排除机制，有效提升了无参考图像质量评估模型对局部和共现退化的敏感性，在合成预训练下取得与现有 SSL NR-IQA 方法相当的基准性能。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督学习（SSL）管线在无参考图像质量评估（NR-IQA）中虽表现优异，但均采用均匀施加于全图的合成退化，导致模型对真实世界内容中空间局部化和共现退化（co-occurring degradations）的敏感度不足，存在表征盲区。
AI.method: SLIDE-IQA 采用双分支 Vision Transformer 框架，在对比预训练目标中显式注入空间有界退化（spatially bounded degradations）；同时引入阈值边界排除机制（Threshold-Bounded Exclusion Mechanism），作为表征设计选择来解决空间局部化失真导致的结构冲突，确保潜空间同时尊重退化类型和空间尺度。
AI.result: 实验表明，跨现有最先进编码器存在对空间有界图像退化的敏感度系统性下降；SLIDE-IQA 的纯合成预训练显著提升了对局部失真的敏感性，并在 NR-IQA 基准测试上与现有 SSL NR-IQA 模型取得具有竞争力的性能。
AI.conclusion: 该工作首次实证暴露了现有 SSL 编码器在空间局部退化上的表征盲区，并证明通过合理的空间感知预训练设计（无需真实数据）即可有效弥补该缺陷，为未来 NR-IQA 的表征学习提供了兼顾退化类型与空间尺度的新方向。

title: When LLMs Develop Languages: Symbolic Communication for Efficient Multi-Agent Reasoning
summary: Chain-of-Thought (CoT) improves large language models (LLMs) on difficult reasoning tasks, but it often incurs long natural-language rationales that are poorly aligned with efficient machine reasoning. We propose Communicative Language Symbolism Routing (CLSR), a test-time framework in which multiple LLM agents autonomously invent, evolve, and share compact Language Symbolism Frameworks (LSFs), while a latent-free router adaptively selects and composes these languages per query to optimize the accuracy-token trade-off.
