Unlike prompt optimization that refines surface instructions, CLSR treats each LSF as a reusable symbolic protocol with compact symbols, usage rules, and a message-passing contract, and improves it through an evolutionary loop driven by correctness and token cost. At inference time, the router may invoke a single low-cost LSF call, ensemble multiple LSFs, or execute a multi-round LSF composition protocol on harder queries. Across challenging benchmarks, CLSR reduces latency-oriented generated token completion by $3\sim 6\times$ compared to standard CoT while maintaining accuracy. We further derive an information-theoretic lower bound on token cost under arbitrary symbolism and show that, under an interpreter-realizability premise, multi-round LSF protocols conditionally subsume program-execution pipelines. Code is publicly available (https://github.com/pzqpzq/LSF_MDia).

AI.tldr: 提出通信语言符号路由（CLSR）框架，使多个LLM智能体自主发明、演化和共享紧凑的语言符号框架（LSF），并通过延迟无关路由器自适应选择与组合，在保持推理精度的同时将生成长度压缩至标准CoT的1/3至1/6。
AI.motivation: 标准思维链（CoT）虽然能提升大语言模型在复杂推理任务上的表现，但生成冗长的自然语言推理解释，这些解释与高效的机器推理范式不匹配，导致高延迟和计算开销，亟需一种能够在保持准确性的同时显著降低令牌开销的推理框架。
AI.method: CLSR框架包含两个核心组件：一是多LLM智能体在演化循环中自主发明、改进并共享可复用的语言符号框架（LSF），每个LSF由紧凑符号、使用规则和消息传递契约定义，并通过正确性和令牌代价驱动进化；二是无延迟路由器在测试时根据查询自适应选择单个低成本LSF、集成多个LSF或执行多轮LSF组合协议，以优化准确率与令牌消耗之间的权衡。
AI.result: 在多个具有挑战性的基准测试上，CLSR相比标准CoT将面向延迟的生成长度压缩约3至6倍，同时保持同等推理准确率；此外，论文推导了任意符号系统下令牌代价的信息论下界，并在解释器可实现性前提上证明多轮LSF协议有条件地包含程序执行流水线。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明，通过让LLM智能体自主进化紧凑符号语言并配合自适应路由，可以在不牺牲推理质量的前提下大幅降低推理开销，为构建更高效、可扩展的LLM推理系统提供了新的范式，同时所推导的理论下界为符号化推理的效率极限提供了形式化理解。

title: Zero-Gated Language-conditioned Human Motion Prediction
summary: Pose histories provide the core kinematic evidence for 3D human motion prediction, but they lack explicit high-level semantic guidance. This paper introduces ZGL, a lightweight language-conditioned predictor that uses captions of the observed motion as a semantic prior while preserving a strong motion backbone as the main source of dynamics. We render only the observed poses, generate a one-sentence description with a vision-language model, encode the caption with a frozen CLIP-L text tower, and project it into a small set of conditioning tokens. These tokens are injected into a DCT-based spatial-temporal Transformer by compact crossattention adapters with zero gates: each adapter output is multiplied by a learnable gate initialized to zero, so the full network is numerically identical to the pose-only baseline at initialization and can learn to use language only when it reduces prediction error. On Human3.6M, ZGL improves overall MPJPE over representative motion-prediction baselines in our comparison. Results on CMUMocap further show that compact caption conditioning transfers to a second benchmark and provides a practical semantic cue for 3D human motion prediction.

AI.tldr: 提出ZGL，一种轻量级语言条件化的3D人体运动预测方法，通过将观测姿态的文本描述作为语义先验注入DCT时空Transformer，利用零门控交叉注意力适配器确保初始化时与纯姿态基线一致，在Human3.6M和CMUMocap上改善了运动预测精度。
AI.motivation: 现有基于姿态历史的人体运动预测方法缺乏显式高层语义信息，仅依赖底层运动学特征，难以捕捉动作的语义含义和意图，从而限制了预测的准确性。
AI.method: ZGL使用视觉语言模型对观测姿态生成单句描述，通过冻结的CLIP-L文本编码器将描述嵌入语义特征，并投影为少量条件token；这些token通过紧凑的零门控交叉注意力适配器注入基于DCT的时空Transformer中，每个适配器输出乘以一个初始化为零的可学习门控，使整个网络在初始化时与纯姿态基线数值一致，仅在语言能减少预测误差时才激活语义先验。
AI.result: 在Human3.6M数据集上，ZGL在整体MPJPE指标上优于多个代表性运动预测基线方法；在CMUMocap上的实验表明，紧凑的文本描述条件化能够迁移到第二个基准数据集，并作为有效的语义线索提升3D人体运动预测性能。
AI.conclusion: 语言条件化能够为人体运动预测提供有效的语义先验，且通过零门控设计可确保网络不退化、仅在有益时利用语言信息，该方法轻量且具有良好的跨数据集迁移能力。

title: LLM-Guided Planning for Multi-hop Reasoning over Multimodal Nuclear Regulatory Documents
comment: Accepted at the Second Workshop on Agents in the Wild: Safety, Security, and Beyond @ ICML 2026. 8 pages (main), 3 figures, 1 algorithm
summary: Reviewing nuclear regulatory documents requires multi-hop reasoning across tens of thousands of pages, where judgments depend on evidence assembled across multiple chapters. We frame this task as planning: an LLM-based agent observes the evidence collected so far, picks the next document fragment to inspect, and stops when the evidence is sufficient. The agent operates over a vectorless document tree using browse, read, and search tools, and maintains a dynamic knowledge graph (KG) as state. On a 200-question benchmark over NuScale Final Safety Analysis Report (FSAR) documents, the system reaches 81.5% accuracy with a RAGAS Faithfulness of 0.93. The dominant performance factor is planning: against PageIndex, which uses the same document tree without state-conditioned action selection, the gap is +38.0pp (43.5% to 81.5%, p<0.001). The system also outperforms LightRAG (73.0%, p<0.05), HippoRAG (70.5%, p<0.01), and GraphRAG (49.5%, p<0.001), and matches RAPTOR (75.5%, p=0.11) without offline indexing. Edge inference adds 2.8x cost without raising accuracy; we retain it as a traceability module. Of 7,391 inferred edges, 3 Violates edges (0.04%) flag scope boundaries (Q058) and partial conformance (Q176) as typed annotations that a human reviewer can audit.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将核监管文件审阅任务建模为基于LLM智能体的规划问题，通过向量无关文档树上的浏览、阅读和搜索工具以及动态知识图谱状态，在200道题的NuScale FSAR基准上达到81.5%准确率和0.93 RAGAS忠实度，显著优于多种基线方法。
AI.motivation: 核监管文件审阅需要在数万页文档中进行多跳推理，判断依据分散在不同章节，传统检索增强生成方法难以有效支持这种跨章节的证据组装与逐步推理，亟需一种能够显式建模证据收集过程的规划驱动方案。
AI.method: 将审阅任务形式化为规划问题：基于LLM的智能体以当前已收集的证据为状态，选择下一个待检视的文档片段，并在证据充分时停止；智能体在无向量索引的文档树上使用浏览、阅读和搜索三类工具进行操作，并维护一个动态知识图谱（KG）作为状态表示。
AI.result: 在包含200个问题的NuScale最终安全分析报告（FSAR）基准上，系统达到81.5%的准确率，RAGAS忠实度为0.93；与使用相同文档树但不进行状态条件动作选择的PageIndex相比，优势达+38.0个百分点（43.5%到81.5%，p<0.001）；同时优于LightRAG（73.0%，p<0.05）、HippoRAG（70.5%，p<0.01）和GraphRAG（49.5%，p<0.001），与RAPTOR持平（75.5%，p=0.11）且无需离线索引；边推理增加2.8倍成本但不提升准确率，被保留作为可追溯模块；在7,391条推断边中，仅有3条Violates边（0.04%）标记了范围边界和部分符合等类型注释供人类审计。
AI.conclusion: 规划能力是性能的主导因素，状态条件化的动作选择对长文档多跳推理至关重要；动态知识图谱作为状态表示有效支持证据追踪，边推理虽然不提升准确率但可作为可追溯性模块提供；该方法无需离线文档索引即可匹敌甚至超越现有RAG方法，且错误率极低。

title: When Does Synthetic CT Transfer? A Label-Free Donor/Host Diagnostic for Medical Vision-Language Model Routing on Real Lung CT
summary: A synthetic measurement of model competence is useful only if it survives the move to real data, yet the real labels that would verify it are exactly what medical imaging lacks. We ask whether transfer can be predicted in advance, label-free, and answer with a mechanism: on synthetic digital twins, competence that is donor-driven (a property of the transplanted nodule) survives the synthetic to real change of host, while host-driven competence (a property of the surrounding anatomy) need not. We test this on three lung CT vision-language tasks chosen to span that axis, across five public VLMs, four guidance conditions, and seven real datasets. The prediction holds in every case: presence and size orderings transfer (R2 >= 0.96), lobe does not; the split survives leave-source-out calibration, and the diagnostic names that boundary before any real label. TrialCouncil, a training-free council calibrated only on synthetic CT, confirms it by matching the best fixed model exactly where transfer is predicted. The contribution is not the router but the finding that transfer itself is predictable, label-free, from synthetic data alone.

AI.tldr: 本文发现，在医学影像中，模型在合成数字孪生上展现的"供体驱动型"能力（如结节存在与大小排序）能够预测性地迁移到真实数据（R²≥0.96），而"宿主驱动型"能力（如肺叶识别）则不能，且这一迁移可预测性无需任何真实标签即可从合成数据中预先判定。
AI.motivation: 医学影像领域缺乏真实标注，无法验证模型在合成数据上的能力是否能迁移到真实数据，现有研究尚未提前、无标签地预测这种迁移性。
AI.method: 提出一种基于合成数字孪生的预测机制，将模型能力分为供体驱动型（来源于移植结节的属性）和宿主驱动型（来源于周围解剖结构的属性），在三个肺部CT视觉-语言任务（结节存在、大小排序、肺叶识别）上，使用五种公开VLM、四种引导条件和七个真实数据集进行验证，并设计了仅基于合成CT数据校准的无训练委员会（TrialCouncil）进行确认。
AI.result: 结节存在与大小排序（供体驱动型）的迁移性预测准确，R²≥0.96；肺叶识别（宿主驱动型）无法迁移。该分裂在留源校准中稳健，且诊断性名称在真实标签之前即可界定边界。TrialCouncil在预测迁移的任务上与最佳固定模型表现匹配。
AI.conclusion: 迁移性本身是可以仅从合成数据中无标签地预测的，核心贡献不在于路由方法，而在于发现了这一可预测性机制。

title: Mixture of Debaters: Learn to Debate at Architectural Level in Multi-Agent Reasoning
summary: Existing multi-agent debate frameworks suffer from two critical limitations: they rely on static architectures where agent roles and coordination patterns are fixed at design time, and they require instantiating multiple model copies, incurring substantial computational overhead. We propose Mixture of Debaters (MoD), a unified framework that enables dynamic self-debate within a single model by leveraging the Mixture-of-Experts paradigm. We address three key challenges in adapting MoE for dialectical reasoning: (1) dual-routing that decouples role allocation from process flow, dynamically determining when to debate versus when to synthesize; (2) momentum switching that smooths token-level routing with local context, reducing expert-switch jitter; and (3) unified self-debate that encapsulates diverse debating personas into lightweight expert modules, eliminating inter-agent communication while preserving behavioral diversity. Extensive experiments on multimodal benchmarks demonstrate that MoD outperforms both single-model baselines and conventional multi-agent systems, achieving superior accuracy with 3.7x lower latency and 87% reduction in token consumption.The source code can be accessed at https://github.com/YongLD/MoD.

AI.tldr: MoD提出了一种基于混合专家（MoE）范式的动态自我辩论框架，在单一模型内通过双路由、动量切换和统一自我辩论机制实现多角色辩论，相比传统多智能体辩论系统在精度提升的同时将推理延迟降低3.7倍、Token消耗减少87%。
AI.motivation: 现有基于多智能体的辩论框架存在两个关键局限：一是采用静态架构，智能体角色与协调模式在设计中固定不变，缺乏动态适应性；二是需要实例化多个模型副本，带来巨大的计算开销和推理延迟，限制了其在资源受限场景下的实用性。
AI.method: MoD将混合专家（MoE）范式适配至辩证推理场景，提出三项关键技术：(1) 双路由机制，将角色分配与处理流程解耦，动态决策当前步骤应进行辩论还是综合；(2) 动量切换策略，利用局部上下文平滑化token级路由决策，减少专家切换的抖动；(3) 统一自我辩论，将多种辩论角色封装为轻量级专家模块，消除智能体间通信开销的同时保留行为多样性。
AI.result: 在多模态基准测试上的实验表明，MoD在准确性上超越了单模型基线方法和传统多智能体辩论系统，同时实现了3.7倍的推理延迟降低和87%的Token消耗缩减，验证了其在效率和效果上的双重优势。
AI.conclusion: MoD通过将辩论过程压缩至单一模型内的动态专家交互，证明了无需多模型副本即可实现有效的辩证推理，为低开销、高可扩展性的辩论式AI系统提供了新的设计范式，并开源了代码以促进后续研究。

title: Pointer-CAD v2: Plan-Then-Construct CAD Generation with Dimension-Aware Parametric Precision
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2026. Code is available at https://github.com/Snitro/Pointer-CAD-v2
summary: Computer-aided design (CAD) plays a fundamental role in modern manufacturing by providing the high precision required for industrial production. Recent large language model based approaches formulate CAD generation as a sequence prediction problem and have achieved promising results. However, existing methods and evaluation protocols primarily emphasize visual similarity, while overlooking precise geometric parameters and correct metric scale. Small numerical deviations that are negligible at the shape-level may still violate industrial tolerance requirements, a problem further compounded by current autoregressive paradigms that utilize command sequence representations, aggressively quantize numerical parameters to ease LLM prediction. In this work, we present Pointer-CAD v2. Compared with v1 (arXiv:2603.04337), this version directly predicts continuous values, bypassing the need for quantized numerical parameters and thereby eliminating quantization errors. Specifically, we propose a unified framework that decouples parameter reasoning from geometric construction through a Plan-Then-Construct paradigm. Our method first produces a structured design plan with explicit metric scale parameters. These parameters are organized into a dictionary and directly referenced during sequence generation via a pointer mechanism, eliminating discretization errors and ensuring dimensionally consistent execution. In addition, we construct a new large-scale dataset with plan-level annotation and introduce three hierarchical geometry accuracy metrics to evaluate parametric fidelity at the vertex, edge, and face levels. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Pointer-CAD v2 consistently outperforms existing baselines and achieves substantial improvements in geometric accuracy, enabling reliable CAD generation for precision-critical engineering applications.

AI.tldr: Pointer-CAD v2 提出了一种解耦参数推理与几何构建的 Plan-Then-Construct 框架，通过指针机制直接预测连续数值，消除了量化误差，并在新的大规模数据集和分层几何精度指标上显著优于现有方法，为精密工程领域的可靠 CAD 生成奠定了基础。
AI.motivation: 现有基于大语言模型的 CAD 生成方法主要关注视觉相似性，忽视了精确的几何参数和正确的度量尺度；同时，这些方法采用命令序列表示和激进数值量化策略，导致量化误差累积，即使微小偏差也可能违反工业公差要求，无法满足精密工程应用的需求。
AI.method: Pointer-CAD v2 提出一种统一框架，采用 Plan-Then-Construct 范式将参数推理与几何构建解耦：首先生成包含显式度量尺度参数的结构化设计计划，将这些参数以字典形式组织，并在序列生成阶段通过指针机制直接引用，从而消除了离散化误差并确保维度一致性。
AI.result: 在构建的包含计划级标注的大规模数据集上，Pointer-CAD v2 在顶点、边和面三个层级的分层几何精度指标上持续优于现有基线方法，取得了显著的几何精度提升，验证了其在精密工程应用中生成可靠 CAD 模型的能力。
AI.conclusion: Pointer-CAD v2 通过直接预测连续值和解耦参数推理与几何构建，有效消除了量化误差，显著提升了 CAD 生成的几何精度和尺寸一致性，为精度要求严苛的工业应用提供了可行的解决方案。

title: FADE: Mitigating Hallucinations by Reducing Language-Prior Dominance in Large Vision-Language Models
summary: Despite the impressive capabilities of Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs), they remain susceptible to hallucination, generating content inconsistent with the input image. Recent studies attribute this to the dominance of language priors over visual inputs and employ contrastive decoding methods to mitigate this dominance, but the mechanistic origin remains unexplored. We investigate the information flow through each transformer layer and find that attention modules consistently aggregate visual evidence, while FFN modules at critical layers act as the source of language priors. These priors can override visual evidence, causing correct predictions in intermediate layers to drift toward incorrect outputs. Based on this insight, we propose FADE (FFN Attenuation for DEcoding), a training-free method that attenuates FFN outputs to reduce language-prior dominance. Evaluations on POPE, CHAIR, and MME benchmarks across LLaVA-1.5, mPLUG-Owl2, and InstructBLIP show that FADE effectively mitigates hallucinations while preserving inference efficiency.

AI.tldr: 本文发现大型视觉语言模型（LVLM）中幻觉源于FFN模块在关键层主导语言先验并覆盖视觉证据，提出无需训练的FFN衰减解码方法FADE，在多个基准上有效缓解幻觉并保持推理效率。
AI.motivation: 尽管LVLM能力强大，但仍易产生与输入图像不一致的幻觉内容。现有研究归因于语言先验对视觉输入的支配，并采用对比解码方法缓解，但语言先验支配的机制性起源尚未被探索，本文旨在揭示该机制并据此提出针对性缓解方法。
AI.method: 论文首先分析信息在各Transformer层中的流动，发现注意力模块持续聚合视觉证据，而关键层的FFN模块则是语言先验的来源，这些先验会覆盖视觉证据导致中间层的正确预测向错误输出偏移。基于此发现，提出FADE（FFN Attenuation for DEcoding），一种无需训练的推理时解码方法，通过衰减FFN模块输出强度来减少语言先验的支配作用。
AI.result: 在POPE、CHAIR和MME基准上，基于LLaVA-1.5、mPLUG-Owl2和InstructBLIP三种模型架构的评估表明，FADE能有效缓解幻觉现象，同时保持推理效率不受显著影响。
AI.conclusion: 本文揭示了LVLM幻觉的机制性根源——FFN模块在关键层引入语言先验并覆盖视觉证据，并据此提出了一种简单有效的无需训练的解码策略FADE，为理解和缓解多模态大模型幻觉提供了新的机制层面的视角和实用的轻量级解决方案。

title: W4A4 Quantization for Inference on Wan2.2-I2V-A14B
comment: 4 pages, 8 figures; ICME 2026 Low-Bit-width Large-Model Quantization Challenge submission
summary: We summarize our submission to Sub-Challenge 1: W4A4 Quantization for Inference (HiF4 / MXFP4) of the ICME 2026 Low-Bit-width Large-Model Quantization Challenge. The sub-challenge targets 4-bit weight and 4-bit activation inference on Wan-AI/Wan2.2-I2V-A14B under HiF4 or MXFP4 numerical formats. We adapt two complementary ideas from LLM quantization, MixQ-style mixed precision for sparse activation outliers and SmoothQuant-style per-channel smoothing, together with block-wise HiF4 packing for Wan2.2 feed-forward linear layers. Calibration on representative OpenS2V-5M batches identifies heavy-tailed activation channels; smoothing rebalances dynamic range before W4A4 rounding; and a dual-branch GEMM preserves outlier columns in higher precision while the bulk of channels use strict W4A4. On official VBench I2V metrics, our pipeline stays within 2-3.5 percent of FP16 on most quality axes and improves motion smoothness, outperforming a native HiFloat4 baseline that degrades roughly 5 percent relative to FP16 across all reported scores.

AI.tldr: 针对ICME 2026低比特大模型量化挑战赛W4A4子任务，该工作融合MixQ风格混合精度与SmoothQuant风格逐通道平滑，结合分块HiF4打包，在Wan-AI/Wan2.2-I2V-A14B上实现4-bit权重量化与激活量化，在VBench指标上相比FP16仅下降2-3.5%，显著优于原生HiFloat4基线。
AI.motivation: W4A4（4-bit权重与4-bit激活）低比特量化在大模型推理中能显著降低存储与计算开销，但在Wan-AI/Wan2.2-I2V-A14B这类视频生成大模型上直接应用HiF4或MXFP4格式会导致严重的精度退化（原生HiFloat4基线相比FP16在所有指标上下降约5%），因此需要针对激活值中的重尾异常通道设计更精细的量化策略以缩小与全精度之间的质量差距。
AI.method: 该工作融合了两类LLM量化思路：采用MixQ风格的混合精度策略处理稀疏激活异常值，以及SmoothQuant风格的逐通道平滑方法重平衡动态范围；具体实现包括在Wan2.2前馈线性层上应用分块HiF4打包，通过代表性OpenS2V-5M批次校准识别重尾激活通道，利用平滑预处理在W4A4舍入前重新分配数值范围，并设计双分支GEMM核，使异常值列保持更高精度而主体通道严格使用W4A4计算。
AI.result: 在官方VBench I2V评价指标上，该方法的量化管线在大多数质量轴上与FP16的差距控制在2-3.5%以内，且在运动平滑度指标上有所提升，全面优于原生HiFloat4基线（后者在所有报告分数上相对FP16退化约5%）。
AI.conclusion: 将LLM量化中成熟的混合精度与平滑技术迁移适配至视频生成大模型的W4A4低比特量化是有效的，通过校准识别异常通道并配合双分支GEMM设计，可以在保持极端低位宽（4-bit）的同时显著缓解精度损失，为大规模视频生成模型的低比特推理部署提供了可行方案。

title: Cognitive World Models for Process-Level Social Influence Evaluation
summary: Social influence dialogue changes user behavior by altering internal cognitive states. The central evaluation question is whether the user's beliefs, desires, intentions, and emotions measurably change over the course of conversation, a process-oriented criterion that neither surface-level text metrics (BLEU/ROUGE) nor single-score LLM judgments can capture. We propose the \textbf{Cog}nitive \textbf{W}orld \textbf{M}odel \textbf{(CogWM)}, an LLM-based user model that reframes multi-turn dialogue evaluation from ``what did the user say'' to ``how did the user's internal cognitive state evolves.'' CogWM jointly predicts BDI/E cognitive states and user utterances and serves as both a user simulator and an evaluation platform, using a three-tier evaluation framework that covers turn-level fidelity, trajectory-level state dynamics, and task-level composite scoring. Trained via our \textbf{S}ummarize-\textbf{a}nd-\textbf{A}llocate \textbf{(SaA)} annotation pipeline on 150,454 user-turn samples across four social influence scenarios, CogWM achieves 77.6\% emotion accuracy (2.1$\times$ over GPT-5.5). In 3600 multi-agent discrimination trials, it distinguishes six commercial agents by their cognitive influence, with Llama-4-Scout ranking first (CTS +0.233). CogWM moves social influence dialogue evaluation from terminal judgment to process tracking. We have released our code\footnote{\scriptsize Code: https://github.com/lucianma05-create/CogWM} and models\footnote{Model: https://www.modelscope.cn/models/LucianMa/CogWM-14B}.

AI.tldr: 提出认知世界模型CogWM，将社交影响对话评估从用户说了什么转向用户内部认知状态如何演变，通过联合预测BDI/E认知状态和用户话语，在多个社交影响场景下实现高精度认知状态预测，并有效区分不同商业对话智能体的认知影响力。
AI.motivation: 现有社交影响对话评估依赖表面文本指标（BLEU/ROUGE）或单次LLM评分，无法捕捉用户内部认知状态（信念、欲望、意图、情感）在对话过程中的可测量变化，缺乏面向过程（process-oriented）而非终端判断（terminal judgment）的评估范式。
AI.method: 提出CogWM，一种基于LLM的用户模型，联合预测BDI/E认知状态和用户话语；设计三级评估框架（轮次级保真度、轨迹级状态动态、任务级复合评分）；提出Summarize-and-Allocate (SaA)标注流程，在四个社交影响场景上构建150,454条用户样本进行训练。
AI.result: CogWM在情感预测上达到77.6%准确率，是GPT-5.5的2.1倍；在3600次多智能体辨别测试中，成功区分六个商业智能体的认知影响力，Llama-4-Scout排名第一（CTS +0.233）。
AI.conclusion: CogWM将社交影响对话评估从终端判断转向过程追踪，揭示了内部认知状态演变作为对话评估核心维度的可行性，为对话系统的认知影响力建模提供了新范式。

title: Fast Enough to Act: Spatio-Temporal Visual Token Merging for Low-Latency Robotic VLMs and VLAs
summary: Vision-language models and vision-language action models endow the robot with unprecedented capabilities. However, the input of video and high-resolution images yields a massive number of visual tokens, leading to extremely high inference latency and severely hindering the robot's real-time control. To break through this computational bottleneck, we propose ST-Merge, a plug-and-play, training-free framework that efficiently fuses redundant tokens directly during the visual encoding phase. By explicitly constructing 3D spatiotemporal coordinates, it employs a multi-queue parallel matching and weighted aggregation mechanism to achieve efficient and geometrically consistent fusion of redundant tokens across frames. In addition, we introduce a post-merge positional correction mechanism that effectively eliminates spatial deviation caused by merging by dynamically re-evaluating the rotational position code of the weighted centroid of the vision token, thereby ensuring the high-precision spatial awareness required for dexterous operation. In the Video Question Answering task on the mainstream VLM, Qwen2.5-VL, ST-Merge achieves a 2$\times$ inference speedup with only a tiny 1\% loss in precision. When deployed on the $π_{0.5}$ VLA policy, ST-Merge achieves an 8.3$\times$ speedup at 1024 $\times$ 1024 resolution and matches the baseline success rate at this high-resolution setting. At lower resolutions, it introduces a small drop in accuracy.

AI.tldr: 提出ST-Merge，一种即插即用、无需训练的视觉令牌融合框架，通过在视觉编码阶段显式构建3D时空坐标并采用多队列并行匹配与加权聚合机制，在VQA任务中实现2倍推理加速且性能损失仅1%，在VLA策略中实现8.3倍加速并保持基线成功率。
AI.motivation: 视觉语言模型与视觉语言动作模型在处理视频和高分辨率图像时会产生大量视觉令牌，导致推理延迟极高，严重制约机器人实时控制能力，亟需突破这一计算瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出ST-Merge，一种即插即用、无需训练的框架，在视觉编码阶段直接对冗余令牌进行高效融合。通过显式构建3D时空坐标，采用多队列并行匹配与加权聚合机制实现跨帧冗余令牌的高效且几何一致的融合，并引入合并后位置校正机制，通过动态重评估视觉令牌加权质心的旋转位置编码来消除空间偏差，确保高精度空间感知。
AI.result: 在Qwen2.5-VL上的Video Question Answering任务中，ST-Merge实现2倍推理加速，精度损失仅1%。在π_{0.5} VLA策略中，1024×1024分辨率下实现8.3倍加速并匹配基线成功率，低分辨率下准确率略有下降。
AI.conclusion: ST-Merge通过训练无关的令牌融合机制显著降低视觉编码阶段的计算开销，在保持高精度空间感知的同时大幅提升推理速度，为机器人实时控制中的高分辨率视觉处理提供了有效的解决方案。

title: UCOB: Learning to Utilize and Evolve Agentic Skills via Credit-Aware On-Policy Bidirectional Self-Distillation
summary: Skill memories can improve agentic reinforcement learning by reusing past experience as textual guidance, but retrieved skills are not oracular: they may help in one state while misleading the same policy in another. This makes the common privileged-teacher assumption fragile, namely that a skill-conditioned prompt can be treated as a fixed teacher for the no-skill prompt. We introduce UCOB, a framework for learning to utilize and evolve agentic skills via credit-aware on-policy bidirectional self-distillation. UCOB treats skill-conditioned and no-skill prompts as two on-policy context views of the same model, compares their return-to-go within the same task and anchor state, and uses the higher-return view as the local teacher. This local credit signal internalizes useful skill-conditioned behavior, corrects misleading skill usage, and guides task/state skill memory updates, utility-aware retrieval, and reflection self-training. Experiments on agentic tasks, including ALFWorld, WebShop, and Search-QA, show that UCOB outperforms skill-free RL, skill-memory baselines, and self-distillation methods across model scales, with up to 23.5 and 18.0 point gains over SOTA baselines on ALFWorld and WebShop. Ablations and analyses further validate its core mechanisms and efficiency.

AI.tldr: UCOB提出了一种基于信用感知的在线双向自蒸馏框架，通过将技能条件提示和无技能提示视为同一模型的两个在线上下文视图，利用返回比较实现局部教师信号，从而解决技能记忆在强化学习中可能提供误导性指导的问题，在ALFWorld、WebShop和Search-QA等任务上显著超越现有基线。
AI.motivation: 现有技能记忆方法在强化学习中假设检索到的技能可以充当固定教师来指导无技能策略，但技能并非全知全能——同一技能在一个状态下有帮助，在另一状态下可能误导相同策略，这种特权教师假设是脆弱的。因此需要一种能够动态判别技能有用性并纠正误导性技能使用的学习框架。
AI.method: UCOB将技能条件提示和无技能提示视为同一模型的在线策略上下文视图，在同一任务和锚定状态下比较两者的返回（return-to-go），将返回更高的视图作为局部教师。该局部信用信号内化有用技能条件行为、纠正误导性技能使用，并指导任务/状态技能记忆更新、效用感知检索和反思自训练，形成完整的在线双向自蒸馏框架。
AI.result: 在ALFWorld、WebShop和Search-QA等智能体任务上，UCOB在不同模型规模下均优于无技能强化学习、技能记忆基线和自蒸馏方法，在ALFWorld和WebShop上相较于最先进基线分别提升高达23.5和18.0个百分点。消融实验和分析进一步验证了其核心机制和效率。
AI.conclusion: UCOB通过信用感知的在线双向自蒸馏有效解决了技能记忆在强化学习中的误导性问题，证明了基于局部返回比较的教师信号比固定特权教师假设更鲁棒，为智能体技能的高效利用与演化提供了新的范式。

title: Dynamic Parsing and Updating Natural Language Specification using VLMs for Robust Vision-Language Tracking
summary: Vision-language tracking guided by natural language specifications leverages high-level semantic cues of target objects to substantially boost tracking accuracy and robustness. Existing studies have verified that adaptively optimizing textual descriptions throughout the tracking process can effectively mitigate the semantic-visual mismatch induced by dynamic variations in target appearance, position, and other inherent attributes. Nevertheless, mainstream methods that directly generate textual information via sequence models or large language models inevitably suffer from inherent defects, including erroneous target updating, excessive background distraction, and pervasive hallucination artifacts. To address the aforementioned limitations, this paper proposes a novel language dependency parsing mechanism to precisely distill core tracking principal components, encompassing target objects, semantic concepts, and background contextual information. On this basis, we perform component-aware adaptive textual description updates by exploiting the powerful cross-modal understanding capability of the pre-trained vision-language model Qwen-VL. By integrating the proposed elaborately designed modules into the baseline framework, our method achieves consistent and superior tracking performance on multiple large-scale vision-language tracking benchmarks, including TNL2K, LaSOT, TNLLT, and OTB-LANG. The source code and pre-trained models will be released at https://github.com/Event-AHU/Open_VLTrack.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于语言依赖解析机制的视觉-语言跟踪方法，通过解耦核心跟踪成分并利用Qwen-VL进行组件感知的自适应文本更新，有效缓解了语义-视觉失配与幻觉问题，在多个基准上取得了领先性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言跟踪方法虽能通过自适应优化文本描述缓解目标外观动态变化导致的语义-视觉失配，但主流方法（如序列模型或大语言模型直接生成文本）存在目标更新错误、背景过度干扰及幻觉伪影等固有缺陷，亟需一种更精确的文本更新机制来提升跟踪鲁棒性。
AI.method: 本文提出一种新颖的语言依赖解析机制，用于精确蒸馏核心跟踪主成分，包括目标对象、语义概念和背景上下文信息；在此基础上，利用预训练视觉-语言模型Qwen-VL的跨模态理解能力，执行组件感知的自适应文本描述更新，并将所设计的模块集成到基线框架中。
AI.result: 所提方法在TNL2K、LaSOT、TNLLT和OTB-LANG等多个大规模视觉-语言跟踪基准上取得了一致且优越的跟踪性能，验证了该机制在缓解语义-视觉失配与幻觉问题上的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过语言依赖解析与组件感知更新相结合，本文证明了利用预训练视觉-语言模型进行精细化文本更新的可行性，为提升视觉-语言跟踪在动态场景下的鲁棒性提供了新的思路，代码与模型已开源。

title: SCARCE: Scalable Cascade Analysis for Rare-event Characterisation via Embeddings
summary: Rare events govern the safety profile of modern AI systems, yet their probabilities are extremely difficult to estimate: direct Monte Carlo requires prohibitive sample budgets. Subset Simulation (SS) addresses this by decomposing a rare-event probability into moderate conditional probabilities over nested intermediate events. However, classical SS requires a handcrafted scalar performance function whose sublevel sets define those events, demanding detailed knowledge of the failure geometry and limiting transfer to new domains. We propose SCARCE (Scalable Cascade Analysis for Rare-event Characterisation via Embeddings), which replaces the performance function with learned latent representations and geometric rulers that score proximity to failure regions. Adaptive thresholding constructs nested intermediate events directly from data. We formalise SCARCE through a non-negative supermartingale, yielding a high-probability upper envelope that remains valid under early stopping. On MNIST misclassification, where dense Monte Carlo provides ground truth, SCARCE achieves approximately 400--500 times lower mean absolute error than grid-searched traditional SS while eliminating systematic over-counting. We then study PAIR-style LLM jailbreaks under a fleet-level threat model with adversarial fraction $η$. On Llama-Guard-3-8B hidden states, a PCA-based ruler attains 2.6% mean relative error for $η\geq 10^{-3}$ against finite-sample references whose average bootstrap relative half-width is 27.9%, and transfers to a GCG-style corpus with 2.93% relative error after recalibration. A directional criterion $\mathrm{KL}(p_{\mathrm{good}}\,\|\,p_{\mathrm{bad}})$ ranks rulers consistently with estimation error (Spearman $ρ=0.83$).

AI.tldr: SCARCE 通过用学习的潜在表示和几何标尺替代传统子集模拟中手工设计的性能函数，实现了对 AI 系统罕见事件概率的可扩展估计，在 MNIST 误分类和 LLM 越狱评估中显著降低了估计误差并支持跨域迁移。
AI.motivation: 现代 AI 系统的安全性受罕见事件主导，但直接蒙特卡洛方法需要巨大样本预算，而经典子集模拟依赖手工设计的标量性能函数及其子水平集来定义嵌套事件，要求对失效几何有详细了解，限制了其在新领域的迁移能力。
AI.method: SCARCE 用学习的潜在表示和几何标尺替代性能函数，通过自适应阈值从数据中直接构建嵌套中间事件，利用非负上鞅形式化保证了一个高概率上界并在早停条件下仍然有效，支持对模型隐状态（如 Llama-Guard-3-8B）进行 PCA 降维后定义距离标尺。
AI.result: 在 MNIST 误分类任务中，SCARCE 的均值绝对误差比网格搜索的传统 SS 低约 400–500 倍且消除了系统性的过度计数；在 PAIR 风格 LLM 越狱评估中，对抗比例 η≥10⁻³ 时 PCA 标尺的均值相对误差为 2.6%，远低于有限样本参考的 27.9% 平均自举相对半宽，迁移至 GCG 风格语料后经重校准误差仅为 2.93%。
AI.conclusion: SCARCE 有效克服了经典子集模拟需要手工设计性能函数的局限，在多个罕见事件估计任务上实现了数量级级别的精度提升和良好的跨域迁移能力，基于 KL 散度排序几何标尺与估计误差高度相关（Spearman ρ=0.83），为 AI 系统的大规模安全性评估提供了可扩展的方法框架。

title: NaLA: A 3D Native LLM Layout Agent for High-quality 3D Scene Generation
summary: Recently, Large Language Models (LLMs) have emerged as promising layout agents for 3D scene generation. Existing layout agents still suffer from implausible layout generation because most of them convert 3D assets and 3D layouts into textual descriptions as inputs and outputs, which involves severe information loss due to the modality gap between texts and 3D assets and 3D layouts. We propose NaLA, a native 3D LLM layout Agent for high-quality 3D scene generation by placing 3D assets in the scene. For the inputs, NaLA encodes 3D scene boundaries and 3D assets directly into the LLM, preserving fine-grained geometry and enabling explicit reasoning over relationships like collisions, surface supporting, and containment. To accurately output the positions and orientations of assets, NaLA adopts a coarse-to-fine prediction mechanism that first predicts discrete poses in an autoregressive manner and then refines the discrete poses with a continuous regression. Trained on diverse layout datasets, NaLA attains strong geometric perception and layout coherence. Experiments demonstrate that NaLA outperforms prior layout agents in both generation quality and inference efficiency, with comprehensive ablation studies to verify each component's effectiveness.

AI.tldr: NaLA是一种原生3D LLM布局智能体，通过直接编码3D场景边界和资产到LLM中并采用粗到细的位姿预测机制，解决了现有文本驱动3D布局生成中模态间隙导致的信息损失问题，在生成质量和推理效率上均优于先前的布局智能体。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的3D场景布局智能体通常将3D资产和布局转换为文本描述作为输入和输出，由于文本与3D之间存在的模态间隙，这一过程会导致严重的几何与空间信息损失，从而生成不合理的布局结果。
AI.method: NaLA提出了一种原生3D LLM布局智能体，其输入阶段直接编码3D场景边界和3D资产到LLM中，保留细粒度几何信息并支持对碰撞、表面支撑和包含关系等空间约束进行显式推理；输出阶段采用粗到细的位姿预测机制，先以自回归方式预测离散位姿，再通过连续回归进行精细化调整。
AI.result: 在多样化的布局数据集上训练后，NaLA在生成质量和推理效率方面均优于先前的布局智能体，并通过全面的消融实验验证了各组件（如3D原生编码、粗到细预测）的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，通过直接以3D原生方式编码场景与资产信息，并辅以粗到细的位姿回归策略，可以显著缓解模态间隙带来的信息损失，提升LLM在3D场景布局生成任务中的几何感知能力和布局一致性。

title: GUICrafter: Weakly-Supervised GUI Agent Leveraging Massive Unannotated Screenshots
summary: Data, as the fundamental substrate of modern intelligence, has greatly driven the development of current foundation models. Naturally, researchers aim to extend this paradigm to the domain of GUI agents, hoping to build strong GUI agents through a similar paradigm. However, GUI agent data cannot be directly harvested from the internet, making it costly and difficult to collect at scale. As a result, current GUI agents suffer from poor cross-device generalization and limited visual grounding ability for fine-grained GUI elements. As an attempt to address data challenge in GUI agents, we propose GUICrafter, a weakly-supervised GUI agent leveraging massive unannotated screenshots to substantially reduce the reliance on expensive human annotations. GUICrafter explores a curriculum learning framework for training GUI agents through two progressive stages. First, the model learns visual grounding from large-scale unannotated screenshots and webpages, leveraging the rich contextual signals inherent in GUI interactions without human annotations. Then, in Stage 2, we leverage a small amount of high-quality data to calibrate the model via reinforcement learning. Experiments show that GUICrafter achieves competitive, or even superior, performance to advanced systems like UI-TARS while using only 0.1% of its data. Furthermore, under the same amount of annotated data, GUICrafter surpasses all previous methods such as GUI-R1. Code, data, and models are available at https://github.com/fansunqi/GUICrafter.

AI.tldr: GUICrafter提出了一种弱监督GUI智能体训练框架，通过课程学习从大规模无标注截图中学习视觉定位，再以少量高质量数据和强化学习进行校准，在仅使用UI-TARS 0.1%数据量的情况下取得与其相当或更优的性能，显著降低了对人工标注的依赖。
AI.motivation: 当前GUI智能体训练严重依赖昂贵且难以规模化收集的人工标注数据，导致模型跨设备泛化能力差、细粒度GUI元素的视觉定位能力有限，亟需一种能利用大规模无标注数据来减少对人工标注依赖的方法。
AI.method: GUICrafter采用两阶段课程学习框架：第一阶段利用大规模无标注截图和网页数据，通过GUI交互中丰富的上下文信号引导模型学习视觉定位，完全无需人工标注；第二阶段使用少量高质量标注数据通过强化学习对模型进行校准，提升最终性能。
AI.result: GUICrafter在使用UI-TARS仅0.1%数据量的情况下达到了与其竞争甚至更优的性能；在相同标注数据量下，GUICrafter超越了所有先前方法（如GUI-R1）。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明了通过弱监督课程学习策略，大规模无标注GUI截图可以有效替代大量人工标注，大幅降低GUI智能体训练的数据成本，为构建跨设备泛化能力强的GUI智能体提供了可行路径。

title: Budgeted Act-or-Defer Multi-Agent LLM Deliberation with Local Reliability Bounds
summary: Multi-agent deliberation among LLMs can improve reasoning, but deployment requires deciding when the current answer is reliable enough to act on and when it should be escalated to human review. We formulate this as budgeted act-or-defer decision making. At each round, the system maps the debate prefix to a low-dimensional state, computes a $k$-nearest-neighbor lower confidence bound on state-conditional correctness using calibration data, and acts only when the bound exceeds a user-specified reliability threshold. The certificate controls wrong actions through the decomposition $β= δ+ α+ \varepsilon_{\mathrm{act}}$, separating calibration failure, residual action risk, and representation gap. The guarantee is conditional, not distribution-free: it relies on a valid local bias envelope and an action-region representation-gap bound, and each assumption is paired with falsification-style diagnostics. Because the same absolute wrong-action budget has different meanings across tasks of different difficulty, we set budgets relative to each task's final-round error using training data only, and evaluate safety by normalized budget usage $\mathrm{WA}/β$. On six benchmarks against nine baselines, the method uses 9--12% of the pre-declared budget on activated datasets, reaching up to 84% automation and 96% acted-on accuracy; on stress-test datasets, it defers rather than forcing unreliable automation. Rather than relying on per-task post-hoc threshold search, the method prospectively converts a user-declared wrong-action budget into an auditable act-or-defer operating point before deployment, under explicitly stated assumptions.

AI.tldr: 提出一种预算约束下的"行动-延迟"决策框架，通过k近邻置信下界和错误行动预算分解，使多智能体LLM系统在满足用户指定的可靠性阈值时自动行动，否则转交人工审查，并在六个基准上以9–12%的预算使用率实现高达84%的自动化和96%的 acted-on 准确率。
AI.motivation: 多智能体LLM辩论虽能提升推理能力，但实际部署中需要系统自主判断何时答案足够可靠以执行动作、何时应升级至人工审查，而现有方法缺乏一种能在部署前基于用户声明的错误动作预算前瞻性地确定可审计的操作阈值的机制。
AI.method: 将问题形式化为预算约束下的"行动-延迟"决策：每轮将辩论前缀映射为低维状态，利用校准数据计算基于k近邻的状态条件正确性下置信界（LCB），仅当下界超过用户指定的可靠性阈值时执行动作；通过错误行动预算分解β=δ+α+ε_act分离校准失败、残差行动风险和表示差距，在显式假设（局部偏差包络和行动区域表示差距界）下提供条件性保证，并配以伪造诊断；预算相对于每个任务最终轮错误进行归一化设定。
AI.result: 在六个基准上对比九种基线，该方法在激活数据集上仅使用预先声明预算的9–12%，达到最高84%的自动化和96%的 acted-on 准确率；在压力测试数据集上则倾向于延迟而非强制不可靠的自动化，验证了其安全决策能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法无需针对每个任务事后搜索阈值，而是将用户声明的错误行动预算转化为部署前可审计的操作点，并在显式假设下提供形式化保证；通过预算归一化（WA/β）实现了跨不同难度任务的公平安全评估，为LLM系统的可靠自动化部署提供了前瞻性决策框架。

title: Bit-ViP: Leveraging Bit-planes to Preserve Visual Privacy in Images through Obfuscation
summary: The unprecedented growth of computer vision applications, such as surveillance systems and social media, raises security and visual privacy concerns, especially when data is stored on cloud servers. Image obfuscation offers a way to preserve visual privacy while maintaining an adequate level of usability; thus, it has been a topic of great interest in recent years. However, prior obfuscation schemes are either vulnerable to malicious attacks, such as model inversion to reconstruct original images from obfuscated images, or generate non-trainable obfuscated images, making them unusable for achieving reasonable accuracy. This paper proposes a novel bit-plane-based image obfuscation scheme, {\em Bit-ViP}, to preserve visual privacy for image-based recognition tasks. The Bit-ViP scheme produces secure, usable images by incorporating an innovative end-to-end obfuscation function. While doing so, the obfuscated image would contain non-invertible noise (generated by Lorenz's chaotic system and differential privacy), making it hard for an adversary to reconstruct the original image. We conduct extensive experiments on two popular activity recognition datasets, namely UCF101 and HMDB51, to validate the effectiveness of Bit-ViP. In the face of attacks on reconstruction, pixel frequency, information entropy, and pixel inter-correlation, we present a rigorous security analysis demonstrating tangible improvements over existing schemes.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于位平面的图像混淆方案Bit-ViP，利用Lorenz混沌系统和差分隐私生成不可逆噪声，在保护视觉隐私的同时保持图像在识别任务中的可用性。
AI.motivation: 现有图像混淆方案存在两个主要缺陷：要么容易受到恶意攻击（如模型反演攻击可重建原始图像），要么生成不可训练的混淆图像，导致下游识别任务的准确率下降。因此，亟需一种既能抵御重建攻击又能保持图像可用性的混淆方法。
AI.method: 提出了一种基于位平面的端到端图像混淆方案Bit-ViP。该方法通过创新的混淆函数，结合Lorenz混沌系统和差分隐私技术生成不可逆噪声，并将噪声嵌入图像的位平面中，使得混淆后的图像既无法被攻击者重建，又能直接用于训练识别模型。
AI.result: 在UCF101和HMDB51两个行为识别数据集上进行了大量实验，验证了Bit-ViP的有效性。针对重建攻击、像素频率攻击、信息熵攻击和像素互相关攻击等多类攻击场景，进行了严格的安全性分析，结果表明Bit-ViP相较于现有方案有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: Bit-ViP方案在图像混淆的安全性与可用性之间实现了有效的平衡，为云服务器上的视觉隐私保护提供了一种可行的解决方案，其结合混沌系统与差分隐私的思路为后续隐私保护研究提供了有价值的参考方向。

title: SHOVIR: A Benchmark for Evaluating Vision Shortcut Learning in Radiology Report Generation
summary: Current evaluation protocols for Vision-Language Models (VLMs) in Radiology Report Generation (RRG) rely on report-level metrics that measure lexical overlap or aggregate clinical correctness. However, such metrics do not test whether individual diagnostic statements stem from the actual pathological evidence visible in the image. This allows models to achieve competitive scores by exploiting learned priors or spurious correlations, a failure mode we refer to as vision shortcut. We introduce SHOVIR, a benchmark for evaluating vision shortcut behavior in RRG. SHOVIR extends two spatially annotated chest X-ray datasets, MIMIC-CXR and PadChest-GR, with per-box CheXpert labels, and defines image-level and disease-level occlusion experiments that contrast baseline performance on clean images against localized, region-specific perturbations. Comparing predictions across these conditions isolates two failure modes at the disease-class level: direct shortcuts, where a finding persists after its visual evidence is removed, and contextual shortcuts, where detection degrades once co-occurring pathologies are occluded despite the target region remaining intact. Benchmarking eight state-of-the-art VLMs, we find that shortcut behavior varies substantially across architectures and datasets. Models achieving the highest baseline report quality do not necessarily rank highest in spatial grounding, revealing that clinically fluent generation can coexist with shallow reliance on visual evidence. These findings expose a blind spot in current RRG evaluation and motivate region-aware assessment protocols.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示并标准化评估了放射学报告生成中视觉捷径问题，提出SHOVIR基准，通过对局部遮挡区域的细粒度分析发现，当前顶级VLM的临床流畅性与空间视觉依据并非正相关，存在报告质量高但视觉接地差的盲区。
AI.motivation: 当前放射学报告生成中使用的报告级评估指标仅衡量词汇重叠或临床正确性，无法检验单个诊断陈述是否真正源自图像中的病理证据，导致模型可利用学习先验或虚假相关性（即视觉捷径）获得竞争性分数，而现有评估体系无法检测此失败模式。
AI.method: 提出SHOVIR基准，扩展MIMIC-CXR和PadChest-GR两个空间标注的胸部X光数据集，添加逐框CheXpert标签；设计图像级和疾病级遮挡实验，通过对比干净图像与局部区域特异性扰动下的模型预测，在疾病类别层面隔离两种失败模式：直接捷径（视觉证据移除后发现仍存在）和上下文捷径（共现病理被遮挡后检测能力下降）。
AI.result: 对8种最先进VLM的基准测试显示，捷径行为在架构和数据集间存在显著差异；达到最高基线报告质量的模型在空间接地排名中并不一定最高，表明临床流畅的生成可以与对视觉证据的浅层依赖共存。
AI.conclusion: 当前RRG评估存在盲区，临床流畅性与视觉接地性并非正相关，亟需引入区域感知的评估协议来真正衡量模型对图像证据的利用程度。

title: Toward Secure and Reliable PDDL Formalization of Large Language Models with Planner-in-the-Loop Feedback
summary: Planning often requires symbolic specifications that are both executable and verifiable. For large language models deployed in autonomous or decision-support systems, failures in such formalization may lead to unverifiable decisions, execution failures, or unsafe downstream behavior. We present NL-PDDL-Bench, a multi-domain benchmark for natural-language-to-PDDL specification construction with planner-verified executability and controlled difficulty scaling by object count. We further propose a planner-in-the-loop framework that uses validator and planner diagnostics to revise non-executable specifications through localized edits. Building on this infrastructure, we develop a planner-grounded optimization recipe that combines parameter-efficient Low-Rank Adaptation supervised fine-tuning, offline planner-derived preference pairs for Direct Preference Optimization, and inference-time planner-in-the-loop repair, without requiring online planner calls during training. We also provide a unified evaluation suite for parseability, solvability, specification similarity, and outcome-aware plan-level consistency against planner references. Experiments on representative model families show substantial gains in planner success and plan-level agreement, with improved robustness under difficulty scaling and cross-domain variation. These results highlight the value of externally verifiable formalization for reliable deployment of LLMs in safety- or security-sensitive planning systems. Code and data are available at: https://github.com/ibasicplan/NL-PDDL-Bench

AI.tldr: 提出NL-PDDL-Bench基准数据集和一种规划器在环的优化框架，通过监督微调、偏好优化和推理时修复相结合的方法，显著提升大语言模型将自然语言转换为可执行PDDL规划规范的能力，实现可验证、可执行的符号化规划生成。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在自主决策或辅助决策系统中需要将自然语言形式化为可执行且可验证的符号规划规范（如PDDL），但现有模型在形式化过程中常出现不可验证、执行失败或不安全行为的问题，缺乏系统性的基准测试和可扩展的优化方法来保证规范的可执行性和规划一致性。
AI.method: 论文提出NL-PDDL-Bench多领域基准数据集，支持通过对象数量控制难度缩放；提出规划器在环（planner-in-the-loop）框架，利用验证器和规划器诊断信息通过局部编辑修正不可执行规范；在此基础上开发规划器引导的优化方案，结合参数高效的LoRA监督微调、基于规划器导出偏好对的直接偏好优化（DPO），以及推理时规划器在环修复，全程无需训练时调用在线规划器；并提供统一的评估套件，涵盖可解析性、可求解性、规范相似性和基于结果的规划一致性度量。
AI.result: 在多种代表性模型家族上的实验表明，所提方法在规划器成功率和规划级别一致性上取得显著提升，并在难度缩放和跨领域变化下表现出更强的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 外部可验证的形式化方法对于大语言模型在安全或敏感规划系统中的可靠部署具有重要价值，所提框架有效弥合了自然语言到可执行规划规范之间的鸿沟，为提升LLM在结构化规划任务中的可信度提供了可扩展的解决方案。

title: Bridging VideoQA and Video-Guided Agentic Tasks via Generalized Keyframe Extraction
comment: Accepted by ECCV 2026. Project Page: https://vg-gui-tasker.github.io/
summary: Video understanding is a fundamental capability for multimodal intelligence, and recent Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkable performance on Video Question Answering (VideoQA) benchmarks. However, existing benchmarks primarily evaluate whether models can perceive shallow visual cues, while rarely examining whether MLLMs can learn deeper knowledge or procedural skills from video tutorials and generalize them to downstream long-horizon agentic tasks. To address this gap, we introduce VG-GUIBench (Video-Guided GUI Benchmark), a new benchmark designed to evaluate whether MLLM-based GUI agents can follow video tutorials to complete corresponding GUI interactive tasks. Furthermore, we observe that the performance of models on both VideoQA and video-guided agentic tasks critically depends on effective keyframe extraction. Based on this observation, we propose TASKER (Task-driven And Scene-aware Keyframe searchER), a keyframe extraction algorithm that jointly considers task relevance and scene dynamics to identify informative frames. Experimental results demonstrate that TASKER achieves significant performance improvements on both VideoQA and video-guided agentic task benchmarks, outperforming the best baseline by 2.0% on the EgoSchema fullset and 1.8% on the NExT-QA dataset, respectively. These results further highlight the potential of generalized keyframe extraction methods for video understanding tasks. Our code and data are available at https://github.com/VG-GUI-TASKER/VG-GUI-TASKER.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 VG-GUIBench 基准测试，用于评估 MLLM 驱动的 GUI 代理能否跟随视频教程完成交互任务，并揭示了关键帧提取对视频理解和代理任务的重要性；同时提出 TASKER 算法，通过联合建模任务相关性与场景动态来实现高效关键帧提取，在多个 VideoQA 数据集上取得最先进结果。
AI.motivation: 现有 VideoQA 基准主要评估模型感知浅层视觉线索的能力，很少考察 MLLM 是否能从视频教程中学习深层知识或程序性技能并将其泛化到下游长时间代理任务中；同时，视频教程引导的 GUI 代理任务缺乏标准评估基准，且关键帧提取对模型性能至关重要但尚未得到充分研究。
AI.method: 本文提出 VG-GUIBench 基准测试，用于评估 MLLM 驱动的 GUI 代理根据视频教程完成对应 GUI 交互任务的能力；并提出 TASKER（Task-driven And Scene-aware Keyframe searchER）关键帧提取算法，该算法联合考虑任务相关性（task relevance）和场景动态（scene dynamics）来识别信息量丰富的关键帧，以提升下游 VideoQA 和视频引导代理任务的性能。
AI.result: TASKER 在 EgoSchema fullset 上超越最佳基线 2.0%，在 NExT-QA 数据集上超越最佳基线 1.8%，在两个 VideoQA 基准上均取得了显著的性能提升，同时验证了泛化关键帧提取方法在视频理解任务中的潜力。
AI.conclusion: MLLM 在 VideoQA 和视频引导代理任务上的性能关键依赖于有效的关键帧提取，TASKER 算法通过联合建模任务相关性与场景动态显著提升了视频理解性能，表明泛化关键帧提取方法在多种视频理解任务中具有广泛的应用潜力。

title: Self-Evolving World Models for LLM Agent Planning
summary: World models offer a principled way to equip long-horizon LLM agents with foresight: predictions of action consequences before execution. However, unreliable foresight can be ignored, misused, or even degrade downstream decision-making. In this paper, we introduce WorldEvolver, a self-evolving world model framework that revises its deployment-time context while keeping the downstream agent and all model parameters frozen. WorldEvolver integrates three modules: (i) Episodic Memory, which exploits real action transitions through retrieval-based simulation; (ii) Semantic Memory, which extracts persistent heuristic rules from prediction-observation mismatches; and (iii) Selective Foresight, which filters low-confidence predictions before integrating them into agent reasoning context. We evaluate WorldEvolver on ALFWorld and ScienceWorld, measuring world model prediction accuracy on Word2World and downstream agent success rate on AgentBoard. Extensive experiments show that WorldEvolver achieves the highest prediction accuracy across three backbones and leads other world model baselines on downstream agent success rate, demonstrating that test-time memory revision enhances both predictive fidelity and planning performance.

AI.tldr: WorldEvolver是一个自演化的世界模型框架，通过引入情景记忆、语义记忆和选择性预见三个模块在测试时动态修正部署上下文，在不改变下游智能体和模型参数的情况下，显著提升了长时域LLM智能体的预测准确率和规划性能。
AI.motivation: 长时域LLM智能体依赖世界模型提供行动后果的预测以实现前瞻性规划，然而现有世界模型在部署时会产生不可靠的预测，这些预测可能被忽视、误用甚至反而降低下游决策质量。当前方法通常需要重新训练模型或微调参数，缺乏一种在冻结所有参数的前提下于测试阶段动态提升预测可靠性的机制。
AI.method: WorldEvolver由三个核心模块组成：情景记忆模块通过检索机制从真实行动转换中构建基于检索的仿真；语义记忆模块从预测与观测之间的不一致中提取持久的启发式规则；选择性预见模块在将预测融入智能体推理上下文之前过滤掉低置信度的预测。整个框架在部署时仅修正上下文信息，不更新下游智能体和世界模型的任何参数。
AI.result: 在ALFWorld和ScienceWorld两个基准环境上，以Word2World作为世界模型预测准确性评测指标，以AgentBoard作为下游智能体成功率评测指标，实验结果表明WorldEvolver在三种不同骨干网络下均取得了最高的预测准确率，并在下游智能体成功率上领先其他世界模型基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该研究验证了在测试阶段通过记忆修订来动态改进上下文能够同时提升世界模型的预测保真度和下游规划性能，为在不更新模型参数的情况下持续提升LLM智能体能力提供了新的思路。

title: The Platonic Defense: Backdoor Defense for Self-Supervised Encoders in the Era of Large Scale Pre-training
summary: Self-supervised learning (SSL) pretrained models have become a dominant paradigm for visual representation learning, but they are vulnerable to backdoor attacks. Existing defenses struggle to defend against such attacks in a fully black-box setting because they often require access to labels, attack patterns, or training data. To tackle this issue, we propose a new attack-agnostic, model-agnostic, and modality-agnostic black-box test-time defense paradigm, called \emph{Platonic Representation Defense}. It is inspired by the Platonic Representation Hypothesis, which suggests that large-scale independently trained encoders converge toward compatible projections of the same underlying reality. We formalize this idea as a conditional energy function defined over source representations and a set of reference representations. The energy function is trained for detection through noise-contrastive estimation and for representation purification through denoising score matching. Theoretically, the energy gap between matched and mismatched samples is lower bounded by the mutual information between source and reference representations. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our method on multiple self-supervised encoders and more than 10 attacks. The method can perform both representation detection and purification, and achieves substantial performance gains across multiple attacks. Code is available \href{https://github.com/jsrdcht/Platonic-Representation-Defense}{here}.

AI.tldr: 提出一种名为Platonic Representation Defense的黑盒测试时防御范式，基于Platonic Representation Hypothesis，利用能量函数进行后门攻击的检测与表示净化，在多种SSL编码器和10余种攻击上取得显著效果。
AI.motivation: 自监督学习预训练模型虽已成为视觉表示学习的主流范式，但极易受到后门攻击；现有防御方法在完全黑盒设置下往往需要访问标签、攻击模式或训练数据，难以有效防御，因此亟需一种攻击无关、模型无关且模态无关的黑盒测试时防御方法。
AI.method: 提出Platonic Representation Defense范式，受Platonic Representation Hypothesis启发，将防御形式化为定义在源表示与参考表示集合上的条件能量函数；通过噪声对比估计训练能量函数进行攻击检测，通过去噪分数匹配进行表示净化；理论证明匹配与不匹配样本之间的能量差距以源表示与参考表示之间的互信息为下界。
AI.result: 在多种自监督编码器和超过10种后门攻击上验证了方法有效性，该方法能同时进行表示检测与表示净化，在多种攻击下均取得显著的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 该研究首次提出一种攻击无关、模型无关、模态无关的黑盒测试时后门防御范式，理论分析与实验验证均表明其有效性，为自监督学习模型的安全防御提供了新的思路和实用解决方案。

title: DEEPMED Search: An Open-Source Agentic Platform for Medical Deep Research with Introspective Verification
comment: 5 pages, 2 figures, 2 tables. Accepted to IJCAI-ECAI 2026 Demo Track. Project website: https://www.deepmedsearch.cloud. Demo video: https://youtu.be/4U4aok8yLpk
summary: Navigating the deluge of heterogeneous medical data, from academic literature (PubMed) to clinical guidelines (Web) and private knowledge bases, remains a critical bottleneck for evidence-based medicine. While commercial black-box tools lack transparency, standard open-source RAG implementations frequently suffer from reasoning drift when handling complex, long-tail queries. We present DEEPMED Search, a fully open-source, agentic platform designed for transparent medical deep research. Built on a high-performance Next.js architecture, DEEPMED Search features a source-adaptive router that autonomously dispatches sub-queries to PubMed, web search, or local graph-based knowledge bases based on information density. Crucially, the platform integrates an introspective verification module, powered by a causal-consistent multi-agent debate framework, to validate retrieved evidence against diagnostic logic before synthesis. To demonstrate its robustness, we showcase DEEPMED Search's ability to autonomously decompose high-difficulty rare disease queries, filter out confounding noise, and generate structured, citation-backed research reports in minutes. By open-sourcing this software, we provide the community with a robust infrastructure to democratize access to trustworthy, glass-box medical reasoning in research and prototyping settings.

AI.tldr: DEEPMED Search 是一个完全开源的、基于智能体的医疗深度研究平台，通过源自适应路由器和因果一致的多智能体辩论框架，在异构医疗数据源上实现透明、可验证的医学检索与综合，能够自主分解罕见病查询并生成结构化研究报告。
AI.motivation: 异构医疗数据（学术文献、临床指南、私有知识库）的管理与查询是循证医学的关键瓶颈，现有商业黑盒工具缺乏透明性，而标准开源 RAG 系统在处理复杂长尾查询时容易产生推理漂移。
AI.method: 提出 DEEPMED Search 平台，基于高性能 Next.js 架构构建；核心组件包括源自适应路由器（根据信息密度自动调度子查询至 PubMed、Web 搜索或本地图知识库）和一个内省验证模块（基于因果一致的多智能体辩论框架，在综合前对检索证据进行因果诊断逻辑验证）。
AI.result: 展示了 DEEPMED Search 能够自主分解高难度罕见病查询、过滤混淆噪声，并在数分钟内生成带有引用的结构化研究报告，验证了其在复杂医疗推理场景中的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该软件通过开源方式为社区提供了透明、可审计的医疗推理基础设施，有助于在研究和原型设计场景中实现可信医疗推理的民主化访问。

title: From Phase to Phenomenon: Self-Supervised Learning of Subsurface Scattering with Minimal Phase-shift Inputs
summary: We propose a self-supervised pretraining framework for learning sub-surface scattering (SSS) light transport representations from minimal input. Our method leverages a stereo projector-camera setup that captures only eight high-frequency phase-shift profilometry (PSP) images per view to pretrain an encoder in a multi-view, multi-object setting. We introduce a tailored augmentation strategy for PSP-based SSS data, and show that it significantly outperforms standard ImageNet-style augmentations for SSL pretraining. The pretrained encoder learns generalizable SSS representations that transfer effectively to downstream tasks, including spatially varying relighting and representation evaluation using a kNN classifier. Combined with a decoder, the model reconstructs dense scattering footprint responses, trained using a dedicated cost function that improves accuracy, particularly for anisotropic footprints. Despite using only eight input images per view, our approach generalizes to unseen objects with complex geometry and material properties, achieving high-fidelity reconstructions while requiring orders of magnitude fewer images than prior methods.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种自监督预训练框架，仅需每视角八张高频相移轮廓（PSP）图像即可学习可泛化的次表面散射（SSS）光传输表示，在减少两个数量级输入数据的同时实现高质量的重建。
AI.motivation: 现有基于学习的次表面散射（SSS）光传输表示方法通常需要大量输入图像，采集成本高昂；同时，自监督学习（SSL）在SSS领域的应用尚未充分探索，缺乏针对SSS数据特性的数据增强策略。
AI.method: 提出一个自监督预训练框架，利用立体投影-相机系统，在多视角多物体设置下仅采集每视角八张高频相移轮廓（PSP）图像用于编码器预训练；设计了一种针对PSP的SSS数据定制化增强策略；结合解码器重建密集散射足迹响应，并采用专门设计的损失函数以提高各向异性足迹的准确性。
AI.result: 定制的PSP数据增强策略显著优于标准ImageNet式增强；预训练编码器学到的SSS表示可有效迁移到空间可变重光照和kNN分类器评估等下游任务；仅用八张输入图像即可泛化到具有复杂几何和材质的未见物体，重建质量高，所需图像数量比先前方法少几个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，针对领域特定数据（如PSP图像）设计的数据增强策略对自监督预训练至关重要；所提方法大幅降低了SSS表示学习的数据采集成本，为高效光传输建模提供了新路径。

title: Rethinking Generative Reconstruction Attacks against Graph Neural Network Models
summary: The application of graph data in numerous disciplines raises the need for gathering and analyzing huge volumes of data, some of which is private and sensitive. The non-Euclidean nature of the graph data makes the analysis computationally challenging, leading to the use of Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) in the age of AI. GNNs may inadvertently leak sensitive data they are trained on, which raises serious data security issues, including the model inversion attack. In this study, we analyze GNNs' vulnerabilities by introducing two novel graph inversion (i.e., reconstruction) attacks: graph-label conditioned (GLC) attack and embedding-label conditioned (ELC) attack, utilizing targetmodel predictions and their intermediate representations, respectively. We perform a comprehensive analysis of our introduced privacy attacks and compare them with existing baselines across three benchmark graph datasets (i.e., NCI1, PROTEINS, and AIDS) and four graph distributional/structural metrics (i.e., FGD, EGD, MMD, and GKS). Our work demonstrates that an adversary can use the generator-discriminator technique to reconstruct high-quality graphs in real-world black-box attack scenarios against GNNs. Additionally, we present a variant of our attacks (Ours--) with 50% reduced queries, achieving good or comparable reconstruction attack performance. In addition, we show that GNNs are highly vulnerable to privacy attacks, varying Laplacian noise-scales.

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种针对图神经网络的黑盒图重构攻击（GLC和ELC），利用生成器-判别器技术，在基准数据集上实现了高质量图数据重建，揭示了GNN在模型预测和中间表示层面均存在严重的隐私泄露风险。
AI.motivation: 图数据在多个学科中广泛应用，其非欧几里得特性使得图神经网络成为主流分析工具，但GNN可能无意中泄露训练数据中的敏感信息，尤其是面临模型逆向攻击威胁，现有研究对GNN在此类隐私攻击下的脆弱性分析尚不充分。
AI.method: 本文提出了两种图重构攻击方法：图标签条件攻击利用目标模型的预测输出进行重建，嵌入标签条件攻击利用目标模型的中间表示进行重建；两种方法均采用生成器-判别器机制，在真实黑盒攻击场景下对GNN实施高保真图数据重构。
AI.result: 在NCI1、PROTEINS和AIDS三个基准图数据集上，使用FGD、EGD、MMD和GKS四种分布/结构度量进行评估，本文方法实现了高质量图重构；同时提出的变体方法在减少50%查询次数的条件下仍能取得良好或可比的攻击性能；实验还表明GNN对隐私攻击高度脆弱，且其脆弱性与拉普拉斯噪声尺度相关。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明攻击者能够在黑盒场景下通过生成器-判别器技术有效重建GNN训练数据的高质量图结构，暴露了GNN在模型预测和中间表示层面均存在严重隐私泄露风险，为图数据隐私保护研究提供了重要警示和基准。

title: CellDETR: A Detection-Guided Framework for Scalable Cell Representation Learning from Histopathology Images
summary: Recent advances in pathology foundation models have substantially improved patch and slide level representation learning from whole-slide images (WSIs).However, cell-level representations learning remain underexplored, limiting cell resolved interpretability, biological discovery, and clinical translation. We propose CellDETR, a detection-guided framework built on Deformable DETR for scalable cell representation learning from WSIs. By introducing location feature decoupling and box-constrained attention mechanism, CellDETR enables automated extraction of cell-level embeddings, and outperform existing state-of-the-art methods in supervised cell classification on PanNuke data. In addition, by incorporating contrastive learning design, we build a CellDETR-based pretraining model for scalable cell representation learning from unlabeled WSIs, which improves downstream cell classification performance. Furthermore, we show that after pretraining with Xenium spatial transcriptomics-derived cell annotations, CellDETR achieves accurate cross-dataset cell classification, demonstrating the transferability and biological relevance of the learned cell embeddings. Together, CellDETR provides a scalable route toward general cell-level representation learning framework for interpretable computational patholog

AI.tldr: CellDETR是一种基于Deformable DETR的检测引导框架，通过位置特征解耦和框约束注意力机制实现全切片图像中可扩展的细胞级表示学习，在监督分类、对比预训练及跨数据集迁移任务中均取得领先性能。
AI.motivation: 现有病理学基础模型在patch和slide级别的表示学习上取得了显著进展，但细胞级别的表示学习仍未被充分探索，这限制了细胞分辨率的可解释性、生物学发现及临床转化能力。
AI.method: CellDETR基于Deformable DETR构建检测引导框架，引入位置特征解耦和框约束注意力机制，实现从全切片图像中自动提取细胞级嵌入；通过引入对比学习设计，构建了可在未标注WSI上进行可扩展细胞表示学习的预训练模型。
AI.result: 在PanNuke数据集上，CellDETR在监督细胞分类任务中超越了现有最先进方法；基于对比学习的预训练模型进一步提升了下游细胞分类性能；利用Xenium空间转录组学衍生的细胞注释进行预训练后，CellDETR实现了准确的跨数据集细胞分类，证明了所学细胞嵌入的可迁移性和生物学相关性。
AI.conclusion: CellDETR提供了一条可扩展的路径，用于构建通用细胞级表示学习框架，推动可解释计算病理学的发展，并展示了在生物学发现和临床转化中的巨大潜力。

title: CLQT: A Closed-Loop, Cost-Aware, Strategy-Consistent Benchmark for Diagnostic Evaluation of LLM Portfolio-Management Agents
summary: LLM agents are increasingly cast as autonomous portfolio managers, and benchmarks have moved from financial question-answering to sequential trading. Yet most still rank agents by returns over a fixed window -- a weak proxy, since a period's return is dominated by the market path and apparent alpha can dissolve once look-ahead leakage is controlled. Such a ranking certifies neither sound reasoning, nor a consistent strategy, nor a durable edge. We introduce CLQT, which reframes closed-loop trading evaluation as diagnosis rather than ranking: an instrument that localizes where and why an agent's process succeeds or fails. CLQT is a fully closed-loop, cost-aware, strategy-consistent, temporally-gated environment whose agents run a five-stage cycle: gather, synthesize, allocate, execute, reflect. Each round emits a complete DecisionRound sealed into a recompute-verifiable hash chain, so every metric is reconstructable from the trail. Six pillars form the substrate: a hard TimeGate, institutional transaction- and financing-cost modeling, strategy-consistency scoring, three-tier memory, a Model-Context-Protocol tool layer, and mandate-aware synthesis. The same agent runs as a constrained committee of specialized roles or a single full-autonomy orchestrator, making process scaffolding an experimental variable. From the audit trail we compute a five-axis capability scorecard (APM-CS: Coherence, Acuity, Composure, Discipline, Reliability), with Coherence judged partly by a held-out, out-of-cohort LLM to curb self-preference bias. We validate it on a contamination-controlled multi-model backtest with an ablation grid and a live broker track on unseen, post-cutoff data, against a repeated-run noise floor. CLQT separates outcome from capability, yielding not a model ranking but a durable, extensible map of agent competencies and limitations.

AI.tldr: CLQT 是一个面向 LLM 交易代理的闭环诊断式评估框架，通过可审计的决策链、五轴能力评分卡和严格的时序门控，将评估从收益率排名转为对代理推理过程与策略一致性的定位分析，实验证明其能有效分离市场噪声与真实能力。
AI.motivation: 现有 LLM 交易代理评估大多以固定窗口内的收益率排名作为指标，但收益率受市场路径主导，且易受未来信息泄露污染，无法反映代理的推理质量、策略一致性与持久优势，亟需一种能定位代理过程成败原因的诊断式评估工具。
AI.method: CLQT 构建了一个完全闭环且考虑成本、策略一致性与时序门控的评估环境，代理执行“收集-综合-分配-执行-反思”五阶段循环，每次输出密封在可哈希校验的决策链中；核心组件包括硬性 TimeGate、机构级交易与融资成本建模、策略一致性评分、三层记忆系统、模型-上下文-协议工具层和指令感知综合模块，代理可作为约束委员会或全自主编排器运行，并基于审计轨迹计算包含五个维度的能力评分卡 APM-CS。
AI.result: 在污染控制的跨模型回测（含消融网格）和基于未见过后截止数据的实盘经纪商跟踪中，CLQT 通过重复运行噪声基线验证了评分稳定性，有效将结果与能力分离，产生了非排名的代理能力与局限的可扩展映射。
AI.conclusion: CLQT 证明面对交易代理评估时，诊断式能力定位比收益率排名更具可解释性与鲁棒性，其可审计决策链与多维度评分体系为未来构建更可靠的自主金融代理提供了框架性参考。

title: Rank-Aware Hyperbolic Alignment for Vision-Language Dataset Distillation
comment: Accepted for publication at ECCV 2026. Project Page: https://andyj1.github.io/raha
summary: Vision-language dataset distillation (VLDD) compresses a large image-text paired dataset into a small set of synthetic pairs that can efficiently train contrastive vision-language models under strict data and compute budgets. Most existing methods match expert trajectories or cross-modal statistics, yet still enforce full-dimensional alignment in a Euclidean embedding space. This is often overly restrictive due to rank-deficient image--text correlation, with shared semantics concentrated in a low-dimensional range and remaining variation spread across a weakly correlated residual subspace. LoRS relaxes alignment at the similarity level by low-rank factorization, but does not explicitly control dominant alignment capacity and structure in the representation space. We thus propose a rank-aware hyperbolic alignment (RAHA) that combines hierarchical geometry with explicit alignment-capacity control. RAHA lifts multimodal representations to hyperbolic space and optimizes distilled pairs with asymmetric objectives that enforce geodesic alignment in the shared range while regularizing the residual subspace to preserve modality-private diversity and improve transfer robustness. Experiments on benchmarks show that RAHA demonstrates competitive cross-modal retrieval and improved transfer indicators under fixed budgets.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于层级几何与显式对齐容量控制的秩感知双曲对齐方法（RAHA），用于视觉-语言数据集蒸馏，通过将多模态表示提升至双曲空间并采用非对称优化目标，在共享语义范围内实现测地线对齐，同时正则化残差子空间以保留模态私有多样性，在固定预算下实现了竞争性的跨模态检索性能与更强的迁移能力。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言数据集蒸馏方法通常在欧几里得嵌入空间中强制进行全维度对齐，这因图像-文本相关性呈秩亏特性而过于严格——共享语义集中于低维子空间，剩余变异分布于弱相关残差子空间。LoRS虽然通过低秩分解在相似度层面放松对齐，但未能显式控制表示空间中的主导对齐能力与结构，因此需要一种既能分层对齐共享语义、又能显式调控对齐容量并保留模态私有信息的方法。
AI.method: 提出秩感知双曲对齐方法（RAHA），将多模态表示提升至双曲空间，利用其层级几何特性对图像-文本数据的分层结构进行建模；设计非对称优化目标：在共享语义范围内强制实现测地线对齐以捕捉核心跨模态关联，同时对残差子空间施加正则化约束以保留模态私有多样性，从而提升模型在受限数据预算下的迁移鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在标准基准上的实验表明，RAHA在固定数据与计算预算下取得了具有竞争力的跨模态检索性能，并在迁移学习指标上表现出显著改善，验证了层级几何与对齐容量控制相结合的有效性。
AI.conclusion: RAHA通过引入双曲空间中的秩感知对齐机制，有效解决了现有欧几里得对齐方法在视觉-语言数据集蒸馏中因秩亏相关性导致的过度约束问题，为受限资源下的跨模态表示学习提供了新的优化范式，其迁移鲁棒性提升暗示了该方法在零样本或小样本下游任务中的潜在应用价值。

title: SAGA: Scene-Aware, Goal-Evolving Agents for Long-Horizon CivRealm Strategy Planning
summary: Long-horizon strategic planning in complex strategy games demands concurrent reasoning across multiple decision domains under imperfect information and sparse reward. Existing LLM-based agents suffer from three systematic failures: scene blindness from raw tile coordinates, context overflow and domain coupling from monolithic state dumps, and shallow cross-game learning that treats each episode in isolation. We present SAGA, an LLM multi-agent framework with three mechanisms each directly targeting one class of failure: (i) a Map-Semantic Scene Graph that encodes typed spatial relations among game entities into per-unit natural-language context, resolving spatial blindness without global token inflation; (ii) a Tool-Augmented Planner that pulls fine-grained domain state on demand and dispatches per-domain directives to dedicated specialist controllers, eliminating context overflow, domain coupling, and mechanical constraint violations; and (iii) a Dual-Horizon Feedback Loop that combines periodic within-game goal generation with structured cross-game causal post-mortem, enabling principled strategic evolution without manual reward engineering. Evaluated on FreeCiv, SAGA attains the highest mean civilization score -- the environment's sole sparse objective reward -- with lower variance than the two strongest baselines, and is the only method that significantly surpasses every baseline on infrastructure construction, the resource axis most readily sacrificed under multi-objective conflict. It outscores the two strongest baselines in most head-to-head games while cutting output tokens (the dominant decoding cost) by 27%. Equipped with the cross-game evolution module, SAGA reaches the highest end-of-chain score across five successive episodes. Ablation studies confirm that each architectural component contributes independently to this advantage.

AI.tldr: SAGA 是一个面向复杂策略游戏中长程战略规划的 LLM 多智能体框架，通过地图语义场景图、工具增强规划器和双视野反馈循环三大机制，分别解决了现有方法中的场景盲视、上下文溢出与领域耦合、以及浅层跨游戏学习问题，在 FreeCiv 上取得了最高平均文明分数并降低了 27% 的推理 token 消耗。
AI.motivation: 现有基于 LLM 的智能体在长程战略规划中面临三类系统性失败：原始瓦片坐标导致的空间盲视、单次状态转储引起的上下文溢出与领域耦合、以及将每局游戏孤立处理导致的浅层跨游戏学习，亟需一个能够同时应对这些挑战的统一框架。
AI.method: SAGA 提出三个核心机制：地图语义场景图将实体间的类型化空间关系编码为每个单元的自然语言上下文，解决空间盲视而不引入全局 token 膨胀；工具增强规划器按需拉取细粒度领域状态并向专用控制器分发各领域指令，消除上下文溢出、领域耦合和机械约束违规；双视野反馈循环结合局内周期性目标生成与结构化的跨游戏因果事后分析，实现无需人工奖励工程的原则性策略演化。
AI.result: 在 FreeCiv 上，SAGA 获得了最高的平均文明分数且方差低于两个最强基线，是唯一在基础设施建造指标上显著超越所有基线的方法；在多数直接对局中得分更高，同时将推理 token 输出减少 27%；配备跨游戏演化模块后，SAGA 在连续五局游戏中达到最高终端分数；消融实验确认每个组件独立贡献了优势。
AI.conclusion: SAGA 通过解耦感知、规划与学习三个维度，系统性地解决了 LLM 智能体在复杂策略游戏中的长程规划瓶颈，验证了结构化场景表征、按需工具调用和跨游戏因果学习在提升稀疏奖励环境下多智能体协作性能方面的有效性，为 LLM 驱动的复杂决策智能体设计提供了通用范式。

title: MAVIN: Multi-Shot Audio-Visual Generation with Narrative Control
summary: While recent generative models produce high-fidelity videos, they struggle with the complex narrative control required for coherent multi-shot audio-visual generation. Existing methods suffer from temporal misalignment, limited controllability, and incomplete scripting. In this paper, we propose MAVIN, the first framework for multi-shot audio-visual generation with customized narrative control. To resolve temporal misalignment, we propose boundary-aware attention, which leverages hierarchical captions and boundary-aware token routing to render audio-visual elements within their respective temporal boundaries. To improve the controllability for multi-subject scenarios, we propose ID-aware propagation, utilizing identity embeddings and an identity-aware mask to bind specific identities to consistent visual appearances and vocal timbres. To provide comprehensive audio-visual narratives, we present a multi-agent scripting pipeline to transform free-form user inputs into hierarchical captions. Furthermore, we construct MAVINSet, a multi-shot audio-visual dataset for robust training and evaluation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MAVIN achieves state-of-the-art performance, opening up a new avenue for integrating generative models into professional filmmaking workflows.

AI.tldr: MAVIN是首个支持定制化叙事控制的多镜头音视频生成框架，通过边界感知注意力、ID感知传播和多智能体脚本流水线解决现有方法在时间对齐、可控性和完整脚本方面的不足，在多项实验中达到最优性能。
AI.motivation: 现有生成模型虽能生成高保真视频，但在多镜头音视频生成中缺乏复杂的叙事控制能力，存在时间错位、可控性有限以及脚本不完整等关键问题。
AI.method: MAVIN提出三大技术：一是边界感知注意力机制，利用层级化字幕和边界感知token路由在各自时间边界内渲染音视频元素以解决时间错位；二是ID感知传播，通过身份嵌入和身份感知掩码将特定身份与一致的视觉外观和声音音色绑定，提高多主体场景的可控性；三是多智能体脚本流水线，将自由形式的用户输入转化为层级化字幕。此外还构建了多镜头音视频数据集MAVINSet用于训练和评估。
AI.result: 大量实验表明MAVIN在多项任务上达到最先进的性能，验证了其在多镜头音视频生成方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: MAVIN为将生成模型集成到专业电影制作工作流中开辟了新途径，为多镜头叙事级音视频生成提供了可行的解决方案。

title: Be Faithful When Response: Returning Fluent and Grounded Answers for Vision-Language Models Reinforcement Learning
summary: Reinforcement Learning (RL) is an important paradigm for improving the reasoning capabilities of Vision-Language Models (VLMs). However, directly applying RL to rollout multimodal reasoning can lead to instability, due to the exploitation of language priors, the neglect of visual evidence, and the generation of reasoning traces that are fluent yet not visually grounded. The question arises: Can initially steer the policy toward visually faithful reasoning regime before applying reinforcement learning? To this end, we propose a Faithful Warm-Start (FWS) strategy that first curates samples with explicit vision-language causal relationships from six general VQA benchmarks to construct the FaithfulQA dataset, where each of the image-question pairs gains a certain degree of visual observations, question requirements, commonsense knowledge, domain knowledge, and the final answer. Subsequently, a VLM-based judge is employed to further purify the dataset, ensuring strong causal consistency and visual faithfulness. This warm-start stage equips the model with the capability to understand causally grounded vision-language patterns before subsequent RL optimization under sparse answer-level rewards. Experimental results show that such faithful supervision improves answer accuracy, stabilizes RL training, and reduces visually unsupported reasoning.

AI.tldr: 提出Faithful Warm-Start (FWS)策略，通过构建具有显式视觉-语言因果关系的FaithfulQA数据集并对模型进行预热训练，使多模态推理策略在强化学习优化前具备视觉可信赖的推理能力，从而提升答案准确性、稳定RL训练并减少缺乏视觉支持的推理。
AI.motivation: 直接对视觉-语言模型（VLM）应用强化学习（RL）进行多模态推理时，存在策略利用语言先验、忽视视觉证据、生成流畅但缺乏视觉可信度的推理轨迹等不稳定问题，亟需一种方法在强化学习前将策略引导至视觉可信赖的推理状态。
AI.method: 提出Faithful Warm-Start (FWS)策略，首先从六个通用VQA基准中筛选具有显式视觉-语言因果关系的样本，构建FaithfulQA数据集；然后利用基于VLM的评判器进一步净化数据集，确保因果一致性和视觉忠实性；最后在稀疏答案级奖励的RL优化前对模型进行预热训练，使其掌握因果视觉-语言模式。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，FWS策略的忠实监督能够提升答案准确性，稳定强化学习训练过程，并有效减少缺乏视觉支持的推理行为。
AI.conclusion: 在RL优化前引入视觉因果驱动的预热训练，能够有效缓解直接应用RL进行多模态推理时的不稳定性，为VLM的可信推理提供了一条可行的前期引导路径。

title: Benchmark AUC Is Not Deployable Reliability: A Cross-Dataset Audit of Off-the-Shelf Features for Surveillance Video Anomaly Detection
summary: Automated "suspicious behavior" flagging is a headline promise of AI surveillance, and the field reports high frame-level ROC-AUC on standard video anomaly detection benchmarks. Those numbers are measured by training and testing on the same camera and scene. We audit what happens when that assumption is dropped. We build an unsupervised normality model from the all-normal training frames of one dataset, using frozen off-the-shelf embeddings (CLIP, DINOv2, ResNet-50, EfficientNet-B0) and a nearest-neighbour distance, and score the test frames of the same and of other datasets. Across 4 real datasets (UCSD Ped1, UCSD Ped2, CUHK Avenue, ShanghaiTech) and 4 backbones, same-dataset AUC averages 0.704 but cross-dataset AUC averages 0.499, which is chance: a detector calibrated on one scene is no better than a coin flip on another, and in several pairs it is below chance. The strongest backbone makes this worse, not better: DINOv2 has the best same-dataset AUC (up to 0.901 on Ped2) and the largest cross-dataset drop. The collapse is not an artefact of the scoring rule: replacing the nearest-neighbour detector with a PaDiM-style Mahalanobis detector reproduces it almost exactly (cross-dataset gap 0.202 versus 0.208). Even at a favourable operating point the false-alarm rate is on the order of 31,931 per hour. We conclude that the benchmark numbers quoted for surveillance anomaly detection describe a calibrated laboratory setting and overstate deployable reliability by a wide margin, and we release the code that reproduces every number.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过跨数据集评估发现，AI监控中常用的视频异常检测方法在跨场景条件下性能骤降至随机水平（AUC约0.5），表明当前基准测试结果严重高估了实际部署的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 当前视频异常检测方法在标准基准上报告了较高的帧级ROC-AUC，但这些指标均在相同摄像头和场景下训练和测试获得；该研究旨在审计当这一假设被打破时（即跨数据集、跨场景），这些检测器的实际泛化性能是否依然可靠。
AI.method: 该研究构建了基于无监督正态性建模的检测框架，使用4个冻结的预训练骨干网络（CLIP、DINOv2、ResNet-50、EfficientNet-B0）从训练帧提取嵌入，并分别采用最近邻距离和PaDiM风格的马氏距离作为异常评分函数；在4个真实数据集（UCSD Ped1、UCSD Ped2、CUHK Avenue、ShanghaiTech）上进行同数据集和跨数据集的系统性评估。
AI.result: 同数据集AUC平均值为0.704，而跨数据集AUC平均值仅为0.499（相当于随机猜测），且在多个数据集对中低于随机水平；最强的DINOv2骨干在同数据集上表现最佳（Ped2上达0.901），但跨数据集性能下降最大；即使采用有利操作点，每小时误报率仍高达约31,931次；更换马氏距离检测器后跨数据集差距（0.202 vs 0.208）几乎完全一致，表明性能崩溃并非评分规则所致。
AI.conclusion: 实验表明，视频异常检测的基准测试结果描述的是经过标定的实验室场景，严重高估了实际部署的可靠性；在同一场景校准的检测器在迁移到新场景时性能不优于抛硬币，提示该领域需要重新审视评估协议并关注跨场景泛化能力。

title: ACPO: Agent-Chained Policy Optimization for Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
summary: Cooperative tasks in Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL) require agents to collectively maximize a shared return. Under the Centralized Training with Decentralized Execution (CTDE) paradigm, policy gradients have remained difficult to compute directly. Prior methods largely follow two approaches: independent factorized updates with centralized critics, which lack general joint-improvement guarantees without value decomposition assumptions, or alternating best-response updates, which can converge to suboptimal Nash Equilibria. In this paper, we show the joint policy gradient admits an exact decentralized decomposition of per-agent terms, each formed from per-agent score functions and decentralized critics. Based on this decomposition, we develop Agent-Chained Policy Optimization (ACPO), where actors are trained independently, with their updates together constituting a single step on the joint policy gradient. Central to this result is a serialized view of the simultaneous joint decision in which agents commit actions one at a time, each conditioning on a belief over preceding actions. The belief acts as the coordination mechanism which ties the independent per-agent updates into a joint gradient step. We evaluate ACPO on Multi-Robot Warehouse, SMACv2, and MA-MuJoCo, where it outperforms strong baselines, with the gap widening as the number of agents grows.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Agent-Chained Policy Optimization (ACPO)，通过将联合策略梯度精确分解为每个智能体的独立项，并利用序列化信念机制协调独立更新，实现了CTDE范式下可直接计算的分布式策略梯度方法，在多个MARL基准上超越强基线方法。
AI.motivation: 在CTDE范式下，多智能体策略梯度方法面临两难：基于独立因子化更新和集中式Critic的方法缺乏联合改进保证（除非有值分解假设），而交替最佳响应更新可能收敛到次优纳什均衡。现有方法难以在保持智能体独立更新的同时实现联合策略梯度的直接、精确计算。
AI.method: ACPO首先证明了联合策略梯度可被精确分解为每个智能体的项，每项由智能体的分数函数和去中心化Critic构成。核心思想是将同时联合决策视为序列化过程：智能体逐一提交动作，每个智能体基于对先前动作的信念进行条件化。该信念作为协调机制，将独立的逐智能体更新绑定为联合梯度步，从而实现Actor的独立训练。
AI.result: 在Multi-Robot Warehouse、SMACv2和MA-MuJoCo三个MARL基准上，ACPO均优于强基线方法，且随着智能体数量增加，性能差距进一步扩大。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明联合策略梯度存在精确的去中心化分解形式，序列化信念机制是一种有效的隐式协调方式。ACPO在无需值分解假设或交替更新的前提下实现了可证明的联合优化方向，为大规模多智能体系统的策略梯度训练提供了新范式。

title: ScAle: Attention Head Scaling as a Minimal Adapter for Spatial Reasoning in Vision Language Models
summary: Spatial reasoning remains a persistent challenge for many vision language models (VLMs), and improving it typically requires fine-tuning with substantial additional parameters. Our preliminary analysis reveals that rescaling activations in selected transformer layers-without modifying pretrained weights-can significantly influence downstream performance. Motivated by this observation, we propose ScAle, an ultra-lightweight adaptation method that learns a small set of scalar coefficients to modulate last-token attention and MLP activations in a fully frozen backbone. We evaluate our method on the synthetic spatial reasoning benchmark SpatialEval and on real-world VQA datasets (COCOQA and VGQA) across multiple model families. Our method, ScAle, achieves up to 134.1% relative accuracy gains using only 1K trainable parameters without requiring millions of trainable parameters as in standard PEFT methods such as LoRA. Despite its extreme compactness, our approach recovers a substantial fraction of standard PEFT performance while preserving strong non-spatial VQA accuracy. These results demonstrate that bounded activation reweighting provides a simple, architecture-agnostic, and highly parameter-efficient alternative for adapting pretrained VLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ScAle，一种超轻量级激活重缩放方法，通过仅学习约1K个标量系数对冻结视觉语言模型中的后置token注意力与MLP激活值进行调制，在空间推理任务上取得最高134.1%的相对准确率增益，以极低参数量恢复了标准PEFT方法的大部分性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型（VLM）在空间推理任务上表现不佳，而传统改进方法通常需要微调大量额外参数；作者通过初步分析发现，无需修改预训练权重，仅对选定Transformer层的激活值进行重缩放即可显著影响下游性能，这启发了一种更极简的参数高效适配方案。
AI.method: 提出ScAle方法，在完全冻结的VLM骨干网络中选择部分Transformer层，为后置token的注意力层和MLP层的激活值学习一组极少量（约1K）的标量系数进行调制，无需改变任何预训练权重，是一种架构无关的超轻量级适配方法。
AI.result: 在合成空间推理基准SpatialEval及真实世界VQA数据集（COCOQA、VGQA）上，ScAle仅使用约1K可训练参数即实现最高134.1%的相对准确率提升，远超标准PEFT方法（如LoRA）所需数百万参数才能达到的水平，同时保持了非空间VQA任务的强性能。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，有界激活重加权是一种简单、架构无关且极高参数效率的VLM适配替代方案，能够在极紧凑的参数预算下恢复标准PEFT的大部分性能，为空间推理等困难任务的轻量级微调提供了新方向。

title: MirrorCode: AI can rebuild entire programs from behavior alone
comment: 34 pages, 13 figures, 9 tables. Code available at https://github.com/epoch-research/MirrorCode
summary: AI models are rapidly improving at autonomous coding, as shown by benchmark progress and one-off demonstrations such as AI implementing a C compiler. However, existing coding benchmarks tend to focus on shorter tasks, and one-off demonstrations are hard to compare systematically because they often have some human guidance, and are not standardized or repeated across models. To address these challenges, we introduce MirrorCode, a long-horizon coding benchmark based on reimplementing entire software projects. In MirrorCode, AI agents must replicate the functionalities of an existing program, without access to its source code. AI solutions must match the original program's output exactly on end-to-end tests, including held-out tests. MirrorCode's 25 target programs span different areas of computing: Unix utilities, data serialization and query tools, bioinformatics, interpreters, static analysis, cryptography, and compression. Existing AI models can already reimplement complex software, with the strongest model scoring 56% across the benchmark. For example, AI can reimplement gotree, a 16,000-line bioinformatics toolkit - a task that we believe would take weeks for a human engineer. However, studying the frontier of performance requires a larger inference budget than typical benchmarks, for example, \$2,600 over 19 days for a single attempt on a large task. We show that AI agents can already complete long-horizon software engineering tasks, especially when requirements are precisely specified. More broadly, our work suggests AI will have transformative effects on software engineering, as autonomous agents continue to improve.

AI.tldr: MirrorCode 是一个基于完整软件项目复现的长期编码基准，测试 AI 自主编程能力；当前最强模型得分为 56%，且能在高推理成本下完成复杂任务（如复现 16000 行生物信息学工具），表明 AI 在精确需求下的软件工程中具有变革潜力。
AI.motivation: 现有编码基准多聚焦于短任务，而一次性演示缺乏标准化、可重复对比，且常依赖人工引导，难以系统衡量 AI 在长期、自主编程任务上的真实能力，因此需要构建一个涵盖完整软件项目、无需源代码、需精确匹配输出的长期编码基准。
AI.method: MirrorCode 要求 AI 代理在无源代码条件下完全复现目标程序的功能，并通过端到端测试（含留出测试）确保输出与原始程序精确一致；基准包含 25 个覆盖 Unix 工具、数据序列化、生物信息学、解释器、静态分析、密码学和压缩等多个领域的真实软件项目作为目标。
AI.result: 最强 AI 模型在 MirrorCode 上得分 56%，成功复现了如 gotree（16000 行生物信息学工具包）这样的复杂软件——该任务预估需人类工程师数周完成；但前沿性能探索需要远超常规基准的推理预算（例如单个大型任务单次尝试耗资 2600 美元、耗时 19 天）。
AI.conclusion: AI 代理已能够在需求精确指定时完成长期软件工程任务，随着自主代理能力的持续提升，AI 将对软件工程产生变革性影响；MirrorCode 为系统评估和推动该领域前沿提供了标准化平台。

title: SonoCLIP: Mask-Guided Region-Aware Vision-Language Pretraining for Fetal Ultrasound Analysis
summary: Vision-language foundation models have shown strong potential in medical image analysis. Although foundation models for ultrasound imaging have recently emerged, the domain remains particularly challenging due to severe speckle noise, acquisition variability, and subtle anatomical boundaries, leading to high inter-observer variability. Existing CLIP-based models rely primarily on global image-text alignment, limiting their sensitivity to clinically decisive local structures. We propose SonoCLIP, the first million-scale region-controllable fetal ultrasound vision-language foundation model that integrates segmentation masks as mask-channel visual prompts within the vision encoder, enabling joint global-local contrastive representation learning. To support scalable region-text alignment, we introduce a sigmoid-based pairwise contrastive loss that improves stability under large-scale supervision. We further curate a 1.44M-image multimodal fetal ultrasound dataset spanning 24 standard planes for large-scale pretraining. Extensive cross-center evaluations demonstrate that SonoCLIP achieves superior zero-shot transfer performance under both global and mask-guided inference, establishing a controllable and clinically oriented foundation model for fetal ultrasound analysis. Our code and data are available at https://github.com/Harrison-one/SonoCLIP.

AI.tldr: SonoCLIP是首个百万级区域可控的胎儿超声视觉-语言基础模型，通过掩码通道视觉提示和基于Sigmoid的成对对比损失实现全局-局部对比学习，在跨中心零样本迁移任务中表现优越。
AI.motivation: 现有超声基础模型主要依赖全局图像-文本对齐，对临床关键的局部解剖结构敏感性不足；超声影像本身存在严重的斑点噪声、采集变异性大和边界模糊等挑战，导致观察者间差异大。
AI.method: SonoCLIP在视觉编码器中引入分割掩码作为掩码通道视觉提示，实现全局-局部联合对比表示学习；提出基于Sigmoid的成对对比损失（Sigmoid-based pairwise contrastive loss），提升大规模监督下的训练稳定性；构建了包含144万张图像、涵盖24种标准平面的多模态胎儿超声数据集。
AI.result: 在跨中心评估中，SonoCLIP在全局推理和掩码引导推理两种模式下均取得了优越的零样本迁移性能，验证了其作为可控且面向临床的胎儿超声基础模型的有效性。
AI.conclusion: SonoCLIP通过区域可控的视觉-语言联合学习，显著提升了超声基础模型对局部解剖结构的敏感性，为超声影像分析提供了一种更具临床导向性的基础模型范式，代码与数据已公开。

title: Dynamo: Dynamic Skill-Tool Evolution for Vision-Language Agents
summary: Improving vision-language models (VLMs) on visual reasoning typically requires retraining or hand-designed prompts and tools. We present Dynamo, a training-free framework that adapts a frozen VLM without any weight updates. On a small labeled training subset, the agent inspects its own correct and incorrect attempts and evolves two complementary capabilities: reusable reasoning skills for cognitive bottlenecks, and executable visual tools for perceptual ones. Each generated tool is paired with a skill that specifies when to invoke it, and both capability types accumulate in a persistent library. Across four visual reasoning benchmarks and five VLM backbones, Dynamo improves direct inference on all 20 model--benchmark settings (avg. +5.6 acc). When the tool set is given in advance, the framework learns when to call each tool, and per-step tool choice improves on every tested backbone. Against task-specific RL (VTool-R1, DeepEyes), Dynamo closes 65--99% of the RL gap at a fraction of the compute, and combines additively with RL when available.

AI.tldr: Dynamo proposes一种无需训练的框架，通过让冻结的视觉语言模型在少量标注样本上自我检查正确与错误尝试，自主演化出可复用的推理技能和可执行的视觉工具，并积累在持久库中，在20个模型-基准组合上平均提升+5.6准确率，并以极低计算成本弥合了65-99%的强化学习性能差距。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型在视觉推理任务上的改进通常需要重新训练或手工设计提示和工具，缺乏一种无需权重更新即可自适应增强冻结VLM推理能力的通用框架。
