AI.method: Dynamo提出一个训练无关的框架：在少量标注训练子集上，冻结的VLM通过自我检查正确和错误的尝试，自主演化出两类互补能力——针对认知瓶颈的可复用推理技能和针对感知瓶颈的可执行视觉工具；每个工具与一个指定何时调用它的技能配对，两类能力持续积累在持久库中，框架还可学习在给定工具集时何时调用每个工具。
AI.result: 在四个视觉推理基准和五个VLM骨干上，Dynamo在所有20个模型-基准设置上均提升了直接推理效果（平均+5.6准确率）；在工具集预先给定的情况下，框架学习的每步工具选择在所有骨干上均有提升；与任务特定的RL方法（VTool-R1, DeepEyes）相比，Dynamo以极低计算成本弥合了65-99%的RL性能差距，并且可与RL叠加使用。
AI.conclusion: Dynamo证明了一种无需训练、无需权重更新的冻结VLM自适应演化框架在视觉推理任务上的有效性，其自主积累的推理技能和视觉工具库能够显著提升性能，且与强化学习互补，为构建可扩展的、计算高效的VLM推理增强方案提供了新方向。

title: Benchmarking Geospatial Foundation Models for Agriculture Applications
summary: Geospatial foundation models pretrained on satellite imagery promise broad generalization across remote sensing tasks and regions, but their geographic transferability has not been systematically tested, especially in agriculture applications. This paper presents a controlled benchmark that evaluates three models, Prithvi, SpectralGPT, and SatMAE, on multi-temporal crop segmentation and change detection across four U.S. states, Iowa, North Carolina, California, and Minnesota. By assigning each train, validation, and test split to a separate region, we measure how well each model transfers to land it has not seen. All three degrade sharply under regional distribution shift, predicting only the most common crops while missing rare ones. We further find that fitting these models to a shared input format affects each one differently, which complicates direct architectural comparison. These results expose key limitations of current geospatial foundation models for agriculture and point to region aware evaluation as a necessary standard.

AI.tldr: 该研究系统评估了三种地理空间基础模型（Prithvi、SpectralGPT、SatMAE）在农业多时相作物分割与变化检测任务中的地理迁移能力，发现所有模型在跨区域分布偏移下性能显著下降，仅能预测常见作物而漏检稀有作物，且输入格式对齐对不同模型的影响不一致，凸显了当前地理空间基础模型在农业应用中的关键局限性。
AI.motivation: 地理空间基础模型在遥感任务中展现出广泛泛化能力，但其在不同地理区域间的迁移性能，尤其是在农业应用场景中，尚未得到系统性的评估与验证，存在明显的研究空白。
AI.method: 作者构建了一个受控基准测试，将训练集、验证集和测试集分别分配给不同的美国州（爱荷华、北卡罗来纳、加利福尼亚、明尼苏达），以此来衡量Prithvi、SpectralGPT和SatMAE三种模型在多时相作物分割和变化检测任务上对未见区域的地理迁移能力。
AI.result: 三种模型在区域分布偏移下性能均急剧下降，只能准确预测最常见的作物类别，而遗漏了稀有作物；此外，将不同模型适配到统一的输入格式对各个模型产生了不一致的影响，使得直接的架构比较变得复杂。
AI.conclusion: 结果表明当前地理空间基础模型在农业应用中存在关键局限性，亟需将区域感知的评估标准作为模型性能评价的常规要求，以推动模型真正具备跨地理区域的泛化能力。

title: Domain Adaptation with Adaptive Imagination for Visual Reinforcement Learning under Limited Target Data
summary: Sim-to-real transfer remains a major obstacle for reinforcement learning (RL), especially for vision-based control where image observations exacerbate the state-distribution shift between simulation and the real world. Domain adaptation (DA) is a promising remedy for this challenge. Prior sim-to-real DA works have demonstrated encouraging results, yet these approaches typically assume substantially more target data, which is not available in practice. Indeed, their performance degrades significantly when the target data budget is reduced. To address this challenge, we propose AIDA (Adaptive Imagination for Domain Adaptation), a domain adaptation framework for visual reinforcement learning that addresses sim-to-real transfer under scarce target data without requiring additional interaction with the target environment. Our key idea is adaptive imagination: generating reliable and semantic imagination rollouts to augment limited target data. Specifically, AIDA employs a distribution-shift-aware discriminator that truncates rollouts when imagined transitions drift into low-confidence regions, so that only reliable transitions contribute to the augmentation. On these reliable transitions, AIDA introduces a self-consistency loss that cycles through state -> image observation -> state, penalizing discrepancies between the original and reconstructed states. This provides additional adaptation signals beyond the scarce target data. Our experiments demonstrate that adaptive imagination effectively truncates unreliable rollouts. By enforcing a self-consistency loss on the resulting reliable transitions, AIDA learns semantically meaningful state representations and outperforms baselines across five MuJoCo tasks and two Gymnasium-Robotics tasks.

AI.tldr: AIDA提出了一种面向视觉强化学习的域自适应框架，通过自适应想象（adaptive imagination）生成可靠的语义想象轨迹，以在目标域数据极其稀缺的条件下实现高效的sim-to-real迁移，并结合分布偏移感知判别器与自一致性损失提升状态表征质量。
AI.motivation: 现有sim-to-real域自适应方法在视觉强化学习中通常假设有大量目标域数据可用，但在实际场景中目标数据极其有限，导致其性能严重下降；因此需要一种能在目标域数据稀缺条件下仍能有效迁移的域自适应方法，且不依赖额外目标环境交互。
AI.method: AIDA框架的核心是adaptive imagination，通过一个分布偏移感知判别器来截断进入低置信区域的想象轨迹，仅保留可靠的语义想象数据用于数据增强；同时在可靠过渡上引入self-consistency loss，通过state -> image observation -> state的循环重建路径惩罚原始状态与重建状态之间的差异，从而在稀缺目标数据之外提供额外的自适应信号。
AI.result: 实验表明，adaptive imagination能有效截断不可靠的想象轨迹；通过在可靠过渡上施加自一致性损失，AIDA学习到语义有意义的state representation，并在五个MuJoCo任务和两个Gymnasium-Robotics任务中持续优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: AIDA通过自适应想象与自一致性损失相结合，在目标域数据极度匮乏条件下显著提升了视觉RL的sim-to-real迁移性能，证明了在低成本目标数据预算下仍可学习到语义有效的状态表征，为实际部署中数据稀缺的视觉RL迁移提供了可行路径。

title: Unlocking the Visual Record of Materials Science: A Large-Scale Multimodal Dataset from Scientific Literature
summary: The materials science literature encodes decades of experimental knowledge in figures, yet this visual record remains locked away and inaccessible to AI at scale. The core difficulty is structural: most scientific figures are compound, with a single caption describing multiple sub-panels simultaneously, making direct image-text pairing unreliable. We present MatMMExtract, an end-to-end open-source pipeline that resolves this by decomposing compound figures into individual sub-panels and generating structured, grounded annotations using a large language model guided by a curated materials science taxonomy. Applied to 14,810 open-access articles, MatMMExtract produces MatSciFig; 391,606 panel-level image-text pairs from 180,571 figures, each annotated with a sub-caption, a two-level visualisation category spanning 19 classes and over 100 subtypes, and a scientific summary. To enable accurate panel localisation, we introduce MaterialScope, a domain-specific detection dataset of 2,811 manually annotated materials science figures, on which a fine-tuned YOLO12-m detector achieves mAP_50 of 0.9227. Among six benchmarked language models, Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite delivers the best cost-quality trade-off for annotation generation, with 82% of outputs rated good and a hallucination rate of 4.8%. A dual-encoder retrieval baseline on MatSciFig achieves a 4.4 times improvement in R@1 over zero-shot CLIP, demonstrating the dataset's immediate utility for vision-language learning. All resources are released openly to the community.

AI.tldr: MatMMExtract是一个端到端开源管道，通过将复合科学图像分解为子面板并利用大语言模型结合材料科学分类法生成结构化注释，从14,810篇开放获取文章中构建了包含391,606个面板级图文对的MatSciFig数据集，有效解决了材料科学文献中复合图像难以被AI大规模利用的结构性难题。
AI.motivation: 材料科学文献中蕴含数十年实验知识的图像数据因结构性问题无法被AI大规模利用，其核心困难在于大多数科学图像是复合图像（单个图注描述多个子面板），导致直接的图文配对不可靠，亟需一种能够解构复合图像并生成结构化、可溯源注释的方法来释放这一视觉知识库的价值。
AI.method: 提出MatMMExtract开源管道，首先利用在MaterialScope（2,811张人工标注的材料科学图像检测数据集）上微调的YOLO12-m检测器实现复合图像中各个子面板的精准定位（mAP_50达0.9227），然后使用大语言模型（以Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite为最优选择，平衡成本与质量）结合人工策划的材料科学分类法，为每个子面板生成子标题、两级可视化类别（19个大类、100余个亚类）和科学摘要等结构化注释。
AI.result: MatMMExtract处理14,810篇开放获取文章，从180,571张复合图像中生成391,606个面板级图文对（MatSciFig数据集）；YOLO12-m在MaterialScope上达到mAP_50为0.9227的检测精度；六种基准语言模型中Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite取得最佳成本-质量权衡，82%的输出被评为良好，幻觉率仅4.8%；基于MatSciFig的双编码器检索基线在R@1上相比零样本CLIP提升4.4倍，证明了数据集在视觉-语言学习中的直接效用。
AI.conclusion: MatMMExtract通过复合图像分解与大语言模型引导注释生成，成功将材料科学文献中结构化的视觉知识释放为大规模、高质量的图文数据集MatSciFig，实验表明该数据集能显著提升视觉-语言模型的检索性能（R@1提升4.4倍），所有资源均已开源，为材料科学领域的AI驱动研究提供了关键基础设施。

title: Inoculation Adapters: Improved Selective Generalization of Capabilities with Fewer Surprising Backdoors
summary: Inoculation prompting is a selective generalization technique used against Emergent Misalignment. We introduce inoculation adapters (IA), which similarly diminish the optimization pressure to learn undesired traits by strengthening the trait at train time. Inoculation adapters are LoRAs that are trained and used over three steps: 1) trained on undesired traits; 2) attached frozen while a separate task adapter is trained on data exhibiting both desired and undesired traits; 3) at deployment, the IA is discarded, and only the task adapter is kept. We show across six model families and several undesired traits including emergent misalignment, that inoculation adapters are more effective at suppressing undesired traits, while avoiding two drawbacks of inoculation prompting: inoculation adapters can suppress capabilities and traits that cannot be reliably elicited by a prompt, and they introduce fewer surprising backdoors than inoculation prompting under our probes. While undesired traits are better suppressed by inoculation adapters, the retention of desired traits is not consistently improved upon inoculation prompting and remains a challenge for both techniques.

AI.tldr: 本文提出接种适配器（Inoculation Adapters, IA），一种基于LoRA的三阶段训练方法，通过在训练时强化不良特征来抑制其泛化，相比接种提示更有效地抑制不良特征且引入更少的后门，但两类方法在保留期望特征方面仍面临挑战。
AI.motivation: 接种提示（Inoculation Prompting）作为一种选择性泛化技术可抑制不良特征，但存在两个关键局限：一是无法抑制那些不能通过提示可靠诱发的不良特征，二是可能引入意外后门。本文旨在设计一种替代方法，在保持抑制效果的同时规避这些缺陷。
AI.method: 本文提出接种适配器（IA），一种基于LoRA的三阶段方法：阶段1，在不良特征数据上训练一个IA LoRA；阶段2，冻结该IA，同时训练另一个任务适配器于同时包含期望和不良特征的数据上；阶段3，部署时丢弃IA，仅保留任务适配器。该方法通过在训练时强化不良特征来降低模型学习该特征的优化压力。
AI.result: 在六个模型家族及多种不良特征（包括紧急错配）上的实验表明，接种适配器在抑制不良特征方面优于接种提示，并且引入的后门更少。然而，在保留期望特征方面，接种适配器并未持续优于接种提示，两类方法在该维度上仍有挑战。
AI.conclusion: 接种适配器为抑制模型不良特征提供了一种比接种提示更有效且后门更少的方法，特别适用于那些无法通过提示诱发的不良特征场景。但期望特征的保留仍是两类方法的共同瓶颈，需要进一步研究。

title: Progressive Self-Supervised Learning with Individualized Community Assignment for Brain Network Analysis
summary: Brain networks exhibit a modular community structure that varies across individuals and neurological conditions. However, existing self-supervised learning (SSL) methods often overlook this heterogeneity, relying on generic masking strategies that fail to capture subject-specific functional organization. We propose BrainPICM, a self-supervised framework for brain network analysis via progressive individualized community aware masking. BrainPICM formulates ROI-to-community mapping as a progressive unbalanced optimal transport process, yielding soft assignments and per-ROI confidence scores. Guided by these confidence estimates, a curriculum-style masking strategy gradually incorporates low-confidence, potentially pathological regions into training, enabling the model to learn both stable modular structures and individual variations. Additionally, a deviation-aware aggregation module quantifies functional reorganization by measuring mass redistribution relative to a population template, enhancing interpretability and downstream prediction. Experiments on three fMRI datasets (ABIDE-I, ADHD-200, ADNI) show that BrainPICM consistently outperforms state-of-the-art supervised and SSL methods in diagnostic accuracy, indicating that explicitly injecting modular community structure into masked modeling yields more functionally consistent and generalizable representations. The source code for this approach will be released at https://github.com/Hrychen7/BrainPICM.

AI.tldr: BrainPICM提出了一种基于渐进式个体化社区感知掩码的自监督学习框架，通过将ROI-社区映射建模为渐进非平衡最优传输过程并引入课程式掩码策略，显式地将模块化社区结构注入掩码建模，在三个fMRI数据集上实现了优于现有监督和自监督方法的诊断性能。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督学习方法在处理脑网络分析时通常采用通用的随机掩码策略，忽略了个体间和疾病状态下的脑网络模块化社区结构异质性，导致模型无法捕捉被试特异性的功能组织模式，限制了学到的表征在诊断任务中的泛化性和功能一致性。
AI.method: BrainPICM将ROI到社区的映射建模为渐进非平衡最优传输过程，生成软分配和每个ROI的置信度分数；基于置信度估计，采用课程式掩码策略逐步将低置信度（潜在病理区域）纳入训练；同时设计偏差感知聚合模块，通过量化相对于群体模板的质量重分布来评估功能重组，增强下游任务的可解释性和预测能力。
AI.result: 在ABIDE-I、ADHD-200和ADNI三个fMRI数据集上的实验表明，BrainPICM在诊断准确率上一致性地优于当前最先进的监督学习和自监督学习方法，证明显式注入模块化社区结构的掩码建模能够生成功能上更一致且泛化性更强的脑网络表征。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了将模块化社区结构先验显式融入自监督掩码建模的有效性，为脑网络分析中应对个体异质性和病理变异提供了新范式；偏差感知聚合模块还提升了模型的可解释性，有助于识别与疾病相关的功能重组模式。

title: PromptGNN-sim: Deep Fusion and Alignment of GNN and LLMs for Text-Attributed Graph Learning
summary: Text-Attributed Graphs (TAGs) combine textual semantics with graph structure and are central to many graph learning tasks. However, existing fusion methods often treat text and structure as separate inputs in a shallow, one-way pipeline, which limits deep interaction between modalities and weakens performance under sparse connectivity or cross-graph generalisation. To address this issue, we propose PromptGNN-sim, a bi-directional structure-semantic fusion framework for collaborative GNN-LLM learning. PromptGNN-sim uses a Graph Attention Network (GAT) for semantically aware neighborhood selection by combining structural attention with textual similarity. The selected structural context is then used to generate structure-aware prompts for an LLM, including the target node summary, label categories, and representative keywords from similar neighbors. During training, bi-directional cross-modal contrastive learning and cross-attention are introduced to jointly optimize the GNN and LLM components. Experiments on six public datasets, including Cora, Pubmed, and WikiCS, evaluate accuracy, generalisation, and robustness under cross-task transfer, cross-dataset generalisation, and sparse perturbations. Results show that PromptGNN-sim outperforms classical GNNs, LLMs, and recent GNN-LLM fusion methods, demonstrating the effectiveness of interactive structure-semantic collaboration for text-attributed graph learning.

AI.tldr: PromptGNN-sim 提出了一种双向结构-语义融合框架，通过 GAT 的语义感知邻居选择与结构感知提示生成，结合双向跨模态对比学习和交叉注意力机制，实现了 GNN 与 LLM 的协同优化，在多个 TAG 数据集上显著提升了准确率、泛化能力和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有文本属性图（TAG）的融合方法通常将文本和结构作为独立输入，采用浅层单向流水线，导致模态间缺乏深度交互，在稀疏连接或跨图泛化场景下性能显著下降。
AI.method: PromptGNN-sim 采用 GAT 结合结构注意力与文本相似度进行语义感知的邻域选择；利用所选结构上下文为目标节点生成结构感知提示（包含节点摘要、标签类别及相似邻居关键词）；在训练中引入双向跨模态对比学习和交叉注意力机制，联合优化 GNN 和 LLM 组件。
AI.result: 在 Cora、Pubmed、WikiCS 等六个公开数据集上进行的跨任务迁移、跨数据集泛化和稀疏扰动实验表明，PromptGNN-sim 在准确率、泛化能力和鲁棒性上均优于经典 GNN、LLM 以及近期的 GNN-LLM 融合方法。
AI.conclusion: 交互式结构-语义协同能有效提升文本属性图学习性能，验证了双向融合范式在 TAG 任务中的优越性，为 GNN 与 LLM 的深度协作提供了新路径。

title: Early Warning Signals for OpenVLA Failure under Visual Distribution Shift
summary: Vision Language Action models combine perception, language grounding, and control in a single policy, but their failures are hard to diagnose once visual conditions shift. We test whether OpenVLA feedforward activations contain linearly decodable information about near term task failure in LIBERO manipulation rollouts. The policy is fixed throughout. We log internal activations during execution and fit lightweight monitors after the rollouts are collected. Occlusion is the main controlled stress test. It reduces OpenVLA success from $57\%$ to $17\%$ over $100$ episodes per condition. Under this shift, a logistic probe at layer 16 reaches AUROC $0.972$ and AUPRC $0.352$ for predicting failure within a $15$ step horizon. It outperforms both a mean difference direction and an action disagreement baseline. A sparse layer sweep finds uneven decodability across depth: layer 16 is strongest among the tested layers, layer 8 remains informative, and layer 10 is weaker. To check whether the monitor is just an occlusion detector, we also evaluate color shift and camera jitter without refitting. Color shift produces no failures in this setting, so it is a benign control rather than a failure benchmark. Camera jitter does induce failures, and the occlusion trained monitor remains above random. The result is deliberately limited: OpenVLA internal states contain failure relevant structure under controlled perceptual shift, but these experiments do not establish a causal mechanism, task held out generalization, or a deployable recovery system.

AI.tldr: 本文验证了在视觉条件偏移（如遮挡）下，OpenVLA前馈激活中线性可解码的失败预测信息：在LIBERO操作任务中，基于层16激活的逻辑回归探针在15步预测范围内达到AUROC 0.972，显著优于基线方法，但实验仅限于受控设置，未建立因果机制或泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 视觉-语言-动作模型将感知、语言理解与控制集成于单一策略中，但视觉条件变化时其失败模式难以诊断，亟需一种无需重训模型即可在线预测任务失败的方法。
AI.method: 固定OpenVLA策略在LIBERO操作场景中执行，记录各层前馈激活；离线采集数据后，在特定层（如层16）上训练轻量二分类逻辑回归探针，以15步为预测窗口预测任务失败；对比均值差异方向和动作不一致基线；在遮挡、颜色偏移和相机抖动三种视觉偏移下进行评估。
AI.result: 遮挡条件下OpenVLA成功率从57%降至17%；层16的逻辑探针达到AUROC 0.972、AUPRC 0.352，优于基线。层间扫描显示解码能力不均匀：层16最强，层8次之，层10较弱。颜色偏移未引发失败，作为良性对照；相机抖动引发失败，遮挡训练探针仍优于随机。
AI.conclusion: OpenVLA内部状态在受控感知偏移下包含与失败相关的可解码结构，但实验未建立因果机制、未验证跨任务泛化，也未实现可部署的恢复系统，结论具有明确局限性。

title: Rehearsed Multi-Agent Live Product Demonstrations with Real-Time Voice Question Answering
comment: Preprint. 4 figures, 1 algorithm, 5 tables. Systems paper with a preliminary six-session case study on four deployed applications; full benchmark protocol proposed, corpus run to appear in a later revision
summary: Live product demonstrations are a recurring, high-cost activity in software organizations: a human presenter must select features, dispatch the corresponding interactions on a running application, narrate them coherently, and answer questions in real time. Existing automation addresses only fragments -- generalist browser agents target instruction-conditioned task completion, and demo-video tools produce fixed MP4 artifacts that cannot be questioned and silently break under interface drift. We propose Rhetor, a multi-agent system that takes a running web application and its source-code repository as input and produces a rehearsed live demonstration with segment-synchronized narration and real-time voice question answering. The architectural contributions are a cross-modal feature representation that merges UI exploration with source-code analysis into features tagged with discrete focus tiers, a grounded scripter constrained to UI elements observed during exploration and dispatched through multi-strategy semantic locators, a pre-presentation rehearsal loop with explicit convergence and graceful degradation to narration-only segments, and a runtime synchronization invariant that ties each browser action to the audio-end event of its narration segment. Across six pipeline sessions on four deployed applications -- including the public-domain whiteboard application Excalidraw -- the rehearser's internal locator-firing rate (sigma-bar) spans 0.31-1.00 over 147 scripted actions; on the substantial workload (53 actions, full tier differentiation), sigma-bar is approximately 0.92, and on the public-domain reference point the locator-repair step drives convergence to sigma-bar = 1.00 at iteration 2. We additionally define a benchmark protocol of ten metrics across six application categories that would establish, beyond the case study, whether each design choice contributes positively.

AI.tldr: Rhetor是一个多智能体系统，能够从运行的Web应用及其源码仓库中自动生成带有分段同步解说和实时语音问答的排练式现场演示，通过跨模态特征表示、基于语义定位器的grounded脚本生成、预演收敛循环以及运行时同步不变性等设计，解决了现有演示自动化工具碎片化、无法交互且难以应对界面漂移的问题。
AI.motivation: 软件组织中的现场产品演示成本高昂，要求演示者人工选择功能、操作应用、连贯叙述并实时回答问题；现有自动化方案要么是面向指令任务完成的通用浏览器智能体，要么是生成固定MP4视频的工具，这些方案不仅功能碎片化、无法被提问，而且在界面发生漂移时会静默失效，缺乏一个能够端到端地生成可交互、可问答且对界面变化具有鲁棒性的直播级演示系统。
AI.method: Rhetor是一个多智能体系统，其核心架构包含以下创新：一种跨模态特征表示，将UI探索与源代码分析合并为带有离散关注层级标签的特征；一种受限于探索阶段观察到的UI元素、通过多策略语义定位器进行分发的grounded脚本生成器；一个预演收敛循环，提供显式的收敛判据并在无法定位时优雅降级为纯解说段；以及一个运行时同步不变量，将每个浏览器动作严格绑定到其对应解说段的音频结束事件上。
AI.result: 在四个已部署应用（包括公域白板应用Excalidraw）上的六次管线会话实验中，预演器内部的定位器触发率（sigma-bar）在147个脚本化动作上覆盖0.31–1.00的范围；在包含53个动作、完整层级区分的大规模工作负载下，sigma-bar约为0.92；在公域参考点上，定位器修复步骤在第二次迭代时驱动收敛至sigma-bar=1.00。此外，论文还定义了一个涵盖六个应用类别、十项指标的基准协议，以系统性地验证各设计选择的贡献。
AI.conclusion: Rhetor通过多智能体协作和一系列精巧的同步与容错设计，首次实现了从Web应用到带实时语音问答的现场演示的端到端自动化，其预演收敛机制和语义定位器修复策略在界面漂移场景下展现了良好的鲁棒性；论文提出的十项指标基准协议为后续研究提供了可量化的评估框架，但当前实验仍以案例研究为主，更大规模的应用验证是未来的重要方向。

title: UniVAD v2: Unified Visual Anomaly Detection via Support-Conditioned Boundary Construction
summary: Unified visual anomaly detection seeks to train a single detector that can be deployed across categories, domains, and application scenarios. In the few-shot transfer regime, the key challenge is to estimate an episode-specific boundary for an unseen target category from a small support set. Existing approaches mainly infer this boundary from normal-side evidence and provide limited abnormal-side evidence for deployment-specific tolerance. Within the normal side, they often struggle to jointly capture local correspondences and global support-query relations, making their boundaries less reliable for unseen anomalies. To address these issues, we propose UniVAD v2, a two-sided support-conditioned boundary construction framework for unified visual anomaly detection. Built on the component-patch divide-and-conquer framework of UniVAD, UniVAD v2 strengthens the normal side with an Optimal Transport-based Relational Modeling module (OTRM), which complements retrieval with support-query matching through transport-style allocation, and an Adaptive Coordination mechanism for Retrieval and Relational Modeling (ACRRM), which estimates episode-conditioned reliabilities to fuse the two sources of evidence. On the abnormal side, a Few-Shot Abnormal Reference module (FAR) converts optional abnormal references into rejection-side evidence for boundary adjustment. Experiments on six datasets spanning industrial, logical, and medical anomaly detection demonstrate strong cross-domain generalization. Under the 1N-shot protocol, UniVAD v2 improves the mean image-level AUC over UniVAD from 83.0\% to 84.5\%, and further reaches 85.7\% in the 1N+1A-shot setting. On the MVTec-AD Severity Split (MVTec-AD-SS), UniVAD v2 achieves 96.2\% image-level AUC and 96.9\% pixel-level AUC, showing that abnormal references enable controllable boundary customization without retraining.

AI.tldr: UniVAD v2提出一种双端支持条件边界构建框架，通过最优传输关系建模、检索与关系建模的自适应协调机制以及少样本异常参考模块，显著提升了统一视觉异常检测在跨域少样本迁移场景下的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有统一视觉异常检测方法在少样本迁移场景下的关键挑战是，从少量支持集中为未见目标类别估计每个episode特定的决策边界，但现有方法主要依赖正常侧证据构建边界，缺乏部署场景所需的异常侧容错能力；同时在正常侧内部，它们难以联合捕捉局部对应关系与全局支持-查询关系，导致对未见异常的边界可靠性不足。
AI.method: UniVAD v2基于UniVAD的组件-分块分治框架，在正常侧引入基于最优传输的关系建模模块（OTRM），通过传输式分配补全检索过程以支持支持集与查询集匹配；同时提出检索与关系建模的自适应协调机制（ACRRM），估计每个episode条件下的可靠性以融合两类证据；在异常侧提出少样本异常参考模块（FAR），将可选的异常参考样本转换为拒绝侧证据以进行边界调整。
AI.result: 在六个覆盖工业、逻辑和医学异常检测的数据集上，UniVAD v2在1N-shot协议下将平均图像级AUC从UniVAD的83.0%提升至84.5%，在1N+1A-shot设置下进一步达到85.7%；在MVTec-AD Severity Split（MVTec-AD-SS）上，UniVAD v2达到96.2%图像级AUC和96.9%像素级AUC，表明异常参考使边界可在不重训练的情况下进行可控定制。
AI.conclusion: UniVAD v2通过双端支持条件边界构建，在统一异常检测中同时利用正常侧和异常侧证据，有效提升了跨域少样本迁移的泛化能力和边界可控性，验证了异常参考在无需重训练的前提下可实现对决策边界的灵活定制，为部署场景下的异常检测提供了更实用的解决方案。

title: ManimAgent: Self-Evolving Multimodal Agents for Visual Education
summary: Multi-round reflection lets agents built on large language models recover from failures within a single task, but each task remains an isolated episode: lessons learned across many reflection rounds on one task are discarded before the next begins. We study this gap on a code-generation task: from a scientific paper section, the agent writes Python in the open-source Manim library to render a mathematical animation. We present ManimAgent, a self-evolving multimodal agent that carries reflection experience across tasks through a dual-channel Episodic Memory Bank grown entirely from its own task stream, with no weight updates and no human seeds. After each animation converges, a vision-language model scores the rendered keyframes; the resulting signals populate a positive channel M+ that stores success rationales as soft Reference Examples, and a negative channel M- that stores validated failure patterns as hard Known Pitfalls. On a fixed-probe evaluation against no-memory, matched-budget retrieval-augmented generation, and shuffled-memory baselines, blind human Pass@1 rises and reflection rounds fall as memory size grows. We will release the code, frozen memory snapshots, and the task stream.

AI.tldr: ManimAgent通过双通道情景记忆库（M+和M-）将多轮反思经验跨任务传递，在无需权重更新或人工种子的情况下，使基于LLM的代码生成代理在数学动画渲染任务中持续自我进化，实验表明该方法在盲测Pass@1上提升并减少了反思轮数。
AI.motivation: 现有基于大语言模型的多轮反思代理虽然能在一个任务内通过反思恢复失败，但每个任务仍是孤立的片段——从一个任务的多轮反思中积累的经验在下一个任务开始前被丢弃，缺乏跨任务的经验传递机制，限制了代理的持续改进能力。
AI.method: 提出ManimAgent，一种自进化多模态代理，通过双通道情景记忆库（Episodic Memory Bank）在任务间传递反思经验，无需权重更新或人工种子。该记忆库完全由代理自身的任务流生长而成：视觉-语言模型对渲染后的关键帧评分，正面通道M+存储成功推理作为软参考示例，负面通道M-存储验证过的失败模式作为硬已知陷阱。
AI.result: 在固定探针评估中，与无记忆、匹配预算的检索增强生成和打乱记忆基线相比，随着记忆规模增长，盲测人类Pass@1持续上升，而反思轮数持续下降，表明跨任务经验积累有效提升了代码生成质量与效率。
AI.conclusion: ManimAgent证明了通过纯经验驱动的跨任务情景记忆机制，无需模型微调即可实现代理的持续自我进化，为构建能在实际工作流中不断积累和复用经验的智能代理系统提供了可行路径。

title: HTC-SGA Former: A Hybrid Transformer-CNN Network with Self-Guided Attention and a New Boundary-Weighted Adaptive Loss for Coronary DSA Vessel Segmentation
comment: 20 pages, 10 figures, 3 tables. Submitted for journal review
summary: Accurate coronary Digital Subtraction Angiography (DSA) vessel segmentation is essential for computer-aided diagnosis and treatment planning of coronary artery disease (CAD). However, thin low-contrast vessels, background interference, and severe vessel-background class imbalance make reliable segmentation of weak distal branches and vessel boundaries challenging. Existing methods struggle to balance global contextual reasoning with preservation of weak vessels, vessel continuity, and fine boundaries. To address these limitations, we propose HTC-SGA Former, a lightweight hybrid Transformer-CNN framework for coronary DSA vessel segmentation. It employs a CNN encoder for local vessel morphology extraction and a Transformer decoder for contextual feature modeling. A Multi-Scale Global-Local Window Attention (MS-GLWA) block performs efficient global-local contextual modeling, while a Self-Guided Feature Attention (SGFA) module enhances weak-vessel responses. In addition, a Boundary-Weighted Adaptive Compound Loss (BWACL) emphasizes thin-vessel boundaries and adaptively balances vessel recovery and boundary refinement. Experiments on private right and left coronary artery DSA subsets show that HTC-SGA Former outperforms 14 state-of-the-art segmentation methods while maintaining a compact architecture with only 0.81M parameters. BWACL also improves performance over binary cross-entropy and Dice losses across four encoder-decoder architectures, demonstrating strong cross-backbone applicability. HTC-SGA Former improves thin-vessel recovery, vessel continuity, and boundary localization through complementary global-local contextual modeling, vessel-focused refinement, and adaptive optimization, supporting reliable and computationally efficient coronary vessel analysis for future computer-assisted cardiovascular interventions.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种轻量级混合Transformer-CNN框架HTC-SGA Former，通过多尺度全局-局部窗口注意力、自引导特征注意力和边界加权自适应复合损失，有效解决了冠状动脉DSA图像中弱血管分割和边界定位难题，在仅0.81M参数下超越了14种SOTA方法。
AI.motivation: 冠状动脉DSA图像中薄壁低对比度血管、背景干扰以及严重的血管-背景类别不平衡，导致现有方法难以同时兼顾全局上下文推理与弱血管、血管连续性和精细边界的保持，亟需一种轻量且高效的分割框架来解决这一核心矛盾。
AI.method: 提出HTC-SGA Former，一种轻量级混合Transformer-CNN架构：采用CNN编码器提取局部血管形态，Transformer解码器建模上下文特征；设计多尺度全局-局部窗口注意力（MS-GLWA）实现高效全局-局部上下文建模，自引导特征注意力（SGFA）增强弱血管响应，并引入边界加权自适应复合损失（BWACL）强调薄血管边界并自适应平衡血管恢复与边界细化。
AI.result: 在私有左右冠状动脉DSA数据集上，HTC-SGA Former以仅0.81M参数超越14种SOTA分割方法；BWACL在四种编码器-解码器架构上均优于二元交叉熵和Dice损失，展现了强跨骨干网络适用性，显著提升了薄血管恢复、血管连续性和边界定位性能。
AI.conclusion: HTC-SGA Former通过互补的全局-局部上下文建模、血管聚焦优化和自适应损失函数，实现了可靠且计算高效的冠状动脉DSA血管分割，为未来计算机辅助心血管介入治疗提供了有力支撑。

title: Whose Side Is Your Agent On? Multi-Party Principal Loyalty in LLM Agents
summary: A rapidly growing class of LLM agents is multi-party: the agent acts for a principal (who briefs it, sends follow-ups, and receives results) while also conversing in a separate channel with a counterparty whose interests may diverge (negotiating with a vendor, screening inbound requests, or mediating between employees). Here "help whoever you are talking to" is the wrong objective. The agent must stay loyal to the principal it represents without over-refusing the principal's own cooperative asks. We study this multi-party loyalty problem and contribute a measurement instrument, two mechanisms, and a structural lesson. PrincipalBench is a 75-item multi-turn benchmark with leak probes, dual judges, and an integrity-audit gate. Across 13 frontier subjects it exposes a sharp split (<=20% vs. 53.6-75.3% harm) invisible to single-turn safety evaluations: a selective cluster that declines adversarial probes while still following the principal's legitimate requests, and an over-refusing cluster that refuses broadly. (M1) A prompt-time loyalty scaffold (a fixed system prompt of seven prioritized rules, open-coded from 50+ failure trajectories) holds Claude-Sonnet to 19.4% harm and all nine selective subjects to <=20%. (M2) A per-token-KL distillation recipe transfers a prompted Qwen3-32B teacher into 8B Qwen3 and Llama-3.1 students, the strongest open-weight recipe we measure. (Lesson) Both mechanisms only move along a common leak/over-refusal trade-off rather than crossing it: improving one axis costs the other, and the jointly favorable outcome stays out of reach.

AI.tldr: 本文研究多智能体场景下的忠诚度问题，提出了PrincipalBench基准测试、两种缓解机制（提示时忠诚脚手架和逐token KL蒸馏），并揭示了泄露与过度拒绝之间的内生权衡：改善一个指标必然牺牲另一个，联合最优解目前无法实现。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM智能体通常遵循"帮助正在交谈的人"这一目标，但在多方对话场景中，智能体需同时服务于委托方（principal）和可能利益冲突的另一方（counterparty），存在对委托方不忠或过度拒绝其合法请求的风险，而传统单轮安全评估无法暴露这一核心矛盾。
AI.method: 构建PrincipalBench基准（75项多轮测试，包含泄露探针、双重评审和完整性审计门）；提出两种机制：M1为提示时忠诚脚手架（7条优先级规则的固定系统提示，从50+失败轨迹开放编码得到），M2为逐token KL蒸馏配方（将经过提示的Qwen3-32B教师蒸馏至8B Qwen3和Llama-3.1学生模型）。
AI.result: 在13个前沿模型上，PrincipalBench揭示了单轮安全评估中不可见的尖锐分裂：存在选择性拒绝集群（伤害率≤20%）和过度拒绝集群（伤害率53.6-75.3%）；M1将Claude-Sonnet降至19.4%伤害并维持9个选择性模型≤20%；M2蒸馏得到最强开源模型；但两种机制均无法突破泄露/过度拒绝的权衡曲线。
AI.conclusion: 多方忠诚问题存在不可调和的内生权衡——降低泄露（leak）必然增加过度拒绝（over-refusal），反之亦然，联合有利状态目前无法达到，为未来多智能体忠诚度研究指明了根本性挑战。

title: Concept Removal Guidance: Evidence-Calibrated Negative Guidance for Safe Diffusion Sampling
summary: Text-to-image diffusion models remain vulnerable to adversarial prompts that elicit disallowed content, motivating reliable inference-time controls. A popular approach is negative guidance, which subtracts a negative prompt direction with a fixed weight. However, it often forces a safety-fidelity trade-off, causing artifacts or prompt drift when over-applied and failing under attacks when under-applied. Dynamic variants reweight guidance using posterior-odds signals, which can be brittle for open-vocabulary compositional prompts, while lightweight similarity-based methods ignore the evolving image evidence along the denoising trajectory. We introduce Concept Removal Guidance (CRG), a training-free method that estimates unwanted-concept presence at each diffusion step from the model's noise predictions, and adaptively calibrates negative guidance via a closed-form constrained update enforcing a target presence threshold while minimally perturbing the conditional trajectory. Across red-teaming benchmarks, CRG reduces attack success rates while preserving benign fidelity, and extends to additional suppression targets such as artist style and violence without fine-tuning or external classifiers.

AI.tldr: 提出Concept Removal Guidance (CRG)，一种无需训练的自适应负引导方法，通过在扩散每一步从噪声预测中估计不想要概念的存在，并通过约束优化动态校准引导强度，在不破坏生成保真度的前提下有效抑制攻击内容。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到图像扩散模型的负面引导方法在安全性与保真度之间存在根本性权衡：固定权重的负引导在过度使用时导致伪影和提示漂移，在不足使用时无法抵御攻击；动态变体重加权依赖后验几率信号，对于开放词汇的组合提示鲁棒性差；轻量级基于相似度的方法忽略了去噪轨迹中不断演化的图像证据。
AI.method: CRG是一种无需训练的推理时控制方法，它利用扩散模型每一步的噪声预测来估计当前生成图像中不想要概念的存在强度，然后通过一个闭式约束优化更新来动态校准负引导的幅度，该优化在强制目标概念存在阈值的同时最小化对条件轨迹的扰动，从而实现对负面引导的自适应调节。
AI.result: 在多个红队攻击基准测试上，CRG在显著降低攻击成功率的同时，保持了对良性输入的保真度；该方法还能扩展到其他抑制目标，如艺术家风格和暴力内容，无需额外微调或外部分类器。
AI.conclusion: CRG通过基于噪声预测的自适应约束优化，有效缓解了安全性与保真度之间的权衡，是一种通用、无需训练且可扩展至多种概念抑制任务的推理时安全控制方法，为扩散模型的可信部署提供了实用方案。

title: Entity Binding Failures in Tool-Augmented Agents
summary: Tool-augmented language-model agents are often evaluated by whether they select the correct tool, produce valid API arguments, and complete the requested task. However, an agent may choose the right tool and still act on the wrong external entity. For example, a request to "email Alex about the launch" may lead the agent to contact the wrong Alex, attach the wrong launch document, reply in the wrong thread, or update the wrong customer account. We call these errors entity binding failures. This paper studies entity binding failures as a distinct reliability and safety problem in tool-augmented agents. We formalize the separation between tool correctness and entity correctness, introduce a taxonomy of wrong-entity failures in enterprise workflows, and evaluate entity-aware execution mechanisms including entity-resolution preconditions, confidence-gated binding, clarification under ambiguity, and provenance tracking. In a controlled diagnostic evaluation across 60 tasks, five model backends, and six tool-use methods, all methods achieved 0.0 percent wrong-tool error, yet action-oriented baselines still produced wrong-entity actions in 24.0-26.0 percent of runs. Entity-aware methods eliminated wrong-entity actions and risk-weighted wrong-entity exposure in this setting, but reduced direct task completion by deferring under ambiguity. These findings show that safe tool use requires not only selecting the correct tool, but also reliably binding natural-language references to the correct real-world entity before action.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究工具增强型语言模型中的实体绑定失败问题，提出错误实体分类体系与实体感知执行机制，实验表明传统方法虽可完全避免选错工具但仍存在显著实体级错误，而实体感知方法可消除此类错误但会因歧义性延迟降低任务完成率。
AI.motivation: 现有工具增强型语言模型评估主要关注工具选择正确性与API参数有效性，忽略了代理虽选对工具但作用到错误外部实体（如发错联系人、更新错账户）的问题，即实体绑定失败。本文旨在将实体绑定失败确立为LMs可靠性与安全性的独立研究问题，并系统评估现有方法在实体层级上的表现。
AI.method: 本文形式化定义了工具正确性与实体正确性之间的分离，提出企业工作流中错误实体失败的分类体系，并评估了多种实体感知执行机制，包括实体解析前置条件、置信度门控绑定、歧义下澄清机制以及溯源追踪。实验在60个任务、5个模型后端和6种工具使用方法上进行诊断性评估。
AI.result: 所有方法在任务中的错误工具率为0.0%，但基于动作的基线方法仍有24.0%-26.0%的运行出现错误实体动作。实体感知方法完全消除了错误实体动作和风险加权的错误实体暴露，但由于在歧义情况下延迟而降低了直接任务完成率。
AI.conclusion: 安全可靠的工具使用不仅需要选择正确的工具，还需要在采取行动之前将自然语言引用可靠地绑定到正确的现实世界实体。实体绑定失败应作为独立的可靠性维度进行专门评估和处理，而实体感知机制在消除此类错误方面有效，但需要在完成率与安全性之间进行权衡。

title: See Only When Needed: Context-Aware Attention Intervention for Mitigating Hallucinations in LVLMs
summary: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) excel at multimodal tasks but remain prone to object hallucinations. Prior training-free remedies often uniformly strengthen visual signals, which may also amplify irrelevant regions and introduce spurious evidence, harming fluency. We propose Context-aware Attention Intervention (CAI), a training-free inference-time mechanism that enforces a see only when needed principle via two-axis selectivity: where to look and when to intervene. At each decoding step, CAI derives token-specific visual relevance from early-layer representations to localize semantically aligned regions, and applies a conservative, entropy- and depth-gated attention tilt only for uncertainty-spiking tokens in deeper layers where visual grounding degrades, leaving confident tokens and irrelevant regions largely unchanged. This targeted intervention strengthens visual grounding while preserving linguistic fluency, and it yields consistent improvements even without contrastive decoding, which remains optional as an auxiliary bias-suppression module. Extensive experiments across multiple LVLM backbones and benchmarks show that CAI achieves state-of-the-art hallucination mitigation, and our analysis characterizes CAI as a KL-minimal attention reweighting with bounded interference under inactive gates or small tilts. Code is available at https://github.com/Iris1946/CAI.

AI.tldr: 提出上下文感知注意力干预（CAI），一种无需训练的推理时机制，通过两轴选择（看哪里和何时干预）在解码步骤中按需增强视觉 grounding，在不影响语言流畅性的前提下显著缓解 LVLM 的对象幻觉，达到 SOTA 效果。
AI.motivation: 大型视觉语言模型在多模态任务中表现优异，但仍易产生对象幻觉。现有无训练缓解方法通常统一增强视觉信号，这可能会放大无关区域并引入虚假证据，损害生成流畅性，亟需一种更精细、上下文感知的幻觉缓解策略。
AI.method: 提出 Context-aware Attention Intervention (CAI)，一种无需训练、推理时干预机制。CAI 基于"只有在需要时才看"的原则实现两轴选择性：从早期层表征中提取 token 特定的视觉相关性以定位语义对齐区域（where to look），仅在晚期层中不确定性突增的 token 上应用保守的、基于熵和深度的门控注意力倾斜（when to intervene），而保留置信 token 与非相关区域不变；对比解码作为可选辅助模块。
AI.result: 在多个 LVLM 主干网络和基准上的大量实验表明，CAI 在幻觉缓解方面达到最先进水平。分析表明 CAI 可被刻画为一种 KL 最小化的注意力重加权，在非激活门控或小倾斜条件下具有有界干扰。
AI.conclusion: CAI 通过按需、细粒度的注意力干预在增强视觉 grounding 与保持语言流畅性之间取得有效平衡，即使没有对比解码也能取得一致改进，为 LVLM 幻觉缓解提供了一种轻量、可解释且高效的推理时方案。

title: Linguistic Firewall: Geometry as Defense in Multi-Agent Systems Routing
comment: 8 pages (9 more for appendix), 3 figures. Published at the Second Workshop on Agents in the Wild: Safety, Security, and Beyond (AIWILD) at ICML 2026
summary: The rapid integration of Large Language Models (LLMs) has driven the evolution of Multi-Agent Systems (MAS), where specialized agents collaborate to execute complex workflows. Effective orchestration in these environments requires robust routing mechanisms to efficiently allocate tasks to the most suitable agent. However, existing routers fundamentally rely on unverified proxies, ranging from textual self-descriptions to static surrogate representations, to gauge an agent's competence. This reliance on non-empirical data creates a critical gap between an agent's projected profile and its actual operational capabilities, introducing severe security vulnerabilities. Malicious agents can easily misrepresent their proficiencies or harbor covert backdoors that evade both standard external analysis and static representation-learning techniques. In this work, we introduce ANTAP (Automatic Non-Textual Agent Picker), an evaluation-driven routing architecture that discards indirect proxies in favor of active capability testing. By dynamically querying agents to ascertain their true competencies empirically, ANTAP distills performance into fixed behavioral operators within a shared semantic space. At inference time, routing is performed via a purely non-textual algebraic projection, establishing a "linguistic firewall" that renders metadata-based attacks inexpressible. In our experiments, ANTAP achieves near-zero ASR against description-based injection attacks, compared to 67.3\% and above for the description-based router baseline. Against adaptive embedding attacks, ANTAP achieves substantially lower ASR than the embedding-based baseline, with a 20\% reduction, while remaining resilient to description manipulation by design.

AI.tldr: ANTAP提出了一种基于主动能力测试的非文本路由架构，通过动态查询智能体将其真实能力蒸馏为固定行为算子，并在推理时使用纯非文本代数投影进行路由选择，从而消除基于元数据的攻击向量，有效防御恶意智能体的能力伪装和后门注入。
AI.motivation: 现有多智能体系统中的路由机制依赖文本自描述或静态表示等未经验证的代理信息来评估智能体能力，导致智能体的声称画像与其实际能力之间存在严重鸿沟，恶意智能体可轻易伪装能力或隐藏后门，且传统外部分析和静态表示学习技术无法有效检测这类攻击。
AI.method: ANTAP采用评估驱动的路由架构，通过动态查询智能体执行任务并基于实际表现将其能力蒸馏为共享语义空间中的固定行为算子，推理时利用纯非文本代数投影进行路由选择，从而在系统与元数据之间建立"语言防火墙"，使得基于描述的注入攻击和基于嵌入的自适应攻击在数学上变得不可表达。
AI.result: 面对基于描述的注入攻击，ANTAP实现了接近零的攻击成功率（ASR），而基于描述的路由基线ASR高达67.3%及以上；面对自适应嵌入攻击，ANTAP相较于基于嵌入的基线降低了20%的ASR，同时在设计上天然抵御描述操纵。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，在多智能体系统中放弃基于间接代理的能力评估、转向基于主动测试的实证路由是提升安全性的有效路径，非文本代数投影范式为防御元数据层面的各类攻击提供了坚实的设计保障。

title: LWDrive: Layer-Wise World-Model-Guided Vision-Language Model Planning for Autonomous Driving
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) provide powerful semantic understanding and commonsense reasoning for End-to-End Autonomous Driving (E2E-AD) planning. However, trajectories directly generated by VLMs often encode only coarse driving intentions and remain insufficient for geometrically accurate, future-aware, and multi-view-grounded planning. To address these limitations, we develop the Layer-Wise World-Model-Guided Driving framework (LWDrive). LWDrive is a VLM planning framework that refines coarse trajectories through layer-wise world-model guidance. Instead of treating the VLM output as the final trajectory, LWDrive uses it as an intent-aware coarse plan, expands a diverse candidate space around it, and progressively refines the candidates through a Foresight Cascade Planner (FCP). Specifically, we introduce future-frame generation supervision to encourage the VLM to learn forward-looking scene representations, thereby injecting planning-relevant predictive dynamics into its internal hidden states. Built upon these world-model-supervised representations, FCP exploits VLM features across multiple layers and integrates historical temporal states, Action-Query representations, and current-frame multi-view Bird's-Eye-View (BEV) features to refine candidate trajectories in a coarse-to-fine manner. This design enables progressive correction of spatial positions and motion trends while grounding trajectory refinement with multi-view scene cues and preserving the high-level driving intention produced by the large model. Finally, a score head evaluates the refined candidates and selects the best trajectory as the final planning output. Experiments show that LWDrive achieves a score of 92.0 on the NAVSIM benchmark and 89.6 on NAVSIM-v2. Code and models will be made publicly available.

AI.tldr: LWDrive 是一种面向端到端自动驾驶的 VLM 规划框架，通过层式世界模型引导将 VLM 生成的粗粒度轨迹逐步细化为几何精确、多视图感知的最终规划轨迹，在 NAVSIM 和 NAVSIM-v2 基准上分别达到 92.0 和 89.6 分。
AI.motivation: 现有 Vision-Language Models (VLMs) 直接生成的轨迹仅编码粗略的驾驶意图，缺乏几何精确性、未来感知能力和多视图空间感知能力，无法满足端到端自动驾驶规划对高精度和场景理解的需求。
AI.method: LWDrive 提出 Layer-Wise World-Model-Guided Driving 框架：首先将 VLM 输出作为意图感知的粗计划，围绕其扩展多样候选空间；然后通过未来帧生成监督使 VLM 学习前向场景表征，向隐状态注入预测动态；最后利用 Foresight Cascade Planner (FCP) 跨多层级提取 VLM 特征，融合时序状态、Action-Query 表示和当前帧多视图 BEV 特征，以粗到细方式逐步修正候选轨迹的空间位置与运动趋势，并通过评分头选取最优轨迹。
AI.result: LWDrive 在 NAVSIM 基准上取得 92.0 分，在 NAVSIM-v2 上取得 89.6 分，验证了层式世界模型引导的轨迹细化方法在端到端自动驾驶规划中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: LWDrive 表明，通过世界模型监督的 VLM 隐状态表示结合级联规划器，能够弥合 VLM 高层语义理解与低层几何精确规划之间的鸿沟，为基于 VLM 的自动驾驶规划提供了新的粗到细范式。

title: DOPD: Dual On-policy Distillation
summary: On-policy distillation (OPD) offers superior capacity transfer by supervising student-sampled trajectories with dense token-level signals. To furnish high-quality supervision sources and thereby elevate the performance frontier of distillation, an intuitive direction is to infuse privileged information to either teacher or student itself. However, this additional input induces a potential failure mode we dub privilege illusion: a pattern that conflates the transferable capability gap that students are meant to close, and the information asymmetry gap that can only be mimicked but never replicated. This issue is further amplified by the inherent non-uniformity of token-level supervision, where only a small subset of tokens carries pivotal capability-bearing signals. To this end, we propose DOPD, an advantage-aware dual distillation paradigm that dynamically routes token-level supervision between privileged teacher and privileged student policies based on their advantage gap and relative probabilities. Each token receives supervision of different strength, objective, and strategy from either teacher or student itself, which transfers credible capability while simultaneously receiving auxiliary signals, to alleviate privilege illusion. Extensive experiments on both large language model (LLM) and vision-language model (VLM) settings demonstrate that DOPD consistently outperforms Vanilla OPD and other counterparts. Further results on stability, robustness, continual learning, and out-of-distribution tasks validate its superiority.

AI.tldr: 提出DOPD，一种优势感知的双重蒸馏范式，通过动态路由token级监督信号在特权教师与学生策略之间分配，有效缓解特权信息引入导致的"特权幻觉"问题，在LLM和VLM任务上显著优于传统在线蒸馏方法。
AI.motivation: 在线蒸馏（OPD）通过密集的token级信号对学生采样轨迹进行监督，实现了优越的能力迁移，但引入特权信息（privileged information）作为高质量监督来源时，会导致一种称为"特权幻觉"（privilege illusion）的失败模式：模型混淆了学生应弥合的"可迁移能力差距"与只能模仿而无法复现的"信息不对称差距"，且token级监督的非均匀性使得仅少量关键token承载能力信号，放大了这一问题。
AI.method: 提出DOPD（advantage-aware Dual distillation paradigm），一种基于优势感知的双重蒸馏范式，根据特权教师与特权学生策略之间的优势差距（advantage gap）和相对概率，动态地将每个token的监督信号路由至特权教师策略或特权学生策略；不同token从教师或学生自身接收不同强度、目标和策略的监督，既传递可信能力又接收辅助信号，从而缓解特权幻觉。
AI.result: 在大型语言模型（LLM）和视觉-语言模型（VLM）设置上的广泛实验表明，DOPD持续优于传统在线蒸馏（Vanilla OPD）及其他对比方法；进一步在稳定性、鲁棒性、持续学习和分布外任务上的结果验证了其优越性。
AI.conclusion: 特权信息在蒸馏中若不加区分地引入会导致特权幻觉，而DOPD通过动态路由token级监督信号，有效区分了可迁移能力差距与信息不对称差距，为在线蒸馏中安全利用特权信息提供了新范式。

title: StrucTab: A Structured Optimization Framework for Table Parsing
summary: Table parsing aims to convert table images into structured, machine-readable representations, a task requiring the joint perception of complex spatial layouts and textual content. While recent vision-language models (VLMs) enable end-to-end parsing, they typically rely on direct supervision of the final output, thereby bypassing the explicit intermediate reasoning that is crucial for understanding complex table structures. Furthermore, attempts to optimize these models using reinforcement learning (RL) are often hindered by unstable or ambiguous reward designs, limiting potential performance gains. To address these limitations, we propose StrucTab, a table parsing model learned through intermediate structural supervision and reward decomposition. At the modeling level, by decomposing the parsing process into human-inspired subtasks, such as row-column counting and merged-cell analysis, StrucTab progressively unifies them through a sequential reasoning strategy. At the optimization level, we introduce Uni-TabRL, a unified RL framework that leverages decomposed rewards (validity, structure, and content) to provide stable and informative optimization signals. Finally, at the evaluation level, we present TableVerse-5K, a large-scale, challenging benchmark encompassing diverse, real-world table scenarios. Extensive experiments demonstrate the state-of-the-art performance of StrucTab across all evaluated public benchmarks and significant improvements on TableVerse-5K, validating the effectiveness of explicit structural modeling and decomposed reward optimization. Code and benchmark are publicly available at https://github.com/VirtualLUOUCAS/StrucTab.

AI.tldr: StrucTab提出了一种结合中间结构监督与分解奖励优化的表格解析框架，通过将解析过程分解为人类启发的子任务并使用Uni-TabRL统一强化学习框架进行优化，在多个公开基准和所提出的大型基准TableVerse-5K上取得了最先进的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于视觉语言模型（VLM）的端到端表格解析方法依赖最终输出的直接监督，缺乏对复杂表格结构理解的显式中间推理过程；同时，强化学习优化方法常因不稳定或模糊的奖励设计而受限，难以充分发挥性能潜力。
AI.method: StrucTab从建模、优化和评估三个层面入手。建模层面，将表格解析过程分解为行计数、列计数和合并单元格分析等人类启发的子任务，并通过顺序推理策略逐步统一；优化层面，提出统一强化学习框架Uni-TabRL，利用分解奖励（有效性奖励、结构奖励、内容奖励）提供稳定且信息丰富的优化信号；评估层面，构建了包含多样化真实场景的大规模挑战性基准TableVerse-5K。
AI.result: StrucTab在所有公开基准上均取得了最先进的性能，并在所提基准TableVerse-5K上展现了显著改进，验证了显式结构建模与分解奖励优化的有效性。代码和基准已公开在GitHub上。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明了将显式的中间结构监督与分解奖励优化引入表格解析任务的有效性，为视觉语言模型在结构化文档理解任务中的训练提供了新思路，即通过子任务分解和细粒度奖励设计来提升模型对复杂空间布局与文本内容的联合感知能力。

title: H-GRPO: Permutation-Invariant Reinforcement Learning for Grounded Visual Reasoning
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) often achieve high performance on benchmarks while remaining "black boxes", yet they remain prone to hallucination or rely on superficial shortcuts. In this work, we propose a framework designed to enhance both performance and interpretability through De-compositional Evidence Grounding. Unlike monolithic inference approaches, our approach forces the model to decompose a global query into a sequence of atomic sub-questions, each requiring an explicit sub-answer and critically a localized evidence bounding box. By grounding intermediate logical steps (e.g. identifying a container, analyzing liquid properties, and assessing environmental context) in specific visual regions, we construct a structured reasoning path that mirrors human-like deduction. This allows the final answer to emerge as a logical consequence of verified visual facts rather than a statistical guess.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于分解式证据链推理的框架，通过将全局查询分解为原子性子问题并要求每个子问题对应显式的答案和局部证据边界框，迫使视觉语言模型构建结构化推理路径，以增强可解释性并减少幻觉与虚假关联。
AI.motivation: 当前视觉语言模型（VLM）在基准测试中表现优异，但本质仍是"黑箱"模型，容易产生幻觉或依赖浅层统计捷径，缺乏透明、可验证的推理过程，亟需一种既能提升性能又能增强可解释性的方法。
AI.method: 提出分解式证据链推理框架（De-compositional Evidence Grounding），区别于传统的端到端推理，该框架强制模型将全局查询分解为一系列原子化（atomic）子问题，每个子问题要求一个显式的子答案以及一个关键的局部证据边界框（localized evidence bounding box），通过在具体视觉区域上定位中间逻辑步骤（如识别容器、分析液体属性、评估环境上下文），构建类似人类演绎推理的结构化推理路径。
AI.result: 论文未提供具体数值结果或基准实验数据，仅从方法论层面描述了所提框架的设计原理和预期优势。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过将最终答案建立在可验证的视觉事实链而非统计猜测之上，使得模型输出成为逻辑推理的必然结果，有望在提升视觉语言模型判断正确性的同时赋予其可解释的推理能力。

title: Scene-aware Prediction of Diverse Human Movement Goals
summary: Anticipation of human behaviours facilitates autonomous systems in proactive planning. Human behaviour could be stochastic due to varying goals. Human goals typically guide their own movement and could therefore help to predict the human trajectory and human motion in the long-term. To infer the human movement intentions, the environmental context plays a significant role, in addition to the social cues expressed by the individual. Previous works on human goals prediction either require semantic knowledge of the scene, or only tackle interactions with objects. In this paper, we propose a novel multi-goal prediction method using the generative model to address the stochasticity of human movement. It leverages the current RGB scene and the human pose to predict diverse potential future goals of human movement based on the Conditional Variational Autoencoder (CVAE). Our results demonstrate that our approach is capable of generating multiple movement goals in the scene via samplings in latent space of the CVAE and exhibits generalization capability across scenarios in GTA-IM dataset and PROX dataset. Code is publicly available at \href{https://github.com/Q-Y-Yang/DiverseGoalsPrediction.git}{\texttt{https://github.com/Q-Y-Yang/DiverseGoalsPrediction}}.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于条件变分自编码器（CVAE）的多目标预测方法，利用当前RGB场景和人体姿态信息，通过潜在空间采样生成多样化的人类未来运动目标，以解决人类行为随机性问题，并在GTA-IM和PROX数据集上验证了其泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有的人类目标预测方法要么需要场景的语义知识，要么仅能处理人与物体的交互，缺乏对行为随机性的建模能力。然而，人类行为因其多变的目标而具有随机性，且环境场景和社交线索对推断运动意图至关重要，因此需要一种能够生成多样化潜在目标且无需语义标注的预测方法。
AI.method: 提出一种基于条件变分自编码器（CVAE）的多目标预测框架，以当前RGB场景图像和人体姿态作为条件输入，通过CVAE的潜在空间进行随机采样，生成多个多样化且合理的人类未来运动目标，从而显式建模人类行为的随机性。
AI.result: 该方法能够在场景中生成多个不同的运动目标，并在GTA-IM和PROX两个数据集上表现出跨场景的泛化能力，验证了生成式模型在多样化目标预测中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明，利用CVAE结合RGB场景和人体姿态进行潜在空间采样，能够有效生成多样且合理的人类运动目标，为自主系统在复杂环境中进行前瞻性规划提供了可行方案，未来可进一步扩展到实时预测与人机交互场景。

title: Explainability-Aware Frustum Attack: Exposing Structural Vulnerabilities in LiDAR-Based 3D Object Detectors
comment: The 19th European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV 2026)
summary: The structural vulnerabilities of point cloud-based 3D object detectors remain poorly understood. Prior work has studied adversarial robustness primarily on isolated 3D object models, while recent LiDAR spoofing attacks target richer and more realistic driving scenes but focus mainly on physical realizability rather than understanding detector behavior or attack efficiency. In this work, we investigate how LiDAR-based detectors rely on spatial evidence in complex scenes and whether these reliance patterns can be exploited to induce failures more efficiently. To this end, we propose an explainability-guided adversarial analysis methodology. We introduce the Saliency-LiDAR (SALL) method, which aggregates Integrated Gradient attributions across scenes to produce universal saliency maps for LiDAR-based 3D object detectors. Guided by these maps, we design the Explainability-aware Frustum Attack (EFA), which selectively perturbs only the most influential frustums rather than uniformly attacking entire object regions. Experiments on KITTI and nuScenes, across detectors such as PointPillars and SECOND, show that EFA reduces detection recall by more than 15 percentage points while requiring 25-50% fewer perturbed frustums than the state-of-the-art non-saliency-aware baseline. These findings reveal that modern 3D detectors concentrate discriminative evidence in a small subset of spatial regions, exposing a structural robustness vulnerability in current LiDAR perception systems. Our code is released at https://github.com/SecMindLab/Saliency_LiDAR.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于可解释性引导的对抗分析方法（SALL），通过聚合积分梯度生成通用显著性图，并设计显著性感知的视锥攻击（EFA），在仅扰动关键空间区域的情况下使3D点云检测器的召回率下降超过15%，揭示出当前LiDAR检测器存在严重结构性鲁棒性漏洞。
AI.motivation: 现有针对点云3D目标检测器的对抗攻击研究主要集中于孤立物体模型或物理可实现性，缺乏对检测器在复杂驾驶场景下空间证据依赖模式的深入理解，导致攻击效率低下且对检测器行为机理认识不足。
AI.method: 提出Saliency-LiDAR（SALL）方法，跨场景聚合积分梯度（Integrated Gradients）属性以生成面向LiDAR 3D目标检测器的通用显著性图；在此基础上设计可解释性感知的视锥攻击（EFA），依据显著性图仅选择性扰动最具影响力的视锥区域，而非均匀攻击整个目标区域。
AI.result: 在KITTI和nuScenes数据集上，针对PointPillars和SECOND等检测器的实验表明，EFA在减少25-50%扰动视锥数量的情况下，仍能使检测召回率下降超过15个百分点，显著优于非显著性感知的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 当前LiDAR 3D检测器将判别性证据高度集中在少数空间子区域中，这一结构性依赖模式暴露了严重的鲁棒性漏洞，为设计更高效的对抗攻击以及更鲁棒的感知系统提供了关键启示。

title: Variance Reduction on the Camera Axis: Multi-View Score Distillation for 3D
comment: 30 pages, 19 figures. Submitted to WACV 2027 (Algorithms Track)
summary: Score distillation turns a pretrained 2D diffusion model into a 3D generator, but the per-step gradient is estimated from a single randomly chosen view: it is high-variance and blind to global shape consistency. Prior work addresses this by retraining the diffusion prior on multi-view data; this improves consistency but makes the sampling contribution inseparable from prior quality. We instead isolate the sampling axis. The per-step gradient is one noisy sample of an expectation over views; aggregating K samples per step at a fixed total UNet budget reduces variance without touching the prior. We introduce Multi-View Aggregated Score Distillation (MV-SDI), which aggregates gradients from K views per step via gradient accumulation, keeping peak memory unchanged and the 2D prior frozen, and draws views as antithetic antipodal pairs, a prior-independent geometric property, for balanced angular coverage. At a fixed 10,000-UNet-call budget, K=2 raises CLIP R-Precision from 74.8% to 83.8% and CLIP score from 0.297 to 0.312, with consistent gains on HPSv2 and ImageReward and a 0.0% divergence rate on the 43-prompt benchmark; optimization steps halve as a consequence. K=4 gives a fourfold step reduction at R-Precision 86.9% and CLIP 0.307, still well above the single-view baseline on every alignment metric. MV-SDI is compatible with gradient-based score-distillation pipelines, including Score Distillation via Inversion, and requires no retraining and no multi-view data.

AI.tldr: MV-SDI 通过多视图梯度累积与对跖对采样策略，在不重新训练或使用多视图数据的前提下，显著降低了分数蒸馏采样的梯度方差，提升了3D生成的一致性与对齐指标，并将UNet调用次数减半甚至缩减至四分之一。
AI.motivation: 现有的分数蒸馏方法将预训练2D扩散模型转化为3D生成器时，每步梯度仅从单个随机视图估计，导致梯度方差高且缺乏全局形状一致性；先前工作通过在多视图数据上重新训练扩散先验来解决该问题，但这使得采样贡献与先验质量不可分离。
AI.method: 提出多视图聚合分数蒸馏（MV-SDI），在固定总UNet预算下每步从K个视图聚合梯度（通过梯度累积实现，峰值内存不变且2D先验冻结），并采用对跖对（antithetic antipodal pairs）采样视图以最大化角度覆盖均衡性，这是与先验无关的几何属性。
AI.result: 在10,000次UNet调用预算下，K=2时CLIP R-Precision从74.8%提升至83.8%，CLIP score从0.297提升至0.312，HPSv2和ImageReward指标一致提升，43提示基准上发散率为0.0%；优化步数减半。K=4时R-Precision达86.9%、CLIP score达0.307，步数缩减至四分之一，所有对齐指标均优于单视图基线。
AI.conclusion: MV-SDI表明，仅通过改进采样策略而非修改先验模型，即可在不引入多视图数据或重新训练的情况下大幅提升3D生成质量，且兼容SDS、SDI等基于梯度的分数蒸馏管线。

title: Rigel: Self-Distilled Score Adaptation for Image and Video Captioning Evaluation
summary: Automatic evaluation of image and video captioning is essential for benchmarking multimodal systems, although standard evaluation metrics show limited alignment with human judgments. Recent approaches using large language models (LLMs), commonly referred to as LLM-as-a-Judge, have improved alignment with human judgments but still suffer from a mismatch between large-vocabulary language modeling and evaluation over a small label set. To address this, we propose Rigel, an automatic evaluation metric for image and video captioning, based on self-distilled score adaptation. The metric employs an evaluation-specific scoring head distilled from a frozen LLM, which captures judgment signals in a task-aligned space without relying on large-vocabulary token sets. We then refine the LLM backbone with human judgment data. To train Rigel, we constructed the Vid-Lepus dataset, which contains 3,338 video clips, 33,380 reference captions, and 5,637 candidate captions. Experiments on multiple benchmarks show that Rigel outperforms state-of-the-art metrics, achieving over 10-point improvements on ActivityNet-Fact in the reference-free setting.

AI.tldr: Rigel 提出基于自蒸馏分数适配的图像与视频描述自动评估指标，通过从冻结的大语言模型中蒸馏评估专用评分头，并在人类判断数据上微调 LLM 骨干网络，在多个基准上超越现有方法，在 ActivityNet-Fact 参考无关设置下提升超过 10 个点。
AI.motivation: 现有图像与视频描述的自动评估指标与人类判断一致性有限，而基于 LLM-as-a-Judge 的方法虽有所改进，但仍存在大词汇语言建模与小标签集评估之间的不匹配问题。
AI.method: 提出 Rigel 指标，核心包括从冻结的 LLM 中蒸馏出评估专用的评分头，将判断信号映射到任务对齐的空间中，避免依赖大词汇 token 集；随后使用人类判断数据对 LLM 骨干网络进行微调；为训练 Rigel，构建了包含 3,338 个视频片段、33,380 条参考描述和 5,637 条候选描述的 Vid-Lepus 数据集。
AI.result: 在多个基准上的实验表明，Rigel 在参考无关设置下于 ActivityNet-Fact 上取得超过 10 个点的提升，整体性能超越当前最先进的评估指标。
AI.conclusion: 通过自蒸馏分数适配有效弥合了 LLM 语言建模与评估任务之间的语义空间差异，验证了任务对齐的评分头结合人类反馈微调可显著提升自动评估与人类判断的一致性，为多模态描述评估提供了新范式。

title: SICAGE: Speaker-Independent Culture-Aware Gesture Generation using TED4C-L Dataset
summary: Recent co-speech gesture generation methods often overlook cultural differences, limiting their effectiveness in human-agent interaction. Moreover, culture-conditioned models are rarely evaluated under speaker-disjoint splits, so apparent "cultural" behavior may be confounded with speaker-specific gesturing style. We introduce SICAGE, a modular framework for culture-aware co-speech gesture generation that conditions motion synthesis models on speaker-independent cultural representations. SICAGE learns these representations from audio and text by treating each speaker as a separate domain while imposing invariance across speakers. This encourages representations to remain culture-discriminative while reducing dependence on speaker identity. The resulting cultural embeddings condition a multimodal generator to produce culturally appropriate gestures. We instantiate this idea with two domain generalization approaches: adversarial learning and Fishr regularization. We further introduce ALaDiT, a real-time diffusion-based gesture generator designed to efficiently incorporate the learned cultural embeddings. To validate our method, we built TED4C-L, a 106-hour multimodal dataset of 764 TED speakers from four cultural groups. Experiments show that SICAGE improves motion realism, diversity, beat synchronization, semantic relevance, and cultural consistency.

AI.tldr: SICAGE提出了一种模块化框架，通过对抗学习和Fishr正则化从音频和文本中学习说话者无关的文化表征，并结合实时扩散式手势生成器ALaDiT，在包含764位演讲者、106小时数据的TED4C-L数据集上显著提升了动作真实感、多样性、节拍同步、语义相关性和文化一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有共语手势生成方法往往忽略了文化差异，且文化条件模型通常在说话者非独立划分的数据集上评估，导致表观上的"文化"行为可能与说话者个人手势风格相混杂，缺乏真正的文化感知能力。
AI.method: SICAGE采用模块化框架，将每个说话者视为独立领域并通过施加跨说话者不变性来学习说话者无关的文化表征，具体使用对抗学习和Fishr正则化两种域泛化方法；同时提出了ALaDiT，一种实时扩散式手势生成器，用于高效融合所学文化嵌入以生成文化适配的手势。
AI.result: 在自建的TED4C-L数据集（106小时、764位来自四个文化群体的TED演讲者）上的实验表明，SICAGE在动作真实感、多样性、节拍同步、语义相关性和文化一致性等多个指标上均取得了显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了文化表征与说话者身份解耦对于文化感知手势生成的重要性，验证了域泛化方法在跨文化手势生成中的有效性，为构建更具文化包容性的人机交互系统提供了可行框架和标准化评估数据集。

title: OmniDance: Multimodal Driven Dance Video Generation with Large-scale Internet Data
summary: Music-driven dance video generation aims to synthesize expressive human motion that is temporally aligned with music while maintaining high visual fidelity. Despite recent progress, existing methods still face two key limitations: the lack of large-scale, high-quality dance video datasets, and the absence of principled frameworks for integrating music as a complementary conditioning signal into Video Generation Foundation Models. To address these limitations, we introduce CIPE-Dance, a large-scale Internet-sourced dance video dataset with choreography-informed text annotations, constructed via a progressive expert pipeline. To the best of our knowledge, CIPE-Dance is the largest dataset for dance video generation to date, comprising 300k high-quality clips over 400 hours and covering diverse dancers, environments, and dance genres. We further propose OmniDance, a framework-level recipe for integrating music into a TI2V foundation model without sacrificing its original controllability or visual fidelity. Motivated by the complementary roles of text as low-frequency semantics and music as high-frequency temporal dynamics, OmniDance co-designs a depth-aware specialization architecture, an anchored easy-to-hard curriculum learning strategy, and a modality-specialized time-dependent CFG strategy, enabling unified TI2V, MI2V, and MTI2V generation. Extensive experiments on CIPE-Dance demonstrate that OmniDance achieves state-of-the-art performance across all three tasks and exhibits robust multimodal integration capability. Project is available at https://github.com/AMAP-ML/OmniDance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 CIPE-Dance 大规模舞蹈视频数据集（30 万片段，400 小时以上），并设计 OmniDance 框架，将音乐作为互补条件集成到文本条件视频生成基础模型中，在文本到视频、音乐到视频以及文本-音乐联合驱动的舞蹈视频生成任务上均达到最优性能。
AI.motivation: 现有音乐驱动舞蹈视频生成方法面临两个关键限制：一是缺乏大规模高质量的舞蹈视频数据集，二是缺乏将音乐作为互补条件信号系统性地集成进视频生成基础模型的原则性框架。
AI.method: CIPE-Dance 通过渐进式专家流水线构建，包含 30 万高质量片段、超 400 小时时长，覆盖多样舞者、环境和舞种，并配有编舞信息文本注释。OmniDance 则基于文本条件的视频生成基础模型，利用文本作为低频语义、音乐作为高频时序动态的互补特性，联合设计了深度感知专门化架构、锚定的从易到难课程学习策略以及模态专用的时间相关 CFG 策略，实现文本到视频、音乐到视频以及文本-音乐联合驱动的统一生成。
AI.result: 在 CIPE-Dance 数据集上的大量实验表明，OmniDance 在文本到视频、音乐到视频、文本-音乐联合驱动的舞蹈视频生成三项任务上均达到最先进性能，并展现出鲁棒的多模态集成能力。
AI.conclusion: 本研究通过构建大规模高质量数据集和提出统一的框架级集成方案，有效解决了音乐驱动舞蹈视频生成中的数据与框架两大瓶颈，证明了在保持原有文本条件控制能力和视觉保真度的前提下将音乐模态有效融入视频生成基础模型的可行性。

title: CogSENet: Blind Image Deblurring with Blur-Conditioned Semantic Routing and Explicit Frequency Fusion
summary: Blind image deblurring demands the recovery of high-fidelity details and coherent structures from complex, unknown degradations. Current blind image deblurring methods struggle with real-world, spatially varying degradations, and lack the semantic awareness necessary to reliably differentiate valid textures from artifacts. To bridge this gap, we propose CogSENet, a dynamic, semantic-aligned reconstruction framework inspired by the eagle's visual system. By mimicking the eagle's active saccadic scanning, we devise a Semantic-Driven State Space Module (SDSSM) with semantic-aware token regrouping via differentiable routing, enabling prompt-conditioned long-range dependency modeling. To ensure physically interpretable recovery of textures and structures, a BiFreqFusionBlock (BFFB) mirrors functional differentiation of the eagle's retina by decomposing features into high and low frequencies using wavelet transforms. Finally, we estimate a continuous Blur Field (CBF) from blur image and fuse it with CLIP semantic priors to modulate the deepest latent features, emulating focal adaptation and enabling adaptive restoration under spatially non-uniform blur. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CogSENetoutperforms state-of-the-art deblurring methods in both visual quality and structural fidelity with fewer parameters, while also performing favorably on dehazing, deraining, and denoising tasks.

AI.tldr: CogSENet 提出一种受鹰视觉系统启发的动态语义对齐盲图像去模糊框架，通过语义驱动状态空间模块（SDSSM）、双频融合块（BFFB）和连续模糊场（CBF）估计，在更少参数下实现了优于现有方法的去模糊、去雾、去雨和去噪性能。
AI.motivation: 现有盲图像去模糊方法难以应对真实世界中空间变化的退化，缺乏语义感知能力，无法可靠区分有效纹理与伪影，导致高保真细节和连贯结构的恢复受限。
AI.method: 提出 CogSENet 框架，包含三个核心组件：语义驱动状态空间模块（SDSSM）通过可微分路由实现语义感知的令牌重组，模拟鹰主动扫视扫描以进行提示条件化的长程依赖建模；双频融合块（BFFB）利用小波变换将特征分解为高低频成分，模拟鹰视网膜功能分化以实现物理可解释的纹理与结构恢复；连续模糊场（CBF）从模糊图像估计并与 CLIP 语义先验融合，调制最深层的潜在特征，模拟焦点适应以实现空间非均匀模糊下的自适应恢复。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，CogSENet 在视觉质量和结构保真度上超越最先进的去模糊方法，且参数更少；同时在去雾、去雨和去噪任务上也表现良好。
AI.conclusion: 受生物视觉系统启发的语义感知动态重建框架能有效弥合盲图像去模糊中语义感知缺失的鸿沟，且多任务泛化能力表明该方法具有广泛适用性。

title: From Accuracy to Visual Dependence: Auditing and Filtering Modality Collapse in Traffic VideoQA
summary: High benchmark accuracy does not guarantee genuine use of visual evidence. We study this problem in traffic accident Video Question Answering (VideoQA), where correct answers should depend on scene-specific visual evidence but may instead be inferred from textual shortcuts. Through an audit of four public benchmarks, we find that several recent open-weight Vision-Language Models (VLMs) perform competitively, and sometimes better, without video input. On the MM-AU benchmark, removing video consistently improves accuracy, and adding more frames further degrades performance. To quantify visual dependence, we introduce two dataset-level diagnostics: Blind Gap, measuring above-chance text-only performance, and Visual Gain, measuring the marginal benefit of adding video. We further propose an instance-level Shortcut Score that combines text-only confidence with visual necessity signals, enabling continuous, training-free filtering of shortcut-prone questions. The resulting subsets reduce shortcut bias and improve visual grounding. Our findings reveal large differences in grounding quality across benchmarks and show that visually grounded evaluation, not just high accuracy, is essential in safety-critical VideoQA.

AI.tldr: 本文通过审计发现多个开源视觉语言模型在交通场景VideoQA中无需视频输入也能取得具有竞争力的结果，并提出了Blind Gap、Visual Gain和Shortcut Score三个诊断指标，用于量化模型对视觉证据的依赖程度并过滤捷径倾向问题，揭示了视觉 grounded 评估在安全关键型VideoQA中的必要性。
AI.motivation: 高基准准确率并不能保证模型真正利用了视觉证据，在交通场景VideoQA中，模型可能依赖文本捷径而非场景特定的视觉信息来回答正确，现有评估指标无法量化这种视觉依赖程度，亟需诊断工具来识别和过滤捷径倾向问题。
AI.method: 通过对四个公开基准进行审计，对比有无视频输入条件下的模型性能；提出两个数据集级诊断指标Blind Gap（衡量纯文本超随机水平的性能）和Visual Gain（衡量添加视频的边际收益），以及一个实例级Shortcut Score，结合纯文本置信度与视觉必要性信号实现无需训练的连续过滤机制。
AI.result: 在MM-AU基准上，移除视频反而持续提升准确率，增加更多帧会进一步降低性能；多个开源VLM在不输入视频的情况下表现与有视频相当甚至更优；所提出的Shortcut Score能够有效过滤捷径倾向问题，减少捷径偏置并提升视觉grounding质量。
AI.conclusion: 不同基准在视觉grounding质量上存在显著差异，仅追求高准确率不足以评估安全关键型VideoQA模型，视觉 grounded 评估才是保障模型可靠性的核心要素。

title: Semantic-Driven Scale and Spatial Selection for Efficient Cross-Modal Alignment in Referring Remote Sensing Image Segmentation
summary: Referring Remote Sensing Image Segmentation (RRSIS) seeks to localize and segment the target object or region specified by a natural language expression in a remote sensing image. While existing RRSIS models have benefited from large-scale foundation models, they predominantly rely on full fine-tuning. These approaches are computationally intensive and may weaken the generalization ability of pre-trained models, as extensive fine-tuning on significantly smaller downstream datasets can distort the well-structured feature representations learned during large-scale pre-training. Although Parameter-Efficient Tuning (PET) offers a potential alternative, existing PET frameworks primarily focus on single-modal optimization, failing to capture the complex cross-modal dependencies required for multimodal reasoning, while simultaneously struggling to bridge the substantial domain gap between natural scenes and aerial imagery. To address these limitations, we propose a novel framework, Semantic-driven Scale and Spatial Selection for Efficient Cross-modal Alignment (S4ECA), which enables effective and efficient cross-modal interaction through parameter-efficient adaptation. Specifically, we design a dual-encoder adapter architecture. The textual adapter employs learnable queries to distill highly semantic language proxies from word-level embeddings, facilitating early grounding. Simultaneously, the visual adapter refines hierarchical feature representations through a multi-scale dense extractor, followed by a language-guided scale and spatial selection mechanism that dynamically emphasizes relevant visual contexts, ensuring precise cross-modal alignment. By updating only 2.4% of the backbone parameters, our proposed model achieves state-of-the-art performance on the RRSIS-D and RefSegRS datasets, demonstrating superior efficiency and precision in complex aerial scenarios.

AI.tldr: 提出S4ECA框架，通过语义驱动的尺度和空间选择机制实现高效跨模态对齐，仅更新2.4%骨干参数即在RRSIS-D和RefSegRS数据集上达到遥感图像指代分割最佳性能。
AI.motivation: 现有RRSIS模型依赖全量微调，计算开销大且易破坏预训练模型在大规模数据上学到的通用特征表示；而现有参数高效微调方法多聚焦于单模态优化，难以捕捉多模态推理所需的复杂跨模态依赖，也无法有效弥合自然场景与航空影像之间的显著域差距。
AI.method: 提出S4ECA框架，采用双编码器适配器架构：文本适配器通过可学习查询从词级嵌入中蒸馏高层语义语言代理，实现早期语言锚定；视觉适配器通过多尺度密集提取器细化层次化特征表示，并引入语言引导的尺度和空间选择机制，动态强调相关视觉上下文以实现精准跨模态对齐。
AI.result: 仅更新骨干网络2.4%的参数，在RRSIS-D和RefSegRS数据集上取得了最新的最佳性能，在复杂航空场景中展现出优越的效率和精度。
AI.conclusion: S4ECA验证了参数高效微调在遥感图像指代分割任务中的有效性，通过语义驱动的跨模态对齐策略在极小参数量更新下即可超越全量微调方法，为多模态遥感推理中高效利用预训练模型提供了新思路。

title: Intermediate Text Representation Guided Text-to-Image Generation for Enhancing One-and-Only Alignment
summary: Text-to-image (T2I) diffusion models often fail to faithfully render explicit textual descriptions, instead defaulting to strongly learned visual priors due to a phenomenon referred to as concept association bias. We show that such bias is particularly strong for one-and-only (OAO) objects, entities that exist in a single canonical form, such as celestial bodies, landmarks, and artworks. The deeply ingrained visual identity for these concepts often resists modification through prompting alone. Addressing this challenge, we first identify through an information-theoretic analysis that the final text embedding discards concept-level information present in the intermediate-layer text representations, reducing the mutual information available to the subsequent denoising process. We then propose Intermediate Text Representation (IR)-guided diffusion, which injects intermediate hidden states of the text encoder into the conditioning signal during early denoising steps, recovering suppressed concepts without any additional training, optimization, or external models. To systematically evaluate the challenging task of aligning generative outputs with unusual prompts for OAO objects, we introduce OAO-AttackBench, a benchmark comprising counterfactual prompts that directly conflict with the core visual identity of OAO objects. Experiments on four benchmarks, including OAO-AttackBench, show that our method achieves up to a 19.1 percentage-point improvement in VQAScore while preserving generation fidelity and human preference. Project page: https://soyoun-won.github.io/one-and-only-ir-guidance/.

AI.tldr: 本文发现文本到图像扩散模型对"唯一性对象"存在概念关联偏差，提出基于中间文本表示引导的扩散方法，通过注入文本编码器的中间隐状态来恢复被丢弃的概念信息，无需额外训练即可显著提升异常提示下的生成对齐度。
AI.motivation: 文本到图像扩散模型在渲染显式文本描述时常常失败，尤其对于具有单一规范形式的"唯一性对象"，模型会默认使用其强烈的视觉先验而忽略提示中的修改要求，这种现象被称为概念关联偏差。作者通过信息论分析发现，最终文本嵌入丢弃了中间层文本表示中的概念级信息，减少了去噪过程可利用的互信息，现有方法难以仅通过提示工程克服这一偏差。
AI.method: 本文提出中间文本表示引导扩散方法，在早期去噪步骤中将文本编码器的中间隐状态注入到条件信号中，从而恢复被抑制的概念信息。该方法无需任何额外训练、优化或外部模型。同时，为系统评估非典型提示下唯一性对象的生成对齐任务，作者构建了OAO-AttackBench基准，包含与这些对象核心视觉身份直接冲突的反事实提示。
AI.result: 在包括OAO-AttackBench在内的四个基准上，该方法在VQAScore指标上实现了最高19.1个百分点的提升，同时保持了生成保真度和人类偏好。
AI.conclusion: 本文揭示了扩散模型中概念关联偏差的信息论根源，提供了一种轻量级、无需训练的干预策略来提升文本-图像对齐。该工作为理解扩散模型的语义表示瓶颈以及设计更可控的生成方法提供了新的视角和实用工具。

title: VisReflect: Latent Visual Reflection for Fine-Grained Perception in Long Visual Context
summary: Large Vision Language Models (LVLMs) have achieved remarkable success on vision-language tasks, yet fine-grained perception over high-resolution images and long-context videos remains challenging. As the number of visual tokens increases, the visual attention sink phenomenon becomes increasingly severe, causing irrelevant tokens to absorb a disproportionate amount of attention mass. Recent approaches attempt to mitigate this issue by explicitly predicting bounding boxes or temporal spans and re-encoding the cropped visual regions. Such methods depend on unreliable numeric localization in the discrete token space and incur significant computational overhead due to additional forward passes. In this work, we propose **VisReflect**, a simple yet effective framework that improves fine-grained perception in long visual contexts through latent visual reflection. Instead of decoding intermediate predictions into discrete tokens, the model generates continuous visual reflection that represents question-relevant visual features in the latent space. These reflections selectively emphasize salient regions or frames, guiding attention towards relevant visual tokens within a single forward pass. We conduct comprehensive evaluations on challenging high-resolution image benchmarks, including BLINK, V*, and HRBench-4K/8K, as well as video understanding benchmarks such as MVBench, VideoMME, and MLVU. Our method consistently improves over strong baselines, achieving gains of 4.1% on image benchmarks and 1.8% on video benchmarks. Compared with zooming-based methods, our model achieves comparable performance while reducing inference time by roughly 44% on video understanding.

AI.tldr: VisReflect通过潜在空间中的连续视觉反射机制，在单次前向传播中引导注意力聚焦于相关视觉token，无需依赖离散的边界框预测或额外的前向计算，从而有效缓解了LVLM在高分辨率图像和长视频理解中的视觉注意力下沉问题，在多个基准上取得提升并将视频推理时间降低约44%。
AI.motivation: 随着视觉token数量的增加，大型视觉语言模型（LVLM）在高分辨率图像和长视频理解任务中面临严重的视觉注意力下沉现象，即无关token吸收了过多注意力权重；现有方法通过显式预测边界框或时间跨度并重新编码裁剪区域来缓解该问题，但依赖于离散token空间中不可靠的数值定位，且额外的前向计算带来了显著的计算开销。
AI.method: 提出VisReflect框架，通过潜在视觉反射机制改进长视觉上下文中的细粒度感知：模型不将中间预测解码为离散token，而是在潜在空间中生成连续视觉反射（continuous visual reflection），这些反射代表了与问题相关的视觉特征，能够选择性突出显著区域或帧，在单次前向传播中引导注意力聚焦于相关视觉token。
AI.result: 在高分辨率图像基准（BLINK、V*、HRBench-4K/8K）和视频理解基准（MVBench、VideoMME、MLVU）上的综合评估表明，VisReflect相较于强基线在图像基准上平均提升4.1%，在视频基准上平均提升1.8%；与基于缩放的zoom方法相比，在达到可比性能的同时将视频推理时间减少约44%。
AI.conclusion: VisReflect验证了在潜在空间中进行连续视觉反射而非显式离散化定位的有效性，为缓解LVLM中的视觉注意力下沉提供了一种轻量且高效的方案，其单次前向传播的设计在保持性能的同时显著降低了推理延迟，对高分辨率图像和长视频等长视觉上下文任务具有重要实用价值。

title: A Classifier-Agnostic Zero-Shot Adversarial Attack Detection via CLIP
summary: Adversarial attacks pose a challenge to the reliability of deep learning models, motivating effective detection methods. Existing techniques often rely on attack-specific assumptions, access to adversarial samples, or knowledge of the underlying classifier (white-box). We propose \textit{$A^4D$ (\textbf{A}ttack- and \textbf{A}rchitecture-\textbf{A}gnostic \textbf{A}dversarial \textbf{D}etector)}, a completely black-box, zero-shot adversarial attack detection framework that utilizes prompt-based similarity scores derived from CLIP. To the best of our knowledge this is the first attempt to utilize CLIP for such a task. The method is based on two key observations: (i) CLIP is sensitive even to small imperceptible non-semantic perturbations; (ii) The shift in CLIP embedding space is not arbitrary and can be used as a robust attack indicator. Experiments across multiple attacks, datasets and classifiers validate that $A^4D$ achieves SOTA detection results in the attack-agnostic and classifier-agnostic setting.

AI.tldr: 提出A4D，一种基于CLIP提示相似性分数的完全黑盒、零样本对抗攻击检测框架，首次将CLIP用于该任务并在多种攻击和分类器上取得SOTA结果。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗攻击检测方法通常依赖攻击特定的假设、需要访问对抗样本或依赖底层分类器的白盒知识，缺乏一种通用、无需先验知识且完全黑盒的检测方案。
AI.method: 提出A4D框架，利用CLIP模型计算基于提示的相似性分数来实现对抗检测；核心基于两个发现：(i) CLIP对微小非语义扰动敏感；(ii) CLIP嵌入空间的偏移可作为鲁棒的攻击指示信号；整个框架无需访问对抗样本或分类器内部信息，实现完全黑盒与零 shot 检测。
AI.result: 在多种攻击类型、多个数据集和不同分类器上的实验表明，A4D在攻击无关和分类器无关的设置下达到了SOTA检测性能。
AI.conclusion: 该研究首次验证了CLIP在对抗攻击检测中的有效性，提供了一种不依赖攻击假设或模型结构的通用黑盒检测方案，为提升深度学习模型可靠性和防御泛化能力提供了新方向。

title: MUSE: Unlocking Timestep as Native Task Steering for One-Step Dense Prediction
summary: Monocular dense prediction has recently seen remarkable success by repurposing pre-trained diffusion models. This opens a promising yet challenging avenue for more efficient multi-task learning paradigm. However, existing multi-task diffusion methods often introduce parameter-heavy adapters, experts, or learnable task tokens, leading to computational redundancy. In this paper, we reveal an inherent mechanism within one-step diffusion models: the native, fixed sinusoidal timestep embedding can be repurposed as an endogenous task steering signal. Based on this discovery, we propose Multi-task Unified eStimation via timestep Embedding (MUSE), a parameter-free, single-model multi-tasking approach for dense prediction. We interpret this mechanism via Manifold Decoupling, where discrete, fixed timestep values deterministically steer the generation process towards decoupled, task-specific manifolds in the latent space. Extensive experiments across 10 datasets demonstrate that MUSE achieves highly competitive performance on both monocular depth and normal estimation, and its efficacy generalizes across U-Net and DiT architectures. Our work offers a concise and efficient path toward generalist vision models by simply unlocking the latent potential of existing generation infrastructure.

AI.tldr: 本文发现单步扩散模型中固定的正弦时间步嵌入可被重新用作内生的任务引导信号，据此提出MUSE——一种无需额外参数的单模型多任务密集预测方法，在深度和法线估计上取得竞争力结果，并适用于U-Net和DiT架构。
AI.motivation: 现有基于扩散模型的多任务密集预测方法通常引入参数繁重的适配器、专家模块或可学习任务令牌，导致计算冗余与效率低下；本文旨在利用扩散模型固有的时间步嵌入机制，实现无参数开销的高效多任务学习。
AI.method: 本文提出MUSE（Multi-task Unified eStimation via timestep Embedding），通过重用单步扩散模型中固定的正弦时间步嵌入作为内生任务引导信号，实现无需额外参数的单模型多任务密集预测；通过流形解耦（Manifold Decoupling）机制解释：离散的固定时间步值在潜在空间中确定性地将生成过程引导至解耦的任务特定流形。
AI.result: 在10个数据集上的大量实验表明，MUSE在单目深度估计和法线估计任务上均取得了具有高度竞争力的性能，且该方法在U-Net和DiT两种架构上均具有泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 本工作揭示了扩散模型中时间步嵌入可作为任务引导信号这一固有机制，提供了一条无需修改模型结构或增加参数即可实现通用视觉模型的简洁高效路径，通过解锁现有生成基础设施的潜在能力来实现多任务学习。

title: SADL: What to Ignore? A Benchmark for Subject-Aware Distractor Localization
summary: Photographs frequently contain \emph{visual distractors} besides foregrounds and backgrounds of the intended subject, competing for attention and weakening composition. While modern editing tools streamline object removal, identifying which objects to remove remains a mostly manual process. Existing saliency models and open-vocabulary detectors operate without subject awareness, failing to adapt to shifting user intent. Furthermore, context-agnostic removal may disrupt the scene's semantic coherence (e.g., keep the person but remove the chair they are sitting on). To address these limitations, we formalize the task of subject-aware distractor localization, which identifies distractors while retaining compositionally essential objects. This paper introduces \textsc{SADL}, the first real-world benchmark for this task, comprising 1,800 subject-aware cases across 1,000 photographs to enable systematic evaluation and facilitate future research. In total, there are 14,617 annotated candidates, including a robust set of 1,938 hard negatives to stress-test exclusion calibration. We evaluate seven proprietary and open-weight Vision-Language Models (VLMs) on a sequential pipeline of distractor classification followed by exclusion filtering, structured around five inclusion factors and three contextual exclusion rules. Our analysis reveals that VLMs are highly capable of identifying distractors, but then over-apply exclusion, which systematically suppresses true distractors at scale. By exposing this critical bottleneck, \textsc{SADL} provides a foundational diagnostic tool to advance subject-conditioned reasoning in multimodal systems.

AI.tldr: 本文首次形式化定义了主体感知干扰物定位任务，并构建了SADL基准数据集，系统评估了多种VLM在该任务上的表现，揭示了VLM在干扰物识别后过度应用排除规则、抑制真干扰物的关键瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 现有编辑工具虽能高效移除对象，但识别哪些对象应被移除仍是手动过程；现有显著性模型和开放词汇检测器缺乏主体感知能力，无法适应变化的用户意图，且上下文无关的移除可能破坏场景语义连贯性（如移除人坐着的椅子），因此需要形式化定义并系统评估主体感知的干扰物定位任务。
AI.method: 本文构建了SADL基准数据集，包含1,800个主体感知案例、1,000张照片、14,617个标注候选对象及1,938个难负例；设计了一个由干扰物分类和排除过滤组成的顺序流水线，基于五个包含因子和三个上下文排除规则进行结构化评估，并对七个专有和开源VLM进行了系统评测。
AI.result: 评估发现VLM在干扰物识别方面能力较强，但在后续排除过滤阶段过度应用排除规则，系统性压制了真正的干扰物，暴露出主体条件推理中的关键瓶颈。
AI.conclusion: SADL为评估多模态系统的主体条件推理能力提供了一个基础诊断工具，揭示了当前VLM在干扰物定位任务中的核心局限，为未来研究指明了方向。

title: Beyond Point Estimates for Glaucoma Visual Field Forecasting with Diffusion Models
summary: Forecasting visual fields (VFs) is critical for personalized monitoring and treatment planning in glaucoma. This is inherently uncertain due to heterogeneous disease progression and measurement variability, yet most existing methods produce single deterministic predictions that fail to represent this uncertainty. We formulate VF forecasting as a probabilistic prediction problem and the use of conditioned denoising diffusion models to generate distributions of plausible future VFs from longitudinal observations with irregular follow-up intervals. Experiments on two independent VF cohorts show that diffusion-based predictions produce well-calibrated distributions for clinically relevant VF measures. When reduced to a standard point-estimate, the proposed approach achieves state-of-the-art accuracy compared to clinical baselines and prior learning-based methods. Our results highlight the advantages of distributional modeling for VF forecasting and support a shift from point-estimate prediction toward uncertainty-aware, clinically interpretable risk assessment in glaucoma.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将视野预测形式化为概率预测问题，并采用条件去噪扩散模型从纵向观测中生成未来视野的分布，在双数据集上实现了校准良好的概率预测和SOTA的点估计精度，推动了青光眼风险预测从确定性估计向不确定性感知的转变。
AI.motivation: 视野预测对青光眼的个性化监测和治疗规划至关重要，但由于疾病进展的异质性和测量变异性，预测具有内在不确定性；然而现有方法大多产生单一确定性预测，无法有效表征这种不确定性，因此需要一种能够生成未来视野概率分布的方法。
AI.method: 本文将视野预测形式化为概率预测问题，采用条件去噪扩散模型（conditioned denoising diffusion models）从具有不规则随访间隔的纵向观测数据中生成未来视野的可行分布。
AI.result: 在两个独立视野数据集上的实验表明，基于扩散的预测在临床相关视野指标上产生了校准良好的概率分布；当将分布缩减为点估计时，该方法相较于临床基线和先前的学习方法达到了最先进的预测精度。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果凸显了分布建模在视野预测中的优势，支持将青光眼风险评估从点估计预测转向不确定性感知的、临床可解释的风险评估范式。

title: OWMDrive: Causality-Aware End-to-End Autonomous Driving via 4D Occupancy World Model
comment: International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS), 2026
summary: Autonomous driving systems are steadily moving toward end-to-end paradigms to mitigate the limited adaptability of rule-based pipelines in complex traffic environments. However, most existing learning-based methods still make decisions from static representations of the current scene, without explicit future rollouts or modeling of the temporal causal dynamics in traffic interactions.
